authors_text: Philipp Benz,Chaoning Zhang,Adil Karjauv,In So Kweon
title: Revisiting Batch Normalization for Improving Corruption Robustness
title_zh: 重新审视批量归一化以提高腐败鲁棒性
abstract: The performance of DNNs trained on clean images has been shown to decrease when the test images have common corruptions. In this work, we interpret corruption robustness as a domain shift and propose to rectify batch normalization (BN) statistics for improving model robustness. This is motivated by perceiving the shift from the clean domain to the corruption domain as a style shift that is represented by the BN statistics. We find that simply estimating and adapting the BN statistics on a few (32 for instance) representation samples, without retraining the model, improves the corruption robustness by a large margin on several benchmark datasets with a wide range of model architectures. For example, on ImageNet-C, statistics adaptation improves the top1 accuracy of ResNet50 from 39.2% to 48.7%. Moreover, we find that this technique can further improve state-of-the-art robust models from 58.1% to 63.3%.
summary: The performance of DNNs trained on clean images has been shown to decrease when the test images have common corruptions. In this work, we interpret corruption robustness as a domain shift and propose to rectify batch normalization (BN) statistics for improving model robustness. This is motivated by perceiving the shift from the clean domain to the corruption domain as a style shift that is represented by the BN statistics. We find that simply estimating and adapting the BN statistics on a few (32 for instance) representation samples, without retraining the model, improves the corruption robustness by a large margin on several benchmark datasets with a wide range of model architectures. For example, on ImageNet-C, statistics adaptation improves the top1 accuracy of ResNet50 from 39.2% to 48.7%. Moreover, we find that this technique can further improve state-of-the-art robust models from 58.1% to 63.3%.
abstract_zh: 当测试图像存在常见损坏时，在干净图像上训练的 DNN 的性能会下降。在这项工作中，我们将腐败鲁棒性解释为域转移，并建议纠正批量归一化（BN）统计数据以提高模型鲁棒性。其动机是将从廉洁领域到腐败领域的转变视为一种由 BN 统计数据所代表的风格转变。我们发现，在不重新训练模型的情况下，简单地估计和调整少数（例如 32 个）表示样本上的 BN 统计数据，可以在具有各种模型架构的多个基准数据集上大幅提高腐败鲁棒性。例如，在 ImageNet-C 上，统计自适应将 ResNet50 的 top1 准确率从 39.2% 提高到 48.7%。此外，我们发现该技术可以将最先进的稳健模型从 58.1% 进一步提高到 63.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文通过调整批量归一化（BN）统计量来提升深度神经网络对图像损坏的鲁棒性，无需重新训练模型。
AI.motivation: 作者将干净图像到损坏图像的领域迁移视为风格变化，认为BN统计量能表征这种变化，因此通过调整BN统计量可增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 在少量（如32个）样本上估计并适应BN统计量，无需模型再训练即可提升抗损坏能力。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-C等数据集上，ResNet50的top1准确率从39.2%提升至48.7%，并使先进鲁棒模型性能从58.1%提升至63.3%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过简单调整BN统计量显著提升模型抗损坏能力，且兼容多种模型架构，为提升鲁棒性提供了高效解决方案。

In this work, we interpret corruption robustness as a domain shift and propose to rectify batch normalization (BN) statistics for improving model robustness. This is motivated by perceiving the shift from the clean domain to the corruption domain as a style shift that is represented by the BN statistics. title: Online Safety Assurance for Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 深度强化学习的在线安全保障
comment: 8 pages, to appear in The 19th ACM Workshop on Hot Topics in Networks (HotNets 2020)
comments: 8 pages, to appear in The 19th ACM Workshop on Hot Topics in Networks (HotNets 2020)
abstract: Recently, deep learning has been successfully applied to a variety of networking problems. A fundamental challenge is that when the operational environment for a learning-augmented system differs from its training environment, such systems often make badly informed decisions, leading to bad performance. We argue that safely deploying learning-driven systems requires being able to determine, in real time, whether system behavior is coherent, for the purpose of defaulting to a reasonable heuristic when this is not so. We term this the online safety assurance problem (OSAP). We present three approaches to quantifying decision uncertainty that differ in terms of the signal used to infer uncertainty. We illustrate the usefulness of online safety assurance in the context of the proposed deep reinforcement learning (RL) approach to video streaming. While deep RL for video streaming bests other approaches when the operational and training environments match, it is dominated by simple heuristics when the two differ. Our preliminary findings suggest that transitioning to a default policy when decision uncertainty is detected is key to enjoying the performance benefits afforded by leveraging ML without compromising on safety.
summary: Recently, deep learning has been successfully applied to a variety of networking problems. A fundamental challenge is that when the operational environment for a learning-augmented system differs from its training environment, such systems often make badly informed decisions, leading to bad performance. We argue that safely deploying learning-driven systems requires being able to determine, in real time, whether system behavior is coherent, for the purpose of defaulting to a reasonable heuristic when this is not so. We term this the online safety assurance problem (OSAP). We present three approaches to quantifying decision uncertainty that differ in terms of the signal used to infer uncertainty. We illustrate the usefulness of online safety assurance in the context of the proposed deep reinforcement learning (RL) approach to video streaming. While deep RL for video streaming bests other approaches when the operational and training environments match, it is dominated by simple heuristics when the two differ. Our preliminary findings suggest that transitioning to a default policy when decision uncertainty is detected is key to enjoying the performance benefits afforded by leveraging ML without compromising on safety.
abstract_zh: 最近，深度学习已成功应用于各种网络问题。一个根本的挑战是，当学习增强系统的操作环境与其训练环境不同时，此类系统通常会做出错误的决策，从而导致性能不佳。我们认为，安全部署学习驱动系统需要能够实时确定系统行为是否一致，以便在不一致时默认采用合理的启发式。我们将其称为在线安全保证问题（OSAP）。我们提出了三种量化决策不确定性的方法，这些方法在用于推断不确定性的信号方面有所不同。我们在提出的视频流深度强化学习（RL）方法的背景下说明了在线安全保证的有用性。虽然当操作和训练环境匹配时，用于视频流的深度强化学习优于其他方法，但当两者不同时，它就以简单的启发式方法为主。我们的初步研究结果表明，在检测到决策不确定性时过渡到默认策略是在不影响安全性的情况下享受利用 ML 带来的性能优势的关键。

AI.tldr: 本文提出在线安全保证问题（OSAP），旨在通过实时判断系统行为一致性，确保深度强化学习系统在操作环境与训练环境不匹配时的安全性。
AI.motivation: 当深度强化学习系统的操作环境与训练环境不一致时，系统可能做出低效决策，导致性能下降，因此需要实时检测行为一致性以切换安全策略。
AI.method: 提出三种基于不同信号的决策不确定性量化方法，并在视频流媒体场景中验证其有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，当检测到决策不确定性时切换至默认策略，可在环境不匹配时保持系统安全，同时保留机器学习的性能优势。
AI.conclusion: 在线安全保证机制是实现深度强化学习系统安全部署的关键，能有效平衡性能与安全性。

authors_text: Joshua J. Engelsma,Debayan Deb,Kai Cao,Anjoo Bhatnagar,Prem S. Sudhish,Anil K. Jain
title: Infant-ID: Fingerprints for Global Good
title_zh: 婴儿 ID：指纹造福全球
abstract: In many of the least developed and developing countries, a multitude of infants continue to suffer and die from vaccine-preventable diseases and malnutrition. Lamentably, the lack of official identification documentation makes it exceedingly difficult to track which infants have been vaccinated and which infants have received nutritional supplements. Answering these questions could prevent this infant suffering and premature death around the world. To that end, we propose Infant-Prints, an end-to-end, low-cost, infant fingerprint recognition system. Infant-Prints is comprised of our (i) custom built, compact, low-cost (85 USD), high-resolution (1,900 ppi), ergonomic fingerprint reader, and (ii) high-resolution infant fingerprint matcher. To evaluate the efficacy of Infant-Prints, we collected a longitudinal infant fingerprint database captured in 4 different sessions over a 12-month time span (December 2018 to January 2020), from 315 infants at the Saran Ashram Hospital, a charitable hospital in Dayalbagh, Agra, India. Our experimental results demonstrate, for the first time, that Infant-Prints can deliver accurate and reliable recognition (over time) of infants enrolled between the ages of 2-3 months, in time for effective delivery of vaccinations, healthcare, and nutritional supplements (TAR=95.2% @ FAR = 1.0% for infants aged 8-16 weeks at enrollment and authenticated 3 months later).
summary: In many of the least developed and developing countries, a multitude of infants continue to suffer and die from vaccine-preventable diseases and malnutrition. Lamentably, the lack of official identification documentation makes it exceedingly difficult to track which infants have been vaccinated and which infants have received nutritional supplements. Answering these questions could prevent this infant suffering and premature death around the world. To that end, we propose Infant-Prints, an end-to-end, low-cost, infant fingerprint recognition system. Infant-Prints is comprised of our (i) custom built, compact, low-cost (85 USD), high-resolution (1,900 ppi), ergonomic fingerprint reader, and (ii) high-resolution infant fingerprint matcher. To evaluate the efficacy of Infant-Prints, we collected a longitudinal infant fingerprint database captured in 4 different sessions over a 12-month time span (December 2018 to January 2020), from 315 infants at the Saran Ashram Hospital, a charitable hospital in Dayalbagh, Agra, India. Our experimental results demonstrate, for the first time, that Infant-Prints can deliver accurate and reliable recognition (over time) of infants enrolled between the ages of 2-3 months, in time for effective delivery of vaccinations, healthcare, and nutritional supplements (TAR=95.2% @ FAR = 1.0% for infants aged 8-16 weeks at enrollment and authenticated 3 months later).
abstract_zh: 在许多最不发达国家和发展中国家，大量婴儿继续遭受疫苗可预防疾病和营养不良的折磨并死亡。遗憾的是，由于缺乏官方身份证明文件，因此很难追踪哪些婴儿已接种疫苗以及哪些婴儿已接受营养补充剂。回答这些问题可以防止世界各地的婴儿遭受痛苦和过早死亡。为此，我们提出了 Infant-Prints，这是一种端到端、低成本的婴儿指纹识别系统。 Infant-Prints 由我们的 (i) 定制、紧凑、低成本（85 美元）、高分辨率（1,900 ppi）、符合人体工程学的指纹读取器和 (ii) 高分辨率婴儿指纹匹配器组成。为了评估婴儿指纹的功效，我们收集了印度阿格拉 Dayalbagh 慈善医院 Saran Ashram 医院 12 个月（2018 年 12 月至 2020 年 1 月）期间 4 次不同会话中捕获的 315 名婴儿的纵向婴儿指纹数据库。我们的实验结果首次证明，Infant-Prints 可以对 2-3 个月大的婴儿进行准确可靠的识别（随着时间的推移），及时有效地提供疫苗接种、医疗保健和营养补充剂（对于注册时 8-16 周的婴儿，TAR=95.2% @ FAR = 1.0%，并在 3 个月后进行验证）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种低成本的婴儿指纹识别系统Infant-Prints，用于追踪疫苗接种和营养补充情况，以减少发展中国家婴儿的可预防疾病死亡。
AI.motivation: 在许多欠发达地区，由于缺乏官方身份证明文件，难以追踪婴儿疫苗接种和营养补充记录，导致大量婴儿因可预防疾病和营养不良死亡。
AI.method: 开发了定制的低成本（85美元）、高分辨率（1900 ppi）婴儿指纹采集器及匹配算法，并在印度医院收集了315名婴儿12个月内的纵向指纹数据进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，系统在婴儿8-16周龄注册后3个月的识别准确率达95.2%（假接受率1.0%），验证了其长期可靠性。
AI.conclusion: Infant-Prints可有效追踪婴儿健康信息，为发展中国家提供可行的疫苗和营养干预解决方案，减少可预防的婴儿死亡。

search_text: Infant-ID: Fingerprints for Global Good 婴儿 ID：指纹造福全球 In many of the least developed and developing countries, a multitude of infants continue to suffer and die from vaccine-preventable diseases and malnutrition. Lamentably, the lack of official identification documentation makes it exceedingly difficult to track which infants have been vaccinated and which infants have received nutritional supplements. Answering these questions could prevent this infant suffering and premature death around the world. To that end, we propose Infant-Prints, an end-to-end, low-cost, infant fingerprint recognition system. Infant-Prints is comprised of our (i) custom built, compact, low-cost (85 USD), high-resolution (1,900 ppi), ergonomic fingerprint reader, and (ii) high-resolution infant fingerprint matcher. To evaluate the efficacy of Infant-Prints, we collected a longitudinal infant fingerprint database captured in 4 different sessions over a 12-month time span (December 2018 to January 2020), from 315 infants at the Saran Ashram Hospital, a charitable hospital in Dayalbagh, Agra, India. Our experimental results demonstrate, for the first time, that Infant-Prints can deliver accurate and reliable recognition (over time) of infants enrolled between the ages of 2-3 months, in time for effective delivery of vaccinations, healthcare, and nutritional supplements (TAR=95.2% @ FAR = 1.0% for infants aged 8-16 weeks at enrollment and authenticated 3 months later). 在许多最不发达国家和发展中国家，大量婴儿继续遭受疫苗可预防疾病和营养不良的折磨并死亡。遗憾的是，由于缺乏官方身份证明文件，因此很难追踪哪些婴儿已接种疫苗以及哪些婴儿已接受营养补充剂。回答这些问题可以防止世界各地的婴儿遭受痛苦和过早死亡。为此，我们提出了 Infant-Prints，这是一种端到端、低成本的婴儿指纹识别系统。 Infant-Prints 由我们的 (i) 定制、紧凑、低成本（85 美元）、高分辨率（1,900 ppi）、符合人体工程学的指纹读取器和 (ii) 高分辨率婴儿指纹匹配器组成。为了评估婴儿指纹的功效，我们收集了印度阿格拉 Dayalbagh 慈善医院 Saran Ashram 医院 12 个月（2018 年 12 月至 2020 年 1 月）期间 4 次不同会话中捕获的 315 名婴儿的纵向婴儿指纹数据库。我们的实验结果首次证明，Infant-Prints 可以对 2-3 个月大的婴儿进行准确可靠的识别（随着时间的推移），及时有效地提供疫苗接种、医疗保健和营养补充剂（对于注册时 8-16 周的婴儿，TAR=95.2% @ FAR = 1.0%，并在 3 个月后进行验证）。 本文提出了一种低成本的婴儿指纹识别系统Infant-Prints，用于追踪疫苗接种和营养补充情况，以减少发展中国家婴儿的可预防疾病死亡。 Joshua J. Engelsma,Debayan Deb,Kai Cao,Anjoo Bhatnagar,Prem S. Sudhish,Anil K. Jain cs.CV

title: Domain Adversarial Neural Networks for Dysarthric Speech Recognition
title_zh: 用于构音障碍语音识别的领域对抗神经网络
comment: 5 pages, to be published in Interspeech 2020
comments: 5 pages, to be published in Interspeech 2020
abstract: Speech recognition systems have improved dramatically over the last few years, however, their performance is significantly degraded for the cases of accented or impaired speech. This work explores domain adversarial neural networks (DANN) for speaker-independent speech recognition on the UAS dataset of dysarthric speech. The classification task on 10 spoken digits is performed using an end-to-end CNN taking raw audio as input. The results are compared to a speaker-adaptive (SA) model as well as speaker-dependent (SD) and multi-task learning models (MTL). The experiments conducted in this paper show that DANN achieves an absolute recognition rate of 74.91% and outperforms the baseline by 12.18%. Additionally, the DANN model achieves comparable results to the SA model's recognition rate of 77.65%. We also observe that when labelled dysarthric speech data is available DANN and MTL perform similarly, but when they are not DANN performs better than MTL.
summary: Speech recognition systems have improved dramatically over the last few years, however, their performance is significantly degraded for the cases of accented or impaired speech. This work explores domain adversarial neural networks (DANN) for speaker-independent speech recognition on the UAS dataset of dysarthric speech. The classification task on 10 spoken digits is performed using an end-to-end CNN taking raw audio as input. The results are compared to a speaker-adaptive (SA) model as well as speaker-dependent (SD) and multi-task learning models (MTL). The experiments conducted in this paper show that DANN achieves an absolute recognition rate of 74.91% and outperforms the baseline by 12.18%. Additionally, the DANN model achieves comparable results to the SA model's recognition rate of 77.65%. We also observe that when labelled dysarthric speech data is available DANN and MTL perform similarly, but when they are not DANN performs better than MTL.
abstract_zh: 语音识别系统在过去几年中得到了显着改进，但是，在有口音或受损语音的情况下，其性能会显着下降。这项工作探索了域对抗神经网络 (DANN)，用于在 UAS 构音障碍语音数据集上进行与说话人无关的语音识别。使用端到端 CNN 以原始音频作为输入来执行 10 个口语数字的分类任务。将结果与说话者自适应 (SA) 模型以及说话者相关 (SD) 和多任务学习模型 (MTL) 进行比较。本文进行的实验表明，DANN 的绝对识别率达到 74.91%，优于基线 12.18%。此外，DANN 模型取得了与 SA 模型 77.65% 的识别率相当的结果。我们还观察到，当标记的构音障碍语音数据可用时，DANN 和 MTL 的表现相似，但当没有标记的构音障碍语音数据时，DANN 的表现优于 MTL。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用领域对抗神经网络（DANN）提升构音障碍语音的识别性能，通过端到端CNN模型处理UAS数据集中的10个数字语音分类任务。
AI.motivation: 传统语音识别系统在处理构音障碍等受损语音时表现不佳，需探索更鲁棒的模型以减少说话人差异影响。
AI.method: 采用端到端卷积神经网络（CNN）直接处理原始音频，结合领域对抗训练框架，与说话人自适应（SA）、说话人相关（SD）及多任务学习（MTL）模型进行对比实验。
AI.result: DANN模型在测试集上达到74.91%的识别率，较基线提升12.18%，接近SA模型的77.65%；在无标签数据时，DANN优于MTL。
AI.conclusion: DANN在构音障碍语音识别中表现出色，尤其在缺乏标签数据时具有优势，为跨领域语音识别提供了有效方法。

authors_text: Hung T. Nguyen,Pierre J. Liang,Leman Akoglu
title: Anomaly Detection in Large Labeled Multi-Graph Databases
title_zh: 大型标记多图数据库中的异常检测
abstract: Within a large database G containing graphs with labeled nodes and directed, multi-edges; how can we detect the anomalous graphs? Most existing work are designed for plain (unlabeled) and/or simple (unweighted) graphs. We introduce CODETECT, the first approach that addresses the anomaly detection task for graph databases with such complex nature. To this end, it identifies a small representative set S of structural patterns (i.e., node-labeled network motifs) that losslessly compress database G as concisely as possible. Graphs that do not compress well are flagged as anomalous. CODETECT exhibits two novel building blocks: (i) a motif-based lossless graph encoding scheme, and (ii) fast memory-efficient search algorithms for S. We show the effectiveness of CODETECT on transaction graph databases from three different corporations, where existing baselines adjusted for the task fall behind significantly, across different types of anomalies and performance metrics.
summary: Within a large database G containing graphs with labeled nodes and directed, multi-edges; how can we detect the anomalous graphs? Most existing work are designed for plain (unlabeled) and/or simple (unweighted) graphs. We introduce CODETECT, the first approach that addresses the anomaly detection task for graph databases with such complex nature. To this end, it identifies a small representative set S of structural patterns (i.e., node-labeled network motifs) that losslessly compress database G as concisely as possible. Graphs that do not compress well are flagged as anomalous. CODETECT exhibits two novel building blocks: (i) a motif-based lossless graph encoding scheme, and (ii) fast memory-efficient search algorithms for S. We show the effectiveness of CODETECT on transaction graph databases from three different corporations, where existing baselines adjusted for the task fall behind significantly, across different types of anomalies and performance metrics.
abstract_zh: 在一个大型数据库 G 中，包含带有标记节点和有向多边边的图；我们如何检测异常图？大多数现有工作都是针对简单（未标记）和/或简单（未加权）图表而设计的。我们引入了 CODETECT，这是第一种解决具有如此复杂性质的图数据库异常检测任务的方法。为此，它识别了结构模式（即节点标记的网络主题）的一个小的代表性集合 S，该集合 S 尽可能简洁地无损压缩数据库 G。压缩不好的图被标记为异常。 CODETECT 展示了两个新颖的构建模块：(i) 基于主题的无损图编码方案，以及 (ii) S 的快速内存高效搜索算法。我们展示了 CODETECT 在来自三个不同公司的事务图数据库上的有效性，其中针对任务调整的现有基线在不同类型的异常和性能指标上显着落后。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CODETECT方法，用于在包含带标签节点和多边的大型图数据库中检测异常图。
AI.motivation: 现有异常检测方法多针对无标签或无权重的简单图，难以处理具有复杂结构的带标签多边图数据库。
AI.method: CODETECT通过识别结构模式（网络主题）实现无损图编码，利用压缩效率判定异常图，并采用高效内存算法搜索模式集。
AI.result: 在三个企业交易图数据集上，CODETECT在多种异常类型和性能指标上显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: CODETECT是首个针对复杂带标签多边图数据库的异常检测方法，通过压缩效率判定异常，具有实际有效性。

conclusion: CODETECT是首个针对复杂带标签多边图数据库的异常检测方法，通过压缩效率判定异常，具有实际有效性。
search_text: Anomaly Detection in Large Labeled Multi-Graph Databases 大型标记多图数据库中的异常检测 Within a large database G containing graphs with labeled nodes and directed, multi-edges; how can we detect the anomalous graphs? Most existing work are designed for plain (unlabeled) and/or simple (unweighted) graphs. We introduce CODETECT, the first approach that addresses the anomaly detection task for graph databases with such complex nature. To this end, it identifies a small representative set S of structural patterns (i.e., node-labeled network motifs) that losslessly compress database G as concisely as possible. Graphs that do not compress well are flagged as anomalous. CODETECT exhibits two novel building blocks: (i) a motif-based lossless graph encoding scheme, and (ii) fast memory-efficient search algorithms for S. We show the effectiveness of CODETECT on transaction graph databases from three different corporations, where existing baselines adjusted for the task fall behind significantly, across different types of anomalies and performance metrics. 在一个大型数据库 G 中，包含带有标记节点和有向多边边的图；我们如何检测异常图？大多数现有工作都是针对简单（未标记）和/或简单（未加权）图表而设计的。我们引入了 CODETECT，这是第一种解决具有如此复杂性质的图数据库异常检测任务的方法。为此，它识别了结构模式（即节点标记的网络主题）的一个小的代表性集合 S，该集合 S 尽可能简洁地无损压缩数据库 G。压缩不好的图被标记为异常。 CODETECT 展示了两个新颖的构建模块：(i) 基于主题的无损图编码方案，以及 (ii) S 的快速内存高效搜索算法。我们展示了 CODETECT 在来自三个不同公司的事务图数据库上的有效性，其中针对任务调整的现有基线在不同类型的异常和性能指标上显着落后。 本文提出CODETECT方法，用于在包含带标签节点和多边的大型图数据库中检测异常图。 Hung T. Nguyen,Pierre J. Liang,Leman Akoglu cs.DB,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: John Mern,Anil Yildiz,Larry Bush,Tapan Mukerji,Mykel J. Kochenderfer
title: Improved POMDP Tree Search Planning with Prioritized Action Branching
title_zh: 通过优先操作分支改进 POMDP 树搜索规划
abstract: Online solvers for partially observable Markov decision processes have difficulty scaling to problems with large action spaces. This paper proposes a method called PA-POMCPOW to sample a subset of the action space that provides varying mixtures of exploitation and exploration for inclusion in a search tree. The proposed method first evaluates the action space according to a score function that is a linear combination of expected reward and expected information gain. The actions with the highest score are then added to the search tree during tree expansion. Experiments show that PA-POMCPOW is able to outperform existing state-of-the-art solvers on problems with large discrete action spaces.
summary: Online solvers for partially observable Markov decision processes have difficulty scaling to problems with large action spaces. This paper proposes a method called PA-POMCPOW to sample a subset of the action space that provides varying mixtures of exploitation and exploration for inclusion in a search tree. The proposed method first evaluates the action space according to a score function that is a linear combination of expected reward and expected information gain. The actions with the highest score are then added to the search tree during tree expansion. Experiments show that PA-POMCPOW is able to outperform existing state-of-the-art solvers on problems with large discrete action spaces.
abstract_zh: 部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程的在线求解器很难扩展到具有大动作空间的问题。本文提出了一种称为 PA-POMCPOW 的方法来对动作空间的子集进行采样，该子集提供了不同的开发和探索混合，以便包含在搜索树中。所提出的方法首先根据分数函数评估动作空间，该分数函数是预期奖励和预期信息增益的线性组合。然后，在树扩展期间，得分最高的动作将被添加到搜索树中。实验表明，PA-POMCPOW 在处理具有大型离散动作空间的问题时能够超越现有最先进的求解器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的POMDP树搜索规划方法PA-POMCPOW，通过优先化动作分支解决大规模动作空间的扩展问题。
AI.motivation: 现有POMDP在线求解器在处理大规模离散动作空间时面临扩展性挑战，需要更高效的动作选择策略平衡利用与探索。
AI.method: 设计PA-POMCPOW算法，通过线性组合预期奖励与信息增益构建动作评分函数，在树扩展时优先选择高评分动作构建搜索树。
AI.result: 实验验证PA-POMCPOW在大规模离散动作空间问题上优于现有先进求解器，显著提升算法性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了大动作空间POMDP规划难题，为复杂决策场景提供了新的求解思路。

authors_text: John Mern,Anil Yildiz,Zachary Sunberg,Tapan Mukerji,Mykel J. Kochenderfer
title: Bayesian Optimized Monte Carlo Planning
title_zh: 贝叶斯优化蒙特卡罗规划
abstract: Online solvers for partially observable Markov decision processes have difficulty scaling to problems with large action spaces. Monte Carlo tree search with progressive widening attempts to improve scaling by sampling from the action space to construct a policy search tree. The performance of progressive widening search is dependent upon the action sampling policy, often requiring problem-specific samplers. In this work, we present a general method for efficient action sampling based on Bayesian optimization. The proposed method uses a Gaussian process to model a belief over the action-value function and selects the action that will maximize the expected improvement in the optimal action value. We implement the proposed approach in a new online tree search algorithm called Bayesian Optimized Monte Carlo Planning (BOMCP). Several experiments show that BOMCP is better able to scale to large action space POMDPs than existing state-of-the-art tree search solvers.
summary: Online solvers for partially observable Markov decision processes have difficulty scaling to problems with large action spaces. Monte Carlo tree search with progressive widening attempts to improve scaling by sampling from the action space to construct a policy search tree. The performance of progressive widening search is dependent upon the action sampling policy, often requiring problem-specific samplers. In this work, we present a general method for efficient action sampling based on Bayesian optimization. The proposed method uses a Gaussian process to model a belief over the action-value function and selects the action that will maximize the expected improvement in the optimal action value. We implement the proposed approach in a new online tree search algorithm called Bayesian Optimized Monte Carlo Planning (BOMCP). Several experiments show that BOMCP is better able to scale to large action space POMDPs than existing state-of-the-art tree search solvers.
abstract_zh: 部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程的在线求解器很难扩展到具有大动作空间的问题。具有渐进加宽的蒙特卡罗树搜索尝试通过从动作空间采样来构建策略搜索树来改进缩放。渐进扩大搜索的性能取决于动作采样策略，通常需要针对特定​​问题的采样器。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于贝叶斯优化的有效动作采样的通用方法。所提出的方法使用高斯过程对动作价值函数的信念进行建模，并选择将最大化最佳动作值的预期改进的动作。我们在称为贝叶斯优化蒙特卡罗规划（BOMCP）的新在线树搜索算法中实现了所提出的方法。多项实验表明，与现有最先进的树搜索求解器相比，BOMCP 能够更好地扩展到大型动作空间 POMDP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于贝叶斯优化的蒙特卡洛树搜索算法（BOMCP），用于解决部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）中大规模动作空间的扩展性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有蒙特卡洛树搜索方法在处理大规模动作空间时依赖特定问题的动作采样策略，缺乏通用性且扩展性不足。
AI.method: 采用高斯过程建模动作价值函数的信念，通过最大化预期改进选择最优动作，构建新的在线树搜索算法BOMCP。
AI.result: 实验表明，BOMCP在大型动作空间的POMDP问题上优于现有最先进的树搜索求解器。
AI.conclusion: BOMCP通过贝叶斯优化提供了一种通用且高效的动作采样方法，有效提升了大规模动作空间POMDP的求解能力。

authors_text: Sven Gowal,Chongli Qin,Jonathan Uesato,Timothy Mann,Pushmeet Kohli
title: Uncovering the Limits of Adversarial Training against Norm-Bounded Adversarial Examples
title_zh: 揭示针对规范限制的对抗样本的对抗训练的局限性
comment: Fixed minor formatting issues and added link to models
comments: Fixed minor formatting issues and added link to models
abstract: Adversarial training and its variants have become de facto standards for learning robust deep neural networks. In this paper, we explore the landscape around adversarial training in a bid to uncover its limits. We systematically study the effect of different training losses, model sizes, activation functions, the addition of unlabeled data (through pseudo-labeling) and other factors on adversarial robustness. We discover that it is possible to train robust models that go well beyond state-of-the-art results by combining larger models, Swish/SiLU activations and model weight averaging. We demonstrate large improvements on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 against $\ell_\infty$ and $\ell_2$ norm-bounded perturbations of size $8/255$ and $128/255$, respectively. In the setting with additional unlabeled data, we obtain an accuracy under attack of 65.88% against $\ell_\infty$ perturbations of size $8/255$ on CIFAR-10 (+6.35% with respect to prior art). Without additional data, we obtain an accuracy under attack of 57.20% (+3.46%). To test the generality of our findings and without any additional modifications, we obtain an accuracy under attack of 80.53% (+7.62%) against $\ell_2$ perturbations of size $128/255$ on CIFAR-10, and of 36.88% (+8.46%) against $\ell_\infty$ perturbations of size $8/255$ on CIFAR-100. All models are available at https://github.com/deepmind/deepmind-research/tree/master/adversarial_robustness.
summary: Adversarial training and its variants have become de facto standards for learning robust deep neural networks. In this paper, we explore the landscape around adversarial training in a bid to uncover its limits. We systematically study the effect of different training losses, model sizes, activation functions, the addition of unlabeled data (through pseudo-labeling) and other factors on adversarial robustness. We discover that it is possible to train robust models that go well beyond state-of-the-art results by combining larger models, Swish/SiLU activations and model weight averaging. We demonstrate large improvements on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 against $\ell_\infty$ and $\ell_2$ norm-bounded perturbations of size $8/255$ and $128/255$, respectively. In the setting with additional unlabeled data, we obtain an accuracy under attack of 65.88% against $\ell_\infty$ perturbations of size $8/255$ on CIFAR-10 (+6.35% with respect to prior art). Without additional data, we obtain an accuracy under attack of 57.20% (+3.46%). To test the generality of our findings and without any additional modifications, we obtain an accuracy under attack of 80.53% (+7.62%) against $\ell_2$ perturbations of size $128/255$ on CIFAR-10, and of 36.88% (+8.46%) against $\ell_\infty$ perturbations of size $8/255$ on CIFAR-100. All models are available at https://github.com/deepmind/deepmind-research/tree/master/adversarial_robustness.
abstract_zh: 对抗性训练及其变体已成为学习鲁棒深度神经网络的事实上的标准。在本文中，我们探讨了对抗性训练的前景，以揭示其局限性。我们系统地研究了不同训练损失、模型大小、激活函数、添加未标记数据（通过伪标记）和其他因素对对抗鲁棒性的影响。我们发现，通过结合更大的模型、Swish/SiLU 激活和模型权重平均，可以训练出远远超出最先进结果的稳健模型。我们展示了 CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 分别针对 $\ell_\infty$ 和 $\ell_2$ 范数有界扰动（大小为 $8/255$ 和 $128/255$）的巨大改进。在具有额外未标记数据的设置中，我们在 CIFAR-10 上针对 $\ell_\infty$ 大小 $8/255$ 的扰动获得了 65.88% 的攻击准确率（相对于现有技术 +6.35%）。在没有额外数据的情况下，我们在攻击下获得的准确率为 57.20% (+3.46%)。为了测试我们研究结果的普遍性，在不进行任何额外修改的情况下，我们在 CIFAR-10 上针对 $\ell_2$ 大小为 $128/255$ 的扰动获得了 80.53% (+7.62%) 的准确度，在 CIFAR-100 上针对 $\ell_\infty$ 大小为 $8/255$ 的扰动获得了 36.88% (+8.46%) 的准确度。所有模型均可在 https://github.com/deepmind/deepmind-research/tree/master/adversarial_robustness 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨对抗训练在应对范数有界对抗样本时的局限性，并通过多种因素提升模型的对抗鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 尽管对抗训练是提升模型鲁棒性的主流方法，但其局限性尚未被系统研究，需探索不同因素对鲁棒性的影响。
AI.method: 系统研究不同训练损失、模型规模、激活函数（如Swish/SiLU）、伪标签未标记数据等，并结合大模型与权重平均策略。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10上，使用未标记数据时对$\\ell_\\infty$攻击的准确率达65.88%（+6.35%），对$\\ell_2$攻击达80.53%（+7.62%）；CIFAR-100对$\\ell_\\infty$攻击达36.88%（+8.46%）。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化模型结构与训练策略可显著提升对抗鲁棒性，且结果具有普遍性，无需额外调整即可推广至其他数据集。

search_text: Uncovering the Limits of Adversarial Training against Norm-Bounded Adversarial Examples 揭示针对规范限制的对抗样本的对抗训练的局限性 Adversarial training and its variants have become de facto standards for learning robust deep neural networks. In this paper, we explore the landscape around adversarial training in a bid to uncover its limits. We systematically study the effect of different training losses, model sizes, activation functions, the addition of unlabeled data (through pseudo-labeling) and other factors on adversarial robustness. We discover that it is possible to train robust models that go well beyond state-of-the-art results by combining larger models, Swish/SiLU activations and model weight averaging. We demonstrate large improvements on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 against $\ell_\infty$ and $\ell_2$ norm-bounded perturbations of size $8/255$ and $128/255$, respectively. In the setting with additional unlabeled data, we obtain an accuracy under attack of 65.88% against $\ell_\infty$ perturbations of size $8/255$ on CIFAR-10 (+6.35% with respect to prior art). Without additional data, we obtain an accuracy under attack of 57.20% (+3.46%). To test the generality of our findings and without any additional modifications, we obtain an accuracy under attack of 80.53% (+7.62%) against $\ell_2$ perturbations of size $128/255$ on CIFAR-10, and of 36.88% (+8.46%) against $\ell_\infty$ perturbations of size $8/255$ on CIFAR-100. All models are available at https://github.com/deepmind/deepmind-research/tree/master/adversarial_robustness. 对抗性训练及其变体已成为学习鲁棒深度神经网络的事实上的标准。在本文中，我们探讨了对抗性训练的前景，以揭示其局限性。我们系统地研究了不同训练损失、模型大小、激活函数、添加未标记数据（通过伪标记）和其他因素对对抗鲁棒性的影响。我们发现，通过结合更大的模型、Swish/SiLU 激活和模型权重平均，可以训练出远远超出最先进结果的稳健模型。我们展示了 CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 分别针对 $\ell_\infty$ 和 $\ell_2$ 范数有界扰动（大小为 $8/255$ 和 $128/255$）的巨大改进。在具有额外未标记数据的设置中，我们在 CIFAR-10 上针对 $\ell_\infty$ 大小 $8/255$ 的扰动获得了 65.88% 的攻击准确率（相对于现有技术 +6.35%）。在没有额外数据的情况下，我们在攻击下获得的准确率为 57.20% (+3.46%)。为了测试我们研究结果的普遍性，在不进行任何额外修改的情况下，我们在 CIFAR-10 上针对 $\ell_2$ 大小为 $128/255$ 的扰动获得了 80.53% (+7.62%) 的准确度，在 CIFAR-100 上针对 $\ell_\infty$ 大小为 $8/255$ 的扰动获得了 36.88% (+8.46%) 的准确度。所有模型均可在 https://github.com/deepmind/deepmind-research/tree/master/adversarial_robustness 上找到。 本文探讨对抗训练在应对范数有界对抗样本时的局限性，并通过多种因素提升模型的对抗鲁棒性。 Sven Gowal,Chongli Qin,Jonathan Uesato,Timothy Mann,Pushmeet Kohli stat.ML,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Shape, Illumination, and Reflectance from Shading
title_zh: 形状、照明和阴影的反射率
abstract: A fundamental problem in computer vision is that of inferring the intrinsic, 3D structure of the world from flat, 2D images of that world. Traditional methods for recovering scene properties such as shape, reflectance, or illumination rely on multiple observations of the same scene to overconstrain the problem. Recovering these same properties from a single image seems almost impossible in comparison -- there are an infinite number of shapes, paint, and lights that exactly reproduce a single image. However, certain explanations are more likely than others: surfaces tend to be smooth, paint tends to be uniform, and illumination tends to be natural. We therefore pose this problem as one of statistical inference, and define an optimization problem that searches for the *most likely* explanation of a single image. Our technique can be viewed as a superset of several classic computer vision problems (shape-from-shading, intrinsic images, color constancy, illumination estimation, etc) and outperforms all previous solutions to those constituent problems.
summary: A fundamental problem in computer vision is that of inferring the intrinsic, 3D structure of the world from flat, 2D images of that world. Traditional methods for recovering scene properties such as shape, reflectance, or illumination rely on multiple observations of the same scene to overconstrain the problem. Recovering these same properties from a single image seems almost impossible in comparison -- there are an infinite number of shapes, paint, and lights that exactly reproduce a single image. However, certain explanations are more likely than others: surfaces tend to be smooth, paint tends to be uniform, and illumination tends to be natural. We therefore pose this problem as one of statistical inference, and define an optimization problem that searches for the *most likely* explanation of a single image. Our technique can be viewed as a superset of several classic computer vision problems (shape-from-shading, intrinsic images, color constancy, illumination estimation, etc) and outperforms all previous solutions to those constituent problems.
abstract_zh: 计算机视觉的一个基本问题是从世界的平面 2D 图像推断世界的内在 3D 结构。恢复形状、反射率或照明等场景属性的传统方法依赖于对同一场景的多次观察来过度约束问题。相比之下，从单个图像中恢复这些相同的属性似乎几乎是不可能的——有无数的形状、油漆和灯光可以精确地再现单个图像。然而，某些解释比其他解释更有可能：表面趋于光滑，油漆趋于均匀，照明趋于自然。因此，我们将此问题作为统计推断之一，并定义一个优化问题来搜索单个图像的“最可能”解释。我们的技术可以被视为几个经典计算机视觉问题（阴影形状、本征图像、颜色恒定性、照明估计等）的超集，并且优于这些组成问题的所有先前解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从单张二维图像中推断出物体的三维形状、反射率和光照信息。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖多视角观测来恢复场景属性，但单图像恢复因无限可能解而被认为几乎不可能。然而，基于表面平滑性、材质均匀性和自然光照等先验知识，某些解释更合理。
AI.method: 将问题建模为统计推断优化问题，通过搜索最可能的解释来统一解决形状从阴影、内在图像、颜色恒定性等经典问题。
AI.result: 该方法在形状从阴影、光照估计等子问题上均优于之前的所有解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合概率推理和先验假设，该方法有效统一并改进了现有单图像三维重建技术。

authors_text: Denis Kleyko,E. Paxon Frady,Friedrich T. Sommer
title: Cellular Automata Can Reduce Memory Requirements of Collective-State Computing
title_zh: 元胞自动机可以减少集体状态计算的内存需求
abstract: Various non-classical approaches of distributed information processing, such as neural networks, computation with Ising models, reservoir computing, vector symbolic architectures, and others, employ the principle of collective-state computing. In this type of computing, the variables relevant in a computation are superimposed into a single high-dimensional state vector, the collective-state. The variable encoding uses a fixed set of random patterns, which has to be stored and kept available during the computation. Here we show that an elementary cellular automaton with rule 90 (CA90) enables space-time tradeoff for collective-state computing models that use random dense binary representations, i.e., memory requirements can be traded off with computation running CA90. We investigate the randomization behavior of CA90, in particular, the relation between the length of the randomization period and the size of the grid, and how CA90 preserves similarity in the presence of the initialization noise. Based on these analyses we discuss how to optimize a collective-state computing model, in which CA90 expands representations on the fly from short seed patterns - rather than storing the full set of random patterns. The CA90 expansion is applied and tested in concrete scenarios using reservoir computing and vector symbolic architectures. Our experimental results show that collective-state computing with CA90 expansion performs similarly compared to traditional collective-state models, in which random patterns are generated initially by a pseudo-random number generator and then stored in a large memory.
summary: Various non-classical approaches of distributed information processing, such as neural networks, computation with Ising models, reservoir computing, vector symbolic architectures, and others, employ the principle of collective-state computing. In this type of computing, the variables relevant in a computation are superimposed into a single high-dimensional state vector, the collective-state. The variable encoding uses a fixed set of random patterns, which has to be stored and kept available during the computation. Here we show that an elementary cellular automaton with rule 90 (CA90) enables space-time tradeoff for collective-state computing models that use random dense binary representations, i.e., memory requirements can be traded off with computation running CA90. We investigate the randomization behavior of CA90, in particular, the relation between the length of the randomization period and the size of the grid, and how CA90 preserves similarity in the presence of the initialization noise. Based on these analyses we discuss how to optimize a collective-state computing model, in which CA90 expands representations on the fly from short seed patterns - rather than storing the full set of random patterns. The CA90 expansion is applied and tested in concrete scenarios using reservoir computing and vector symbolic architectures. Our experimental results show that collective-state computing with CA90 expansion performs similarly compared to traditional collective-state models, in which random patterns are generated initially by a pseudo-random number generator and then stored in a large memory.
abstract_zh: 分布式信息处理的各种非经典方法，例如神经网络、伊辛模型计算、水库计算、矢量符号体系结构等，都采用集体状态计算的原理。在这种类型的计算中，计算中相关的变量被叠加到单个高维状态向量中，即集体状态。变量编码使用一组固定的随机模式，必须存储这些模式并在计算期间保持可用。在这里，我们展示了具有规则 90 (CA90) 的基本元胞自动机能够为使用随机密集二进制表示的集体状态计算模型实现时空权衡，即可以通过运行 CA90 的计算来权衡内存需求。我们研究了 CA90 的随机化行为，特别是随机化周期的长度和网格大小之间的关系，以及 CA90 如何在存在初始化噪声的情况下保持相似性。基于这些分析，我们讨论如何优化集体状态计算模型，其中 CA90 从短种子模式动态扩展表示，而不是存储完整的随机模式集。 CA90扩展使用水库计算和矢量符号架构在具体场景中进行应用和测试。我们的实验结果表明，与传统的集体状态模型相比，采用 CA90 扩展的集体状态计算的性能相似，其中随机模式最初由伪随机数生成器生成，然后存储在大内存中。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了使用细胞自动机（CA90）来降低集体状态计算模型中的内存需求。
AI.motivation: 集体状态计算模型需要存储大量随机模式，这导致内存需求较高。本文旨在寻找一种方法来减少这种内存负担。
AI.method: 研究者使用规则90的细胞自动机（CA90）来实现空间时间权衡，通过分析CA90的随机化行为和其在初始化噪声下的相似性保持能力，优化集体状态计算模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用CA90扩展的集体状态计算模型与传统模型相比，性能相当。
AI.conclusion: CA90可以有效地减少集体状态计算模型的内存需求，同时保持计算性能。

search_text: Cellular Automata Can Reduce Memory Requirements of Collective-State Computing 元胞自动机可以减少集体状态计算的内存需求 Various non-classical approaches of distributed information processing, such as neural networks, computation with Ising models, reservoir computing, vector symbolic architectures, and others, employ the principle of collective-state computing. In this type of computing, the variables relevant in a computation are superimposed into a single high-dimensional state vector, the collective-state. The variable encoding uses a fixed set of random patterns, which has to be stored and kept available during the computation. Here we show that an elementary cellular automaton with rule 90 (CA90) enables space-time tradeoff for collective-state computing models that use random dense binary representations, i.e., memory requirements can be traded off with computation running CA90. We investigate the randomization behavior of CA90, in particular, the relation between the length of the randomization period and the size of the grid, and how CA90 preserves similarity in the presence of the initialization noise. Based on these analyses we discuss how to optimize a collective-state computing model, in which CA90 expands representations on the fly from short seed patterns - rather than storing the full set of random patterns. The CA90 expansion is applied and tested in concrete scenarios using reservoir computing and vector symbolic architectures. Our experimental results show that collective-state computing with CA90 expansion performs similarly compared to traditional collective-state models, in which random patterns are generated initially by a pseudo-random number generator and then stored in a large memory. 分布式信息处理的各种非经典方法，例如神经网络、伊辛模型计算、水库计算、矢量符号体系结构等，都采用集体状态计算的原理。在这种类型的计算中，计算中相关的变量被叠加到单个高维状态向量中，即集体状态。变量编码使用一组固定的随机模式，必须存储这些模式并在计算期间保持可用。在这里，我们展示了具有规则 90 (CA90) 的基本元胞自动机能够为使用随机密集二进制表示的集体状态计算模型实现时空权衡，即可以通过运行 CA90 的计算来权衡内存需求。我们研究了 CA90 的随机化行为，特别是随机化周期的长度和网格大小之间的关系，以及 CA90 如何在存在初始化噪声的情况下保持相似性。基于这些分析，我们讨论如何优化集体状态计算模型，其中 CA90 从短种子模式动态扩展表示，而不是存储完整的随机模式集。 CA90扩展使用水库计算和矢量符号架构在具体场景中进行应用和测试。我们的实验结果表明，与传统的集体状态模型相比，采用 CA90 扩展的集体状态计算的性能相似，其中随机模式最初由伪随机数生成器生成，然后存储在大内存中。 本文探讨了使用细胞自动机（CA90）来降低集体状态计算模型中的内存需求。 Denis Kleyko,E. Paxon Frady,Friedrich T. Sommer cs.NE,cs.LG

authors_text: Chao-Chun Hsu,Shantanu Karnwal,Sendhil Mullainathan,Ziad Obermeyer,Chenhao Tan
title: Characterizing the Value of Information in Medical Notes
title_zh: 描述医疗笔记中信息的价值
comment: 15 pages, 12 figures, Findings of EMNLP 2020, code is available at https://github.com/BoulderDS/value-of-medical-notes
comments: 15 pages, 12 figures, Findings of EMNLP 2020, code is available at https://github.com/BoulderDS/value-of-medical-notes
abstract: Machine learning models depend on the quality of input data. As electronic health records are widely adopted, the amount of data in health care is growing, along with complaints about the quality of medical notes. We use two prediction tasks, readmission prediction and in-hospital mortality prediction, to characterize the value of information in medical notes. We show that as a whole, medical notes only provide additional predictive power over structured information in readmission prediction. We further propose a probing framework to select parts of notes that enable more accurate predictions than using all notes, despite that the selected information leads to a distribution shift from the training data ("all notes"). Finally, we demonstrate that models trained on the selected valuable information achieve even better predictive performance, with only 6.8% of all the tokens for readmission prediction.
summary: Machine learning models depend on the quality of input data. As electronic health records are widely adopted, the amount of data in health care is growing, along with complaints about the quality of medical notes. We use two prediction tasks, readmission prediction and in-hospital mortality prediction, to characterize the value of information in medical notes. We show that as a whole, medical notes only provide additional predictive power over structured information in readmission prediction. We further propose a probing framework to select parts of notes that enable more accurate predictions than using all notes, despite that the selected information leads to a distribution shift from the training data ("all notes"). Finally, we demonstrate that models trained on the selected valuable information achieve even better predictive performance, with only 6.8% of all the tokens for readmission prediction.
abstract_zh: 机器学习模型取决于输入数据的质量。随着电子健康记录的广泛采用，医疗保健中的数据量不断增加，随之而来的是对医疗记录质量的抱怨。我们使用再入院预测和院内死亡率预测这两个预测任务来表征医疗记录中信息的价值。我们表明，总体而言，医疗记录仅在再入院预测中比结构化信息提供额外的预测能力。我们进一步提出了一个探测框架来选择笔记的部分，尽管所选择的信息会导致训练数据（“所有笔记”）的分布变化，但与使用所有笔记相比，该框架可以实现更准确的预测。最后，我们证明，根据选定的有价值信息进行训练的模型可以实现更好的预测性能，仅占所有令牌的 6.8% 用于再入院预测。

AI.tldr: 本文研究医疗笔记中信息的价值，通过构建预测模型评估其对再入院和住院死亡率预测的贡献，并提出筛选关键信息的方法以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 电子健康记录数据量激增但医疗笔记质量参差，需明确非结构化数据对预测模型的实际价值并优化其使用方式。
AI.method: 基于再入院预测和死亡率预测两个任务，设计探针框架筛选医疗笔记中的关键信息片段，验证其在分布偏移下的预测效果。
AI.result: 筛选后的6.8%关键信息在再入院预测中实现优于全量数据的性能，且模型复杂度显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 医疗笔记中存在少量高价值信息片段，通过结构化筛选可提升预测精度并减少数据依赖，为临床决策提供更高效的模型支持。

title: High-Capacity Expert Binary Networks
title_zh: 高容量专家二进制网络
abstract: Network binarization is a promising hardware-aware direction for creating efficient deep models. Despite its memory and computational advantages, reducing the accuracy gap between binary models and their real-valued counterparts remains an unsolved challenging research problem. To this end, we make the following 3 contributions: (a) To increase model capacity, we propose Expert Binary Convolution, which, for the first time, tailors conditional computing to binary networks by learning to select one data-specific expert binary filter at a time conditioned on input features. (b) To increase representation capacity, we propose to address the inherent information bottleneck in binary networks by introducing an efficient width expansion mechanism which keeps the binary operations within the same budget. (c) To improve network design, we propose a principled binary network growth mechanism that unveils a set of network topologies of favorable properties. Overall, our method improves upon prior work, with no increase in computational cost, by $\sim6 \%$, reaching a groundbreaking $\sim 71\%$ on ImageNet classification. Code will be made available $\href{https://www.adrianbulat.com/binary-networks}{here}$.
summary: Network binarization is a promising hardware-aware direction for creating efficient deep models. Despite its memory and computational advantages, reducing the accuracy gap between binary models and their real-valued counterparts remains an unsolved challenging research problem. To this end, we make the following 3 contributions: (a) To increase model capacity, we propose Expert Binary Convolution, which, for the first time, tailors conditional computing to binary networks by learning to select one data-specific expert binary filter at a time conditioned on input features. (b) To increase representation capacity, we propose to address the inherent information bottleneck in binary networks by introducing an efficient width expansion mechanism which keeps the binary operations within the same budget. (c) To improve network design, we propose a principled binary network growth mechanism that unveils a set of network topologies of favorable properties. Overall, our method improves upon prior work, with no increase in computational cost, by $\sim6 \%$, reaching a groundbreaking $\sim 71\%$ on ImageNet classification. Code will be made available $\href{https://www.adrianbulat.com/binary-networks}{here}$.
abstract_zh: 网络二值化是创建高效深度模型的一个有前景的硬件感知方向。尽管它具有内存和计算优势，但缩小二进制模型与其真实值模型之间的准确度差距仍然是一个尚未解决的具有挑战性的研究问题。为此，我们做出了以下 3 个贡献：（a）为了提高模型容量，我们提出了专家二元卷积，它首次通过学习根据输入特征一次选择一个特定于数据的专家二元过滤器来定制二元网络的条件计算。 (b) 为了提高表示能力，我们建议通过引入有效的宽度扩展机制来解决二进制网络中固有的信息瓶颈，该机制使二进制运算保持在相同的预算内。 (c) 为了改进网络设计，我们提出了一种有原则的二元网络增长机制，揭示了一组具有良好特性的网络拓扑。总的来说，我们的方法在没有增加计算成本的情况下，在之前的工作的基础上改进了 $\sim6 \%$，在 ImageNet 分类上达到了突破性的 $\sim 71\%$。代码将提供$\href{https://www.adrianbulat.com/binary-networks}{here}$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高容量专家二值网络方法，通过改进二值化神经网络的结构设计，在保持计算成本不变的情况下显著提升模型精度。
AI.motivation: 二值化网络虽具有内存和计算优势，但与全精度模型存在精度差距，如何在不增加计算成本的前提下提升二值网络性能是核心挑战。
AI.method: 提出三项创新：(a) 专家二值卷积（按输入特征动态选择专家滤波器）；(b) 宽度扩展机制（在相同计算预算下提升表示能力）；(c) 二值网络增长机制（发现具有优良特性的网络拓扑结构）。
AI.result: 在ImageNet分类任务上达到71%的突破性精度，相比先前工作提升约6%，且计算成本无增加。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结构创新有效提升了二值网络的容量和精度，为高效深度模型设计提供了新思路，并开源了实现代码。

title: On the Evaluation of Generative Adversarial Networks By Discriminative Models
title_zh: 基于判别模型的生成对抗网络评估
comment: Accepted to be published in ICPR 2020
comments: Accepted to be published in ICPR 2020
abstract: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) can accurately model complex multi-dimensional data and generate realistic samples. However, due to their implicit estimation of data distributions, their evaluation is a challenging task. The majority of research efforts associated with tackling this issue were validated by qualitative visual evaluation. Such approaches do not generalize well beyond the image domain. Since many of those evaluation metrics are proposed and bound to the vision domain, they are difficult to apply to other domains. Quantitative measures are necessary to better guide the training and comparison of different GANs models. In this work, we leverage Siamese neural networks to propose a domain-agnostic evaluation metric: (1) with a qualitative evaluation that is consistent with human evaluation, (2) that is robust relative to common GAN issues such as mode dropping and invention, and (3) does not require any pretrained classifier. The empirical results in this paper demonstrate the superiority of this method compared to the popular Inception Score and are competitive with the FID score.
summary: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) can accurately model complex multi-dimensional data and generate realistic samples. However, due to their implicit estimation of data distributions, their evaluation is a challenging task. The majority of research efforts associated with tackling this issue were validated by qualitative visual evaluation. Such approaches do not generalize well beyond the image domain. Since many of those evaluation metrics are proposed and bound to the vision domain, they are difficult to apply to other domains. Quantitative measures are necessary to better guide the training and comparison of different GANs models. In this work, we leverage Siamese neural networks to propose a domain-agnostic evaluation metric: (1) with a qualitative evaluation that is consistent with human evaluation, (2) that is robust relative to common GAN issues such as mode dropping and invention, and (3) does not require any pretrained classifier. The empirical results in this paper demonstrate the superiority of this method compared to the popular Inception Score and are competitive with the FID score.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）可以准确地对复杂的多维数据进行建模并生成真实的样本。然而，由于它们对数据分布的隐式估计，它们的评估是一项具有挑战性的任务。与解决这个问题相关的大多数研究工作都是通过定性视觉评估来验证的。这些方法不能很好地推广到图像领域之外。由于许多评估指标是提出并绑定到视觉领域的，因此它们很难应用于其他领域。为了更好地指导不同 GAN 模型的训练和比较，需要定量测量。在这项工作中，我们利用 Siamese 神经网络提出了一种与领域无关的评估指标：(1) 具有与人类评估一致的定性评估，(2) 相对于模式丢弃和发明等常见 GAN 问题具有鲁棒性，(3) 不需要任何预训练的分类器。本文的实证结果证明了该方法相对于流行的 Inception Score 的优越性，并且与 FID Score 具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于Siamese神经网络的领域无关评估指标，用于更准确地评估生成对抗网络（GANs）的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN评估方法依赖视觉领域定性分析，难以跨领域应用且缺乏定量指标，需开发更通用的评估框架。
AI.method: 设计基于Siamese网络的评估模型，通过三方面改进：1）与人类评估一致的定性指标 2）对模式丢失等GAN问题鲁棒 3）无需预训练分类器。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在性能上优于Inception Score，且与FID指标具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的评估方法为跨领域GAN模型比较提供了更可靠、通用的定量分析工具。

search_text: On the Evaluation of Generative Adversarial Networks By Discriminative Models 基于判别模型的生成对抗网络评估 Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) can accurately model complex multi-dimensional data and generate realistic samples. However, due to their implicit estimation of data distributions, their evaluation is a challenging task. The majority of research efforts associated with tackling this issue were validated by qualitative visual evaluation. Such approaches do not generalize well beyond the image domain. Since many of those evaluation metrics are proposed and bound to the vision domain, they are difficult to apply to other domains. Quantitative measures are necessary to better guide the training and comparison of different GANs models. In this work, we leverage Siamese neural networks to propose a domain-agnostic evaluation metric: (1) with a qualitative evaluation that is consistent with human evaluation, (2) that is robust relative to common GAN issues such as mode dropping and invention, and (3) does not require any pretrained classifier. The empirical results in this paper demonstrate the superiority of this method compared to the popular Inception Score and are competitive with the FID score. 生成对抗网络（GAN）可以准确地对复杂的多维数据进行建模并生成真实的样本。然而，由于它们对数据分布的隐式估计，它们的评估是一项具有挑战性的任务。与解决这个问题相关的大多数研究工作都是通过定性视觉评估来验证的。这些方法不能很好地推广到图像领域之外。由于许多评估指标是提出并绑定到视觉领域的，因此它们很难应用于其他领域。为了更好地指导不同 GAN 模型的训练和比较，需要定量测量。在这项工作中，我们利用 Siamese 神经网络提出了一种与领域无关的评估指标：(1) 具有与人类评估一致的定性评估，(2) 相对于模式丢弃和发明等常见 GAN 问题具有鲁棒性，(3) 不需要任何预训练的分类器。本文的实证结果证明了该方法相对于流行的 Inception Score 的优越性，并且与 FID Score 具有竞争力。 提出一种基于Siamese神经网络的领域无关评估指标，用于更准确地评估生成对抗网络（GANs）的性能。 Amirsina Torfi,Mohammadreza Beyki,Edward A. authors_text: Jonathas Costa,Alexander Bock,Carter Emmart,Charles Hansen,Anders Ynnerman,Claudio Silva
title: Interactive Visualization of Atmospheric Effects for Celestial Bodies
title_zh: 天体大气效应的交互式可视化
abstract: We present an atmospheric model tailored for the interactive visualization of planetary surfaces. As the exploration of the solar system is progressing with increasingly accurate missions and instruments, the faithful visualization of planetary environments is gaining increasing interest in space research, mission planning, and science communication and education. Atmospheric effects are crucial in data analysis and to provide contextual information for planetary data. Our model correctly accounts for the non-linear path of the light inside the atmosphere (in Earth's case), the light absorption effects by molecules and dust particles, such as the ozone layer and the Martian dust, and a wavelength-dependent phase function for Mie scattering. The mode focuses on interactivity, versatility, and customization, and a comprehensive set of interactive controls make it possible to adapt its appearance dynamically. We demonstrate our results using Earth and Mars as examples. However, it can be readily adapted for the exploration of other atmospheres found on, for example, of exoplanets. For Earth's atmosphere, we visually compare our results with pictures taken from the International Space Station and against the CIE clear sky model. The Martian atmosphere is reproduced based on available scientific data, feedback from domain experts, and is compared to images taken by the Curiosity rover. The work presented here has been implemented in the OpenSpace system, which enables interactive parameter setting and real-time feedback visualization targeting presentations in a wide range of environments, from immersive dome theaters to virtual reality headsets.
summary: We present an atmospheric model tailored for the interactive visualization of planetary surfaces. As the exploration of the solar system is progressing with increasingly accurate missions and instruments, the faithful visualization of planetary environments is gaining increasing interest in space research, mission planning, and science communication and education. Atmospheric effects are crucial in data analysis and to provide contextual information for planetary data. Our model correctly accounts for the non-linear path of the light inside the atmosphere (in Earth's case), the light absorption effects by molecules and dust particles, such as the ozone layer and the Martian dust, and a wavelength-dependent phase function for Mie scattering. The mode focuses on interactivity, versatility, and customization, and a comprehensive set of interactive controls make it possible to adapt its appearance dynamically. We demonstrate our results using Earth and Mars as examples. However, it can be readily adapted for the exploration of other atmospheres found on, for example, of exoplanets. For Earth's atmosphere, we visually compare our results with pictures taken from the International Space Station and against the CIE clear sky model. The Martian atmosphere is reproduced based on available scientific data, feedback from domain experts, and is compared to images taken by the Curiosity rover. The work presented here has been implemented in the OpenSpace system, which enables interactive parameter setting and real-time feedback visualization targeting presentations in a wide range of environments, from immersive dome theaters to virtual reality headsets.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个专为行星表面交互式可视化而定制的大气模型。随着对太阳系的探索不断进步，任务和仪器越来越精确，行星环境的忠实可视化在空间研究、任务规划以及科学传播和教育方面越来越受到人们的关注。大气效应对于数据分析和为行星数据提供上下文信息至关重要。我们的模型正确地解释了大气内部光的非线性路径（在地球的情况下）、分子和尘埃颗粒（例如臭氧层和火星尘埃）的光吸收效应，以及米氏散射的波长相关相位函数。该模式注重交互性、多功能性和定制性，一套全面的交互控件使得动态调整其外观成为可能。我们以地球和火星为例展示我们的结果。然而，它可以很容易地适用于探索例如系外行星上发现的其他大气层。对于地球大气层，我们将结果与从国际空间站拍摄的照片以及 CIE 晴空模型进行了直观比较。火星大气层是根据现有的科学数据和领域专家的反馈来再现的，并与好奇号火星车拍摄的图像进行比较。这里介绍的工作已在 OpenSpace 系统中实现，该系统支持交互式参数设置和实时反馈可视化，以在各种环境（从沉浸式球幕影院到虚拟现实耳机）中进行目标演示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于行星表面交互式可视化的专用大气模型，支持动态调整参数并实时反馈结果。
AI.motivation: 随着太阳系探测任务精度提升，准确的行星环境可视化在科研、任务规划及科普教育中需求日益增长，而大气效应是数据解读和环境建模的关键因素。
AI.method: 模型基于光线在大气中的非线性路径、分子与尘埃吸收效应（如臭氧层与火星尘埃）及波长依赖的米氏散射相函数，通过交互控件实现动态定制，并在OpenSpace系统中实现跨平台实时可视化。
AI.result: 以地球和火星为例验证模型，地球结果与国际空间站图像及CIE标准模型对比吻合，火星模拟获领域专家反馈并匹配好奇号探测器影像。
AI.conclusion: 该模型可灵活扩展至系外行星等其他天体大气研究，为沉浸式剧场、虚拟现实等多场景提供高互动性的可视化工具。

authors_text: Utku Evci,Yani A. Ioannou,Cem Keskin,Yann Dauphin
title: Gradient Flow in Sparse Neural Networks and How Lottery Tickets Win
title_zh: 稀疏神经网络中的梯度流以及彩票如何获胜
comment: Published in AAAI 2022. Code can be found at https://github.com/google-research/rigl/tree/master/rigl/rigl_tf2
comments: Published in AAAI 2022. Code can be found at https://github.com/google-research/rigl/tree/master/rigl/rigl_tf2
abstract: Sparse Neural Networks (NNs) can match the generalization of dense NNs using a fraction of the compute/storage for inference, and also have the potential to enable efficient training. However, naively training unstructured sparse NNs from random initialization results in significantly worse generalization, with the notable exceptions of Lottery Tickets (LTs) and Dynamic Sparse Training (DST). Through our analysis of gradient flow during training we attempt to answer: (1) why training unstructured sparse networks from random initialization performs poorly and; (2) what makes LTs and DST the exceptions? We show that sparse NNs have poor gradient flow at initialization and demonstrate the importance of using sparsity-aware initialization. Furthermore, we find that DST methods significantly improve gradient flow during training over traditional sparse training methods. Finally, we show that LTs do not improve gradient flow, rather their success lies in re-learning the pruning solution they are derived from - however, this comes at the cost of learning novel solutions.
summary: Sparse Neural Networks (NNs) can match the generalization of dense NNs using a fraction of the compute/storage for inference, and also have the potential to enable efficient training. However, naively training unstructured sparse NNs from random initialization results in significantly worse generalization, with the notable exceptions of Lottery Tickets (LTs) and Dynamic Sparse Training (DST). Through our analysis of gradient flow during training we attempt to answer: (1) why training unstructured sparse networks from random initialization performs poorly and; (2) what makes LTs and DST the exceptions? We show that sparse NNs have poor gradient flow at initialization and demonstrate the importance of using sparsity-aware initialization. Furthermore, we find that DST methods significantly improve gradient flow during training over traditional sparse training methods. Finally, we show that LTs do not improve gradient flow, rather their success lies in re-learning the pruning solution they are derived from - however, this comes at the cost of learning novel solutions.
abstract_zh: 稀疏神经网络 (NN) 可以使用一小部分计算/存储进行推理来匹配密集 NN 的泛化，并且还具有实现高效训练的潜力。然而，从随机初始化中天真地训练非结构化稀疏神经网络会导致泛化能力明显变差，但彩票 (LT) 和动态稀疏训练 (DST) 是明显的例外。通过对训练期间梯度流的分析，我们试图回答：（1）为什么从随机初始化训练非结构化稀疏网络表现不佳； (2) 是什么使 LT 和 DST 成为例外？我们证明稀疏神经网络在初始化时梯度流较差，并证明了使用稀疏感知初始化的重要性。此外，我们发现与传统的稀疏训练方法相比，DST 方法显着改善了训练过程中的梯度流。最后，我们表明 LT 不会改善梯度流，而是它们的成功在于重新学习它们所衍生的剪枝解决方案 - 然而，这是以学习新颖的解决方案为代价的。

AI.tldr: 本文分析稀疏神经网络训练中的梯度流问题，探讨为何彩票票券（LTs）和动态稀疏训练（DST）能有效提升稀疏网络性能。
AI.motivation: 稀疏神经网络虽具高效性，但直接训练效果差，而LTs和DST例外，需揭示其背后的梯度流机制差异。
AI.method: 通过分析训练过程中的梯度流，比较传统初始化与DST、LTs方法在梯度流动态上的差异，并验证不同策略对训练的影响。
AI.result: 稀疏网络初始化时梯度流差，需稀疏感知初始化；DST显著改善梯度流，而LTs通过重学剪枝方案成功但需额外计算。
AI.conclusion: DST通过优化训练过程提升梯度流，LTs依赖预剪枝方案但牺牲效率，两者各有优劣需权衡应用。

search_text: Gradient Flow in Sparse Neural Networks and How Lottery Tickets Win 稀疏神经网络中的梯度流以及彩票如何获胜 Sparse Neural Networks (NNs) can match the generalization of dense NNs using a fraction of the compute/storage for inference, and also have the potential to enable efficient training. However, naively training unstructured sparse NNs from random initialization results in significantly worse generalization, with the notable exceptions of Lottery Tickets (LTs) and Dynamic Sparse Training (DST). Through our analysis of gradient flow during training we attempt to answer: (1) why training unstructured sparse networks from random initialization performs poorly and; (2) what makes LTs and DST the exceptions? We show that sparse NNs have poor gradient flow at initialization and demonstrate the importance of using sparsity-aware initialization. Furthermore, we find that DST methods significantly improve gradient flow during training over traditional sparse training methods. Finally, we show that LTs do not improve gradient flow, rather their success lies in re-learning the pruning solution they are derived from - however, this comes at the cost of learning novel solutions. 稀疏神经网络 (NN) 可以使用一小部分计算/存储进行推理来匹配密集 NN 的泛化，并且还具有实现高效训练的潜力。然而，从随机初始化中天真地训练非结构化稀疏神经网络会导致泛化能力明显变差，但彩票 (LT) 和动态稀疏训练 (DST) 是明显的例外。通过对训练期间梯度流的分析，我们试图回答：（1）为什么从随机初始化训练非结构化稀疏网络表现不佳； (2) 是什么使 LT 和 DST 成为例外？我们证明稀疏神经网络在初始化时梯度流较差，并证明了使用稀疏感知初始化的重要性。此外，我们发现与传统的稀疏训练方法相比，DST 方法显着改善了训练过程中的梯度流。最后，我们表明 LT 不会改善梯度流，而是它们的成功在于重新学习它们所衍生的剪枝解决方案 - 然而，这是以学习新颖的解决方案为代价的。 本文分析稀疏神经网络训练中的梯度流问题，探讨为何彩票票券（LTs）和动态稀疏训练（DST）能有效提升稀疏网络性能。 Utku Evci,Yani A. Ioannou,Cem Keskin,Yann Dauphin cs.LG,cs.CV

title: What Can We Learn from Collective Human Opinions on Natural Language Inference Data?
title_zh: 我们可以从人类对自然语言推理数据的集体意见中学到什么？
abstract: Despite the subjective nature of many NLP tasks, most NLU evaluations have focused on using the majority label with presumably high agreement as the ground truth. Less attention has been paid to the distribution of human opinions. We collect ChaosNLI, a dataset with a total of 464,500 annotations to study Collective HumAn OpinionS in oft-used NLI evaluation sets. This dataset is created by collecting 100 annotations per example for 3,113 examples in SNLI and MNLI and 1,532 examples in Abductive-NLI. Analysis reveals that: (1) high human disagreement exists in a noticeable amount of examples in these datasets; (2) the state-of-the-art models lack the ability to recover the distribution over human labels; (3) models achieve near-perfect accuracy on the subset of data with a high level of human agreement, whereas they can barely beat a random guess on the data with low levels of human agreement, which compose most of the common errors made by state-of-the-art models on the evaluation sets. This questions the validity of improving model performance on old metrics for the low-agreement part of evaluation datasets. Hence, we argue for a detailed examination of human agreement in future data collection efforts, and evaluating model outputs against the distribution over collective human opinions. The ChaosNLI dataset and experimental scripts are available at https://github.com/easonnie/ChaosNLI
summary: Despite the subjective nature of many NLP tasks, most NLU evaluations have focused on using the majority label with presumably high agreement as the ground truth. Less attention has been paid to the distribution of human opinions. We collect ChaosNLI, a dataset with a total of 464,500 annotations to study Collective HumAn OpinionS in oft-used NLI evaluation sets. This dataset is created by collecting 100 annotations per example for 3,113 examples in SNLI and MNLI and 1,532 examples in Abductive-NLI. Analysis reveals that: (1) high human disagreement exists in a noticeable amount of examples in these datasets; (2) the state-of-the-art models lack the ability to recover the distribution over human labels; (3) models achieve near-perfect accuracy on the subset of data with a high level of human agreement, whereas they can barely beat a random guess on the data with low levels of human agreement, which compose most of the common errors made by state-of-the-art models on the evaluation sets. This questions the validity of improving model performance on old metrics for the low-agreement part of evaluation datasets. Hence, we argue for a detailed examination of human agreement in future data collection efforts, and evaluating model outputs against the distribution over collective human opinions. The ChaosNLI dataset and experimental scripts are available at https://github.com/easonnie/ChaosNLI
abstract_zh: 尽管许多 NLP 任务具有主观性，但大多数 NLU 评估都侧重于使用具有较高一致性的多数标签作为基本事实。人们对人类观点的分布关注较少。我们收集了 ChaosNLI，这是一个总共有 464,500 个注释的数据集，用于研究常用 NLI 评估集中的集体观点。该数据集是通过为 SNLI 和 MNLI 中的 3,113 个示例以及 Abduction-NLI 中的 1,532 个示例收集每个示例 100 个注释而创建的。分析表明：（1）这些数据集中的大量示例存在高度的人类分歧； （2）最先进的模型缺乏恢复人类标签分布的能力； (3) 模型在人类一致性程度较高的数据子集上实现了近乎完美的准确性，而在人类一致性程度较低的数据上几乎无法击败随机猜测，而这些数据是最先进的模型在评估集上所犯的大部分常见错误。这对评估数据集低一致性部分的旧指标提高模型性能的有效性提出了质疑。因此，我们主张在未来的数据收集工作中详细检查人类的一致性，并根据人类集体意见的分布评估模型输出。 ChaosNLI 数据集和实验脚本可在 https://github.com/easonnie/ChaosNLI 获取

AI.tldr: 该论文通过创建ChaosNLI数据集，研究自然语言推理（NLI）数据集中人类意见的分布情况，揭示现有模型在低一致性数据上的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统NLU评估过度依赖多数意见作为标准答案，忽视了人类意见的分布差异，可能导致模型评估结果失真。
AI.method: 收集SNLI、MNLI和Abductive-NLI数据集中的每个样本的100个人类标注，分析标注分布并评估模型表现。
AI.result: 发现数据集中存在大量人类意见分歧；现有模型无法还原人类标签分布，在低一致性数据上表现接近随机猜测。
AI.conclusion: 建议未来数据收集需详细分析人类一致性，并将模型输出与集体人类意见分布进行对比评估。

authors_text: Jiapeng Wu,Meng Cao,Jackie Chi Kit Cheung,William L. Hamilton
title: TeMP: Temporal Message Passing for Temporal Knowledge Graph Completion
title_zh: TeMP：用于时态知识图补全的时态消息传递
abstract: Inferring missing facts in temporal knowledge graphs (TKGs) is a fundamental and challenging task. Previous works have approached this problem by augmenting methods for static knowledge graphs to leverage time-dependent representations. However, these methods do not explicitly leverage multi-hop structural information and temporal facts from recent time steps to enhance their predictions. Additionally, prior work does not explicitly address the temporal sparsity and variability of entity distributions in TKGs. We propose the Temporal Message Passing (TeMP) framework to address these challenges by combining graph neural networks, temporal dynamics models, data imputation and frequency-based gating techniques. Experiments on standard TKG tasks show that our approach provides substantial gains compared to the previous state of the art, achieving a 10.7% average relative improvement in Hits@10 across three standard benchmarks. Our analysis also reveals important sources of variability both within and across TKG datasets, and we introduce several simple but strong baselines that outperform the prior state of the art in certain settings.
summary: Inferring missing facts in temporal knowledge graphs (TKGs) is a fundamental and challenging task. Previous works have approached this problem by augmenting methods for static knowledge graphs to leverage time-dependent representations. However, these methods do not explicitly leverage multi-hop structural information and temporal facts from recent time steps to enhance their predictions. Additionally, prior work does not explicitly address the temporal sparsity and variability of entity distributions in TKGs. We propose the Temporal Message Passing (TeMP) framework to address these challenges by combining graph neural networks, temporal dynamics models, data imputation and frequency-based gating techniques. Experiments on standard TKG tasks show that our approach provides substantial gains compared to the previous state of the art, achieving a 10.7% average relative improvement in Hits@10 across three standard benchmarks. Our analysis also reveals important sources of variability both within and across TKG datasets, and we introduce several simple but strong baselines that outperform the prior state of the art in certain settings.
abstract_zh: 推断时间知识图（TKG）中缺失的事实是一项基本且具有挑战性的任务。以前的工作通过增强静态知识图的方法来利用时间相关的表示来解决这个问题。然而，这些方法没有明确利用最近时间步骤中的多跳结构信息和时间事实来增强其预测。此外，之前的工作没有明确解决 TKG 中实体分布的时间稀疏性和可变性。我们提出了时间消息传递（TeMP）框架，通过结合图神经网络、时间动态模型、数据插补和基于频率的门控技术来应对这些挑战。标准 TKG 任务的实验表明，与之前的最新技术相比，我们的方法提供了显着的收益，在三个标准基准测试中，Hits@10 的平均相对改进为 10.7%。我们的分析还揭示了 TKG 数据集内部和之间的重要变异来源，并且我们引入了几个简单但强大的基线，这些基线在某些设置中优于现有技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TeMP框架，通过结合图神经网络和时间动态模型等方法，解决时态知识图谱中缺失事实推理的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能有效利用多跳结构信息和近期时间步的时态事实，且未明确处理时态知识图谱中的时态稀疏性和实体分布变化性。
AI.method: 融合图神经网络、时态动态模型、数据填补和基于频率的门控技术，构建时态消息传递框架TeMP。
AI.result: 在三个标准基准测试中，Hits@10指标平均相对提升10.7%，并提出多个简单但表现优异的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: TeMP通过整合多源信息有效提升了时态知识图谱补全性能，揭示了数据集内部和跨数据集的变异性特征。

Additionally, prior work does not explicitly address the temporal sparsity and variability of entity distributions in TKGs. We propose the Temporal Message Passing (TeMP) framework to address these challenges by combining graph neural networks, temporal dynamics models, data imputation and frequency-based gating techniques. Experiments on standard TKG tasks show that our approach provides substantial gains compared to the previous state of the art, achieving a 10.7% average relative improvement in Hits@10 across three standard benchmarks. Our analysis also reveals important sources of variability both within and across TKG datasets, and we introduce several simple but strong baselines that outperform the prior state of the art in certain settings. 推断时间知识图（TKG）中缺失的事实是一项基本且具有挑战性的任务。以前的工作通过增强静态知识图的方法来利用时间相关的表示来解决这个问题。然而，这些方法没有明确利用最近时间步骤中的多跳结构信息和时间事实来增强其预测。此外，之前的工作没有明确解决 TKG 中实体分布的时间稀疏性和可变性。我们提出了时间消息传递（TeMP）框架，通过结合图神经网络、时间动态模型、数据插补和基于频率的门控技术来应对这些挑战。标准 TKG 任务的实验表明，与之前的最新技术相比，我们的方法提供了显着的收益，在三个标准基准测试中，Hits@10 的平均相对改进为 10.7%。我们的分析还揭示了 TKG 数据集内部和之间的重要变异来源，并且我们引入了几个简单但强大的基线，这些基线在某些设置中优于现有技术。 本文提出TeMP框架，通过结合图神经网络和时间动态模型等方法，解决时态知识图谱中缺失事实推理的问题。 Jiapeng Wu,Meng Cao,Jackie Chi Kit Cheung,William L. Hamilton cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL

title: BoMuDANet: Unsupervised Adaptation for Visual Scene Understanding in Unstructured Driving Environments
title_zh: BoMuDANet：非结构化驾驶环境中视觉场景理解的无监督适应
abstract: We present an unsupervised adaptation approach for visual scene understanding in unstructured traffic environments. Our method is designed for unstructured real-world scenarios with dense and heterogeneous traffic consisting of cars, trucks, two-and three-wheelers, and pedestrians. We describe a new semantic segmentation technique based on unsupervised domain adaptation (DA), that can identify the class or category of each region in RGB images or videos. We also present a novel self-training algorithm (Alt-Inc) for multi-source DA that improves the accuracy. Our overall approach is a deep learning-based technique and consists of an unsupervised neural network that achieves 87.18% accuracy on the challenging India Driving Dataset. Our method works well on roads that may not be well-marked or may include dirt, unidentifiable debris, potholes, etc. A key aspect of our approach is that it can also identify objects that are encountered by the model for the fist time during the testing phase. We compare our method against the state-of-the-art methods and show an improvement of 5.17% - 42.9%. Furthermore, we also conduct user studies that qualitatively validate the improvements in visual scene understanding of unstructured driving environments.
summary: We present an unsupervised adaptation approach for visual scene understanding in unstructured traffic environments. Our method is designed for unstructured real-world scenarios with dense and heterogeneous traffic consisting of cars, trucks, two-and three-wheelers, and pedestrians. We describe a new semantic segmentation technique based on unsupervised domain adaptation (DA), that can identify the class or category of each region in RGB images or videos. We also present a novel self-training algorithm (Alt-Inc) for multi-source DA that improves the accuracy. Our overall approach is a deep learning-based technique and consists of an unsupervised neural network that achieves 87.18% accuracy on the challenging India Driving Dataset. Our method works well on roads that may not be well-marked or may include dirt, unidentifiable debris, potholes, etc. A key aspect of our approach is that it can also identify objects that are encountered by the model for the fist time during the testing phase. We compare our method against the state-of-the-art methods and show an improvement of 5.17% - 42.9%. Furthermore, we also conduct user studies that qualitatively validate the improvements in visual scene understanding of unstructured driving environments.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种无监督适应方法，用于非结构化交通环境中的视觉场景理解。我们的方法是针对非结构化的现实场景而设计的，该场景具有由汽车、卡车、两轮和三轮车以及行人组成的密集且异构的交通。我们描述了一种基于无监督域适应（DA）的新语义分割技术，该技术可以识别 RGB 图像或视频中每个区域的类别或类别。我们还提出了一种新颖的多源 DA 自训练算法（Alt-Inc），可以提高准确性。我们的整体方法是基于深度学习的技术，由无监督神经网络组成，在具有挑战性的印度驾驶数据集上实现了 87.18% 的准确率。我们的方法在可能没有很好标记或可能包含泥土、无法识别的碎片、坑洼等的道路上效果很好。我们方法的一个关键方面是它还可以识别模型在测试阶段第一次遇到的物体。我们将我们的方法与最先进的方法进行比较，结果显示提高了 5.17% - 42.9%。此外，我们还进行用户研究，定性验证非结构化驾驶环境的视觉场景理解的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督域适应方法BoMuDANet，用于解决非结构化驾驶环境中的视觉场景理解问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在非结构化道路（如未标记道路、存在杂物和坑洼的路面）及复杂异构交通场景中表现不佳，需提升模型对未知物体的识别能力。
AI.method: 基于深度学习的无监督神经网络，结合新型自训练算法Alt-Inc，通过多源域适应提升分割精度，支持实时识别测试阶段首次出现的物体。
AI.result: 在印度驾驶数据集上达到87.18%准确率，较现有方法提升5.17%-42.9%，用户研究验证了视觉场景理解能力的显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了非结构化环境下的视觉适应难题，通过无监督学习显著提升复杂交通场景的语义分割性能。

authors_text: Mike Huisman,Jan N. van Rijn,Aske Plaat
title: A Survey of Deep Meta-Learning
title_zh: 深度元学习综述
comment: Published in the AI Review (AIRE) Journal (2021)
comments: Published in the AI Review (AIRE) Journal (2021)
abstract: Deep neural networks can achieve great successes when presented with large data sets and sufficient computational resources. However, their ability to learn new concepts quickly is limited. Meta-learning is one approach to address this issue, by enabling the network to learn how to learn. The field of Deep Meta-Learning advances at great speed, but lacks a unified, in-depth overview of current techniques. With this work, we aim to bridge this gap. After providing the reader with a theoretical foundation, we investigate and summarize key methods, which are categorized into i)~metric-, ii)~model-, and iii)~optimization-based techniques. In addition, we identify the main open challenges, such as performance evaluations on heterogeneous benchmarks, and reduction of the computational costs of meta-learning.
summary: Deep neural networks can achieve great successes when presented with large data sets and sufficient computational resources. However, their ability to learn new concepts quickly is limited. Meta-learning is one approach to address this issue, by enabling the network to learn how to learn. The field of Deep Meta-Learning advances at great speed, but lacks a unified, in-depth overview of current techniques. With this work, we aim to bridge this gap. After providing the reader with a theoretical foundation, we investigate and summarize key methods, which are categorized into i)~metric-, ii)~model-, and iii)~optimization-based techniques. In addition, we identify the main open challenges, such as performance evaluations on heterogeneous benchmarks, and reduction of the computational costs of meta-learning.
abstract_zh: 当提供大量数据集和足够的计算资源时，深度神经网络可以取得巨大的成功。然而，他们快速学习新概念的能力是有限的。元学习是解决这个问题的一种方法，它使网络能够学习如何学习。深度元学习领域飞速发展，但缺乏对当前技术的统一、深入的概述。通过这项工作，我们的目标是弥合这一差距。在为读者提供理论基础后，我们研究并总结了关键方法，这些方法分为 i)~度量、ii)~模型和 iii)~基于优化的技术。此外，我们还确定了主要的开放挑战，例如异构基准的性能评估以及元学习计算成本的降低。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在综述深度元学习领域，总结关键方法并指出现存挑战。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在快速学习新概念方面存在局限，元学习虽能解决此问题，但当前领域缺乏统一的深入综述。
AI.method: 通过理论基础介绍，分类总结度量、模型和优化方法，并识别主要挑战。
AI.result: 系统梳理了深度元学习的关键方法，分类整理并指出了未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 现有研究在异构基准测试和计算成本方面仍需改进。

authors_text: Steven Chaplick,Magnús M. Halldórsson,Murilo S. de Lima,Tigran Tonoyan
title: Query Minimization under Stochastic Uncertainty
title_zh: 随机不确定性下的查询最小化
comment: To be published in Theoretical Computer Science. Since the previous version, the time consumption of the sorting algorithm was improved to $\mathrm{O}(n^5)$. Partially supported by Icelandic Research Fund grant 174484-051 and by EPSRC grant EP/S033483/1. A preliminary version of this paper appeared in volume 12118 of LNCS (LATIN 2020), pp. 181--193, 2020. DOI: 10.1007/978-3-030-61792-9_15
comments: To be published in Theoretical Computer Science. Since the previous version, the time consumption of the sorting algorithm was improved to $\mathrm{O}(n^5)$. Partially supported by Icelandic Research Fund grant 174484-051 and by EPSRC grant EP/S033483/1. A preliminary version of this paper appeared in volume 12118 of LNCS (LATIN 2020), pp. 181--193, 2020. DOI: 10.1007/978-3-030-61792-9_15
abstract: We study problems with stochastic uncertainty information on intervals for which the precise value can be queried by paying a cost. The goal is to devise an adaptive decision tree to find a correct solution to the problem in consideration while minimizing the expected total query cost. We show that, for the sorting problem, such a decision tree can be found in polynomial time. For the problem of finding the data item with minimum value, we have some evidence for hardness. This contradicts intuition, since the minimum problem is easier both in the online setting with adversarial inputs and in the offline verification setting. However, the stochastic assumption can be leveraged to beat both deterministic and randomized approximation lower bounds for the online setting.
summary: We study problems with stochastic uncertainty information on intervals for which the precise value can be queried by paying a cost. The goal is to devise an adaptive decision tree to find a correct solution to the problem in consideration while minimizing the expected total query cost. We show that, for the sorting problem, such a decision tree can be found in polynomial time. For the problem of finding the data item with minimum value, we have some evidence for hardness. This contradicts intuition, since the minimum problem is easier both in the online setting with adversarial inputs and in the offline verification setting. However, the stochastic assumption can be leveraged to beat both deterministic and randomized approximation lower bounds for the online setting.
abstract_zh: 我们研究区间内随机不确定性信息的问题，可以通过支付成本来查询其精确值。目标是设计一个自适应决策树，以找到所考虑问题的正确解决方案，同时最小化预期的总查询成本。我们证明，对于排序问题，可以在多项式时间内找到这样的决策树。对于寻找最小值数据项的问题，我们有一些硬度证据。这与直觉相矛盾，因为在具有对抗性输入的在线设置和离线验证设置中，最小问题都更容易。然而，可以利用随机假设来击败在线设置的确定性和随机近似下限。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在随机不确定性下，如何通过自适应决策树最小化查询成本以解决排序和最小值问题。
AI.motivation: 传统在线设置中最小值问题较易解决，但随机不确定性下可能面临不同挑战，需探索是否能突破现有近似下界。
AI.method: 设计自适应决策树算法，针对排序问题采用多项式时间方法，对最小值问题进行复杂性分析与证据证明。
AI.result: 排序问题可在多项式时间内构造决策树，最小值问题存在困难性证据，但随机假设下可超越传统下界。
AI.conclusion: 随机不确定性下的查询优化需重新评估问题复杂性，最小值问题的困难性与潜在突破性值得进一步研究。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究在随机不确定性下，如何通过自适应决策树最小化查询成本以解决排序和最小值问题。
ai_content.motivation: 传统在线设置中最小值问题较易解决，但随机不确定性下可能面临不同挑战，需探索是否能突破现有近似下界。

ai_content.result: 排序问题可在多项式时间内构造决策树，最小值问题存在困难性证据，但随机假设下可超越传统下界。
