tldr: 本文提出了一种基于贝叶斯网络的框架（PCMQBN），用于量化核工程中模拟预测能力的成熟度，以提高模拟结果的可信度。
motivation: 现有验证框架（如CSAU和EMDAP）在处理复杂场景时存在决策过程隐晦、依赖专家判断导致不确定性增大的问题，需更透明且一致的量化方法。
method: 构建贝叶斯网络框架，整合验证活动中的信息，通过案例研究评估光滑粒子流体动力学模拟在外部洪水场景中预测水动力力的充分性。
result: 相比定性评估，PCMQBN提升了模拟充分性结果的可信度，并降低了风险导向安全分析中的预期损失。
conclusion: PCMQBN框架为核工程模拟验证提供了透明、可量化的决策支持，有助于提升风险分析的可靠性。
search_text: Predictive Capability Maturity Quantification using Bayesian Network 使用贝叶斯网络进行预测能力成熟度量化 In nuclear engineering, modeling and simulations (M&Ss) are widely applied to support risk-informed safety analysis. Since nuclear safety analysis has important implications, a convincing validation process is needed to assess simulation adequacy, i.e., the degree to which M&S tools can adequately represent the system quantities of interest. However, due to data gaps, validation becomes a decision-making process under uncertainties. Expert knowledge and judgments are required to collect, choose, characterize, and integrate evidence toward the final adequacy decision. However, in validation frameworks CSAU: Code Scaling, Applicability, and Uncertainty (NUREG/CR-5249) and EMDAP: Evaluation Model Development and Assessment Process (RG 1.203), such a decision-making process is largely implicit and obscure. When scenarios are complex, knowledge biases and unreliable judgments can be overlooked, which could increase uncertainty in the simulation adequacy result and the corresponding risks. Therefore, a framework is required to formalize the decision-making process for simulation adequacy in a practical, transparent, and consistent manner. This paper suggests a framework "Predictive Capability Maturity Quantification using Bayesian network (PCMQBN)" as a quantified framework for assessing simulation adequacy based on information collected from validation activities. A case study is prepared for evaluating the adequacy of a Smoothed Particle Hydrodynamic simulation in predicting the hydrodynamic forces onto static structures during an external flooding scenario. Comparing to the qualitative and implicit adequacy assessment, PCMQBN is able to improve confidence in the simulation adequacy result and to reduce expected loss in the risk-informed safety analysis. 在核工程中，建模和仿真 (M&S) 被广泛应用于支持风险告知安全分析。由于核安全分析具有重要意义，因此需要一个令人信服的验证过程来评估模拟的充分性，即 M&S 工具能够充分代表感兴趣的系统数量的程度。然而，由于数据差距，验证成为不确定性下的决策过程。需要专业知识和判断来收集、选择、描述和整合证据，以做出最终的充分性决策。然而，在验证框架 CSAU：代码扩展、适用性和不确定性 (NUREG/CR-5249) 和 EMDAP：评估模型开发和评估过程 (RG 1.203) 中，这样的决策过程在很大程度上是隐式和模糊的。当场景复杂时，知识偏差和不可靠的判断可能会被忽视，这可能会增加模拟充分性结果的不确定性和相应的风险。因此，需要一个框架以实用、透明和一致的方式形式化模拟充分性的决策过程。本文提出了一个“使用贝叶斯网络的预测能力成熟度量化（PCMQBN）”框架，作为根据从验证活动收集的信息评估模拟充分性的量化框架。准备了一个案例研究，用于评估平滑粒子流体动力学模拟在预测外部洪水场景期间静态结构上的流体动力方面的充分性。与定性和隐式充分性评估相比，PCMQBN 能够提高模拟充分性结果的置信度，并减少风险告知安全分析中的预期损失。 本文提出了一种基于贝叶斯网络的框架（PCMQBN），用于量化核工程中模拟预测能力的成熟度，以提高模拟结果的可信度。 Linyu Lin,Nam Dinh physics.data-an,cs.AI

title: A study on using image based machine learning methods to develop the surrogate models of stamp forming simulations
title_zh: 使用基于图像的机器学习方法开发冲压成型模拟替代模型的研究
abstract: In the design optimization of metal forming, it is increasingly significant to use surrogate models to analyse the finite element analysis (FEA) simulations. However, traditional surrogate models using scalar based machine learning methods (SBMLMs) fall in short of accuracy and generalizability. This is because SBMLMs fail to harness the location information of the simulations. To overcome these shortcomings, image based machine learning methods (IBMLMs) are leveraged in this paper. The underlying theory of location information, which supports the advantages of IBMLM, is qualitatively interpreted. Based on this theory, a Res-SE-U-Net IBMLM surrogate model is developed and compared with a multi-layer perceptron (MLP) as a referencing SBMLM surrogate model. It is demonstrated that the IBMLM model is advantageous over the MLP SBMLM model in accuracy, generalizability, robustness, and informativeness. This paper presents a promising methodology of leveraging IBMLMs in surrogate models to make maximum use of info from FEA results. Future prospective studies that inspired by this paper are also discussed.
summary: In the design optimization of metal forming, it is increasingly significant to use surrogate models to analyse the finite element analysis (FEA) simulations. However, traditional surrogate models using scalar based machine learning methods (SBMLMs) fall in short of accuracy and generalizability. This is because SBMLMs fail to harness the location information of the simulations. To overcome these shortcomings, image based machine learning methods (IBMLMs) are leveraged in this paper. The underlying theory of location information, which supports the advantages of IBMLM, is qualitatively interpreted. Based on this theory, a Res-SE-U-Net IBMLM surrogate model is developed and compared with a multi-layer perceptron (MLP) as a referencing SBMLM surrogate model. It is demonstrated that the IBMLM model is advantageous over the MLP SBMLM model in accuracy, generalizability, robustness, and informativeness. This paper presents a promising methodology of leveraging IBMLMs in surrogate models to make maximum use of info from FEA results. Future prospective studies that inspired by this paper are also discussed.
abstract_zh: 在金属成形的设计优化中，使用替代模型来分析有限元分析（FEA）模拟变得越来越重要。然而，使用基于标量的机器学习方法（SBLMM）的传统代理模型缺乏准确性和普遍性。这是因为 SBMLM 无法利用模拟的位置信息。为了克服这些缺点，本文利用基于图像的机器学习方法（IBMLM）。对支持 IBMLM 优势的位置信息基础理论进行了定性解释。基于该理论，开发了 Res-SE-U-Net IBMLM 代理模型，并将其与作为参考 SBMLM 代理模型的多层感知器 (MLP) 进行比较。事实证明，IBMLM 模型在准确性、通用性、鲁棒性和信息性方面优于 MLP SBMLM 模型。本文提出了一种很有前途的方法，可以在替代模型中利用 IBMLM 来最大限度地利用 FEA 结果中的信息。还讨论了受本文启发的未来前瞻性研究。

AI.tldr: 本研究旨在开发基于图像的机器学习方法（IBMLM）以构建更精确的冲压成型仿真替代模型。
AI.motivation: 传统标量基于机器学习方法（SBMLM）因无法利用仿真中的位置信息，导致替代模型在准确性和泛化能力上存在不足。
AI.method: 基于位置信息理论，开发了Res-SE-U-Net图像基于机器学习模型，并与多层感知机（MLP）进行对比实验。
AI.result: IBMLM在准确性、泛化性、鲁棒性和信息量方面均优于MLP模型，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: IBMLM为充分利用FEA结果信息提供了新方法，未来可进一步探索其在更多工程场景中的应用。

authors_text: Thomas Scialom,Serra Sinem Tekiroglu,Jacopo Staiano,Marco Guerini
title: Toward Stance-based Personas for Opinionated Dialogues
title_zh: 走向基于立场的人物角色进行固执己见的对话
abstract: In the context of chit-chat dialogues it has been shown that endowing systems with a persona profile is important to produce more coherent and meaningful conversations. Still, the representation of such personas has thus far been limited to a fact-based representation (e.g. "I have two cats."). We argue that these representations remain superficial w.r.t. the complexity of human personality. In this work, we propose to make a step forward and investigate stance-based persona, trying to grasp more profound characteristics, such as opinions, values, and beliefs to drive language generation. To this end, we introduce a novel dataset allowing to explore different stance-based persona representations and their impact on claim generation, showing that they are able to grasp abstract and profound aspects of the author persona.
summary: In the context of chit-chat dialogues it has been shown that endowing systems with a persona profile is important to produce more coherent and meaningful conversations. Still, the representation of such personas has thus far been limited to a fact-based representation (e.g. "I have two cats."). We argue that these representations remain superficial w.r.t. the complexity of human personality. In this work, we propose to make a step forward and investigate stance-based persona, trying to grasp more profound characteristics, such as opinions, values, and beliefs to drive language generation. To this end, we introduce a novel dataset allowing to explore different stance-based persona representations and their impact on claim generation, showing that they are able to grasp abstract and profound aspects of the author persona.
abstract_zh: 在闲聊对话的背景下，事实证明，赋予系统人物角色对于产生更加连贯和有意义的对话非常重要。尽管如此，此类角色的表示迄今为止仅限于基于事实的表示（例如“我有两只猫”）。我们认为这些表述仍然是肤浅的。人类性格的复杂性。在这项工作中，我们建议向前迈出一步，研究基于立场的角色，试图掌握更深刻的特征，例如观点、价值观和信仰，以驱动语言的生成。为此，我们引入了一个新颖的数据集，允许探索不同的基于立场的角色表征及其对声明生成的影响，表明他们能够掌握作者角色的抽象和深刻的方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于立场的虚拟形象表示方法，用于生成更具观点和个性化的对话内容。
AI.motivation: 现有对话系统中的虚拟形象多采用事实性描述，难以体现人类性格的复杂性与深层价值观。
AI.method: 构建新型数据集，通过分析立场相关特征（观点、价值观、信仰）探索其对声明生成的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明基于立场的虚拟形象能有效捕捉作者抽象且深层次的人格特质。
AI.conclusion: 立场驱动的虚拟形象可生成更复杂、个性化的对话，为对话系统提供更真实的交互体验。

authors_text: Heng-Sheng Chang,Udit Halder,Ekaterina Gribkova,Arman Tekinalp,Noel Naughton,Mattia Gazzola,Prashant G. Mehta
title: Controlling a CyberOctopus Soft Arm with Muscle-like Actuation
title_zh: 通过类似肌肉的驱动来控制 Cyber​​Octopus 软臂
abstract: This paper presents an application of the energy shaping methodology to control a flexible, elastic Cosserat rod model of a single octopus arm. The novel contributions of this work are two-fold: (i) a control-oriented modeling of the anatomically realistic internal muscular architecture of an octopus arm; and (ii) the integration of these muscle models into the energy shaping control methodology. The control-oriented modeling takes inspiration in equal parts from theories of nonlinear elasticity and energy shaping control. By introducing a stored energy function for muscles, the difficulties associated with explicitly solving the matching conditions of the energy shaping methodology are avoided. The overall control design problem is posed as a bilevel optimization problem. Its solution is obtained through iterative algorithms. The methodology is numerically implemented and demonstrated in a full-scale dynamic simulation environment Elastica. Two bio-inspired numerical experiments involving the control of octopus arms are reported.
summary: This paper presents an application of the energy shaping methodology to control a flexible, elastic Cosserat rod model of a single octopus arm. The novel contributions of this work are two-fold: (i) a control-oriented modeling of the anatomically realistic internal muscular architecture of an octopus arm; and (ii) the integration of these muscle models into the energy shaping control methodology. The control-oriented modeling takes inspiration in equal parts from theories of nonlinear elasticity and energy shaping control. By introducing a stored energy function for muscles, the difficulties associated with explicitly solving the matching conditions of the energy shaping methodology are avoided. The overall control design problem is posed as a bilevel optimization problem. Its solution is obtained through iterative algorithms. The methodology is numerically implemented and demonstrated in a full-scale dynamic simulation environment Elastica. Two bio-inspired numerical experiments involving the control of octopus arms are reported.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种应用能量整形方法来控制单个章鱼臂的灵活弹性 Cosserat 杆模型。这项工作的新颖贡献有两个：（i）对章鱼手臂解剖学上真实的内部肌肉结构进行面向控制的建模； (ii) 将这些肌肉模型整合到能量塑造控制方法中。面向控制的建模同样受到非线性弹性和能量整形控制理论的启发。通过引入肌肉存储能量函数，避免了与明确解决能量整形方法的匹配条件相关的困难。总体控制设计问题被提出为双层优化问题。其解是通过迭代算法得到的。该方法在全尺寸动态模拟环境 Elastica 中进行了数值实施和演示。报道了两个涉及章鱼手臂控制的仿生数值实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于能量塑造方法控制章鱼触手软体机械臂的技术，通过建立仿生肌肉模型实现灵活控制。
AI.motivation: 现有软体机器人控制方法难以精确模拟生物肌肉的复杂力学特性，需开发更符合生物结构的控制模型以提升灵活性与适应性。
AI.method: 结合非线性弹性理论与能量塑造控制，建立触手肌肉的储能函数模型，并通过双层优化算法解决能量匹配问题，利用Elastica仿真平台验证控制效果。
AI.result: 在仿真环境中成功实现了章鱼触手的两种仿生控制实验，验证了肌肉模型与能量塑造方法结合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过生物启发的肌肉建模与优化控制算法，为软体机器人提供了新的控制范式，推动了仿生机械臂的发展。

search_text: Controlling a CyberOctopus Soft Arm with Muscle-like Actuation 通过类似肌肉的驱动来控制 Cyber​​Octopus 软臂 This paper presents an application of the energy shaping methodology to control a flexible, elastic Cosserat rod model of a single octopus arm. The novel contributions of this work are two-fold: (i) a control-oriented modeling of the anatomically realistic internal muscular architecture of an octopus arm; and (ii) the integration of these muscle models into the energy shaping control methodology. The control-oriented modeling takes inspiration in equal parts from theories of nonlinear elasticity and energy shaping control. By introducing a stored energy function for muscles, the difficulties associated with explicitly solving the matching conditions of the energy shaping methodology are avoided. The overall control design problem is posed as a bilevel optimization problem. Its solution is obtained through iterative algorithms. The methodology is numerically implemented and demonstrated in a full-scale dynamic simulation environment Elastica. Two bio-inspired numerical experiments involving the control of octopus arms are reported. 本文提出了一种应用能量整形方法来控制单个章鱼臂的灵活弹性 Cosserat 杆模型。这项工作的新颖贡献有两个：（i）对章鱼手臂解剖学上真实的内部肌肉结构进行面向控制的建模； (ii) 将这些肌肉模型整合到能量塑造控制方法中。面向控制的建模同样受到非线性弹性和能量整形控制理论的启发。通过引入肌肉存储能量函数，避免了与明确解决能量整形方法的匹配条件相关的困难。总体控制设计问题被提出为双层优化问题。其解是通过迭代算法得到的。该方法在全尺寸动态模拟环境 Elastica 中进行了数值实施和演示。报道了两个涉及章鱼手臂控制的仿生数值实验。 本文提出了一种基于能量塑造方法控制章鱼触手软体机械臂的技术，通过建立仿生肌肉模型实现灵活控制。 Heng-Sheng Chang,Udit Halder,Ekaterina Gribkova,Arman Tekinalp,Noel Naughton,Mattia Gazzola,Prashant G. Mehta cs.RO,eess.SY

title: Secure 3D medical Imaging
title_zh: 安全 3D 医学成像
abstract: Image segmentation has proved its importance and plays an important role in various domains such as health systems and satellite-oriented military applications. In this context, accuracy, image quality, and execution time deem to be the major issues to always consider. Although many techniques have been applied, and their experimental results have shown appealing achievements for 2D images in real-time environments, however, there is a lack of works about 3D image segmentation despite its importance in improving segmentation accuracy. Specifically, HMM was used in this domain. However, it suffers from the time complexity, which was updated using different accelerators. As it is important to have efficient 3D image segmentation, we propose in this paper a novel system for partitioning the 3D segmentation process across several distributed machines. The concepts behind distributed multi-media network segmentation were employed to accelerate the segmentation computational time of training Hidden Markov Model (HMMs). Furthermore, a secure transmission has been considered in this distributed environment and various bidirectional multimedia security algorithms have been applied. The contribution of this work lies in providing an efficient and secure algorithm for 3D image segmentation. Through a number of extensive experiments, it was proved that our proposed system is of comparable efficiency to the state of art methods in terms of segmentation accuracy, security and execution time.

The contribution of this work lies in providing an efficient and secure algorithm for 3D image segmentation. abstract_zh: 图像分割已经证明了它的重要性，并在卫生系统和面向卫星的军事应用等各个领域发挥着重要作用。在这种情况下，准确性、图像质量和执行时间被认为是需要始终考虑的主要问题。尽管许多技术已经被应用，并且他们的实验结果在实时环境中的 2D 图像方面取得了令人瞩目的成就，但是，尽管 3D 图像分割对于提高分割精度很重要，但仍缺乏关于 3D 图像分割的工作。具体来说，HMM 被用在这个领域。然而，它受到时间复杂度的影响，并且使用不同的加速器进行更新。由于高效的 3D 图像分割非常重要，因此我们在本文中提出了一种新颖的系统，用于跨多个分布式机器划分 3D 分割过程。采用分布式多媒体网络分割背后的概念来加速训练隐马尔可夫模型（HMM）的分割计算时间。此外，还考虑了在这种分布式环境中的安全传输，并应用了各种双向多媒体安全算法。这项工作的贡献在于为 3D 图像分割提供了一种高效且安全的算法。通过大量广泛的实验，证明我们提出的系统在分割准确性、安全性和执行时间方面与最先进的方法具有可比性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的分布式3D医学图像分割系统，结合安全传输技术以提升分割精度与执行效率。
AI.motivation: 尽管2D图像分割技术成熟，但3D分割因计算复杂度高且缺乏安全传输方案而未被充分研究，亟需改进效率与安全性。
AI.method: 采用分布式计算框架分割3D图像并加速HMM训练，结合双向多媒体安全算法实现数据传输保护。
AI.result: 实验表明，该系统在分割精度、安全性和执行时间上均达到现有方法水平，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为3D医学图像分割提供了兼顾效率与安全的解决方案，推动了分布式医疗影像处理技术的发展。

title: "Drunk Man" Saves Our Lives: Route Planning by a Biased Random Walk Mode
title_zh: “醉汉”救我们的命：偏向随机游走模式的路线规划
abstract: Based on the hurricane striking Puerto Rico in 2017, we developed a transportable disaster response system "DroneGo" featuring a drone fleet capable of delivering the medical package and videoing roads. Covering with a genetic algorithm and a biased random walk model mimicking a drunk man to explore feasible routes on a field with altitude and road information. A proposal mechanism guaranteeing stochasticity and an objective function biasing randomness are combined. The results showed high performance though time-consuming.
summary: Based on the hurricane striking Puerto Rico in 2017, we developed a transportable disaster response system "DroneGo" featuring a drone fleet capable of delivering the medical package and videoing roads. Covering with a genetic algorithm and a biased random walk model mimicking a drunk man to explore feasible routes on a field with altitude and road information. A proposal mechanism guaranteeing stochasticity and an objective function biasing randomness are combined. The results showed high performance though time-consuming.
abstract_zh: 根据 2017 年袭击波多黎各的飓风，我们开发了一种便携式灾难响应系统“DroneGo”，其特点是能够运送医疗包和拍摄道路的无人机机队。使用遗传算法和有偏差的随机游走模型来模仿醉酒的人，在具有海拔和道路信息的场地上探索可行的路线。保证随机性的提议机制和偏向随机性的目标函数相结合。结果显示虽然耗时但性能很高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于醉汉随机游走模型的灾难应急无人机路径规划系统DroneGo，结合遗传算法实现医疗物资配送与道路勘测。
AI.motivation: 针对飓风等灾难发生后传统救援路径规划效率低、适应性差的问题，需要开发能快速应对复杂地形的智能运输系统。
AI.method: 融合遗传算法与偏向随机游走模型（模拟醉汉探索行为），通过随机性保证机制与目标函数偏置共同优化路径规划，考虑海拔和道路信息进行动态调整。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在复杂地形中能有效规划可行路径，但计算耗时较高。
AI.conclusion: 基于随机游走的路径规划方法在灾难救援中具有潜力，但需进一步优化计算效率以提升实际应用价值。

title: The Short Anthropological Guide to the Study of Ethical AI
title_zh: 道德人工智能研究的人类学简短指南
abstract: Over the next few years, society as a whole will need to address what core values it wishes to protect when dealing with technology. Anthropology, a field dedicated to the very notion of what it means to be human, can provide some interesting insights into how to cope and tackle these changes in our Western society and other areas of the world. It can be challenging for social science practitioners to grasp and keep up with the pace of technological innovation, with many being unfamiliar with the jargon of AI. This short guide serves as both an introduction to AI ethics and social science and anthropological perspectives on the development of AI. It intends to provide those unfamiliar with the field with an insight into the societal impact of AI systems and how, in turn, these systems can lead us to rethink how our world operates.
summary: Over the next few years, society as a whole will need to address what core values it wishes to protect when dealing with technology. Anthropology, a field dedicated to the very notion of what it means to be human, can provide some interesting insights into how to cope and tackle these changes in our Western society and other areas of the world. It can be challenging for social science practitioners to grasp and keep up with the pace of technological innovation, with many being unfamiliar with the jargon of AI. This short guide serves as both an introduction to AI ethics and social science and anthropological perspectives on the development of AI. It intends to provide those unfamiliar with the field with an insight into the societal impact of AI systems and how, in turn, these systems can lead us to rethink how our world operates.
abstract_zh: 在接下来的几年里，整个社会将需要解决在处理技术时希望保护哪些核心价值观。人类学是一个致力于研究人类意义这一概念的领域，它可以为如何应对和应对西方社会和世界其他地区的这些变化提供一些有趣的见解。对于社会科学从业者来说，掌握并跟上技术创新的步伐可能具有挑战性，因为许多人不熟悉人工智能的术语。这本简短的指南既介绍了人工智能伦理和社会科学，也介绍了人工智能发展的人类学观点。它旨在让那些不熟悉该领域的人深入了解人工智能系统的社会影响，以及这些系统如何引导我们重新思考我们的世界如何运作。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为非专业人士提供AI伦理及社会学、人类学视角的简明指南，探讨AI系统对社会的影响及对世界运作方式的重新思考。
AI.motivation: 社会需明确技术发展中的核心价值观，而人类学能提供应对AI变革的视角，但社会科学家常因缺乏AI知识而难以参与，故需此指南。
AI.method: 通过整合社会学与人类学视角，结合AI伦理的跨学科分析，为非专业读者提供易懂的解释。
AI.result: 使读者理解AI系统的社会影响，并启发对现有社会结构与价值观的反思。
AI.conclusion: 强调跨学科合作在确保AI发展符合人类核心价值中的关键作用，并呼吁社会科学家积极参与技术伦理讨论。

title: Interpreting Imagined Speech Waves with Machine Learning techniques
title_zh: 用机器学习技术解释想象的语音波
abstract: This work explores the possibility of decoding Imagined Speech (IS) signals which can be used to create a new design of Human-Computer Interface (HCI). Since the underlying process generating EEG signals is unknown, various feature extraction methods, along with different neural network (NN) models, are used to approximate data distribution and classify IS signals. Based on the experimental results, feed-forward NN model with ensemble and covariance matrix transformed features showed the highest performance in comparison to other existing methods. For comparison, three publicly available datasets were used. We report a mean classification accuracy of 80% between rest and imagined state, 96% and 80% for decoding long and short words on two datasets. These results show that it is possible to differentiate brain signals (generated during rest state) from the IS brain signals. Based on the experimental results, we suggest that the word length and complexity can be used to decode IS signals with high accuracy, and a BCI system can be designed with IS signals for computer interaction. These ideas, and results give direction for the development of a commercial level IS based BCI system, which can be used for human-computer interaction in daily life.
summary: This work explores the possibility of decoding Imagined Speech (IS) signals which can be used to create a new design of Human-Computer Interface (HCI). Since the underlying process generating EEG signals is unknown, various feature extraction methods, along with different neural network (NN) models, are used to approximate data distribution and classify IS signals. Based on the experimental results, feed-forward NN model with ensemble and covariance matrix transformed features showed the highest performance in comparison to other existing methods. For comparison, three publicly available datasets were used. We report a mean classification accuracy of 80% between rest and imagined state, 96% and 80% for decoding long and short words on two datasets. These results show that it is possible to differentiate brain signals (generated during rest state) from the IS brain signals. Based on the experimental results, we suggest that the word length and complexity can be used to decode IS signals with high accuracy, and a BCI system can be designed with IS signals for computer interaction. These ideas, and results give direction for the development of a commercial level IS based BCI system, which can be used for human-computer interaction in daily life.
abstract_zh: 这项工作探索了解码想象语音（IS）信号的可能性，该信号可用于创建人机界面（HCI）的新设计。由于生成 EEG 信号的底层过程未知，因此使用各种特征提取方法以及不同的神经网络 (NN) 模型来近似数据分布并对 IS 信号进行分类。根据实验结果，与其他现有方法相比，具有集成和协方差矩阵变换特征的前馈神经网络模型表现出最高的性能。为了进行比较，使用了三个公开可用的数据集。我们报告在静止状态和想象状态之间的平均分类准确度为 80%，在两个数据集上解码长单词和短单词时分别为 96% 和 80%。这些结果表明，可以将大脑信号（在休息状态下产生）与 IS 大脑信号区分开来。根据实验结果，我们建议可以利用字长和复杂度对IS信号进行高精度解码，并可以利用IS信号设计BCI系统以进行计算机交互。这些想法和结果为开发基于信息系统的商业级 BCI 系统提供了方向，该系统可用于日常生活中的人机交互。

AI.tldr: 本论文探讨利用机器学习技术解码想象语音信号，以设计新型人机交互接口。
AI.motivation: 由于EEG信号生成机制未知，需通过多种特征提取方法和神经网络模型逼近数据分布，实现想象语音信号分类，推动基于脑机接口的实用化交互系统开发。
AI.method: 采用前馈神经网络结合集成学习与协方差矩阵转换特征，对比多种公开数据集验证模型性能。
AI.result: 实验显示静息状态与想象状态分类准确率达80%，长单词和短单词解码准确率分别达96%和80%，证实区分脑信号可行性。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明可通过词长和复杂度高精度解码想象语音，为开发商用级脑机接口系统提供方向。

title: Recognizing (Unit) Interval Graphs by Zigzag Graph Searches
title_zh: 通过锯齿形图搜索识别（单位）区间图
abstract: Corneil, Olariu, and Stewart [SODA 1998; SIAM Journal on Discrete Mathematics 2009] presented a recognition algorithm for interval graphs by six graph searches. Li and Wu [Discrete Mathematics \& Theoretical Computer Science 2014] simplified it to only four. The great simplicity of the latter algorithm is however eclipsed by the complicated and long proofs. The main purpose of this paper is to present a new and significantly short proof for Li and Wu's algorithm, as well as a simpler implementation. We also give a self-contained simpler interpretation of the recognition algorithm of Corneil [Discrete Applied Mathematics 2004] for unit interval graphs, based on three sweeps of graph searches. Moreover, we show that two sweeps are already sufficient. Toward the proofs of the main results, we make several new structural observations that might be of independent interests.
summary: Corneil, Olariu, and Stewart [SODA 1998; SIAM Journal on Discrete Mathematics 2009] presented a recognition algorithm for interval graphs by six graph searches. Li and Wu [Discrete Mathematics \& Theoretical Computer Science 2014] simplified it to only four. The great simplicity of the latter algorithm is however eclipsed by the complicated and long proofs. The main purpose of this paper is to present a new and significantly short proof for Li and Wu's algorithm, as well as a simpler implementation. We also give a self-contained simpler interpretation of the recognition algorithm of Corneil [Discrete Applied Mathematics 2004] for unit interval graphs, based on three sweeps of graph searches. Moreover, we show that two sweeps are already sufficient. Toward the proofs of the main results, we make several new structural observations that might be of independent interests.
abstract_zh: Corneil、Olarius 和 Stewart [SODA 1998； SIAM Journal on Discrete Mathematics 2009]提出了一种通过六图搜索来识别区间图的算法。 Li和Wu [离散数学\&理论计算机科学2014]将其简化为只有四个。然而，后一种算法的极大简单性却因复杂而冗长的证明而黯然失色。本文的主要目的是为 Li 和 Wu 的算法提供一个新的且明显简短的证明，以及一个更简单的实现。我们还基于图搜索的三次扫描，对 Corneil [离散应用数学 2004] 的单位区间图识别算法给出了一个独立的简单解释。此外，我们证明两次扫描就足够了。为了证明主要结果，我们提出了一些可能具有独立利益的新结构观察。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为区间图和单位区间图的识别算法提供更简洁的证明与实现方法。
AI.motivation: 现有区间图识别算法证明复杂且实现繁琐，需简化证明过程并减少图搜索次数以提高效率。
AI.method: 基于结构观察与zigzag图搜索策略，简化Li和Wu的四次搜索算法，并通过三次甚至两次搜索实现单位区间图识别。
AI.result: 提出更简短的证明与实现方案，证明两次搜索即可识别单位区间图，并发现具有独立价值的结构特性。
AI.conclusion: 新方法显著降低了算法复杂度，为区间图识别提供了更高效且易实现的解决方案。

result: 提出更简短的证明与实现方案，证明两次搜索即可识别单位区间图，并发现具有独立价值的结构特性。
conclusion: 新方法显著降低了算法复杂度，为区间图识别提供了更高效且易实现的解决方案。
search_text: Recognizing (Unit) Interval Graphs by Zigzag Graph Searches 通过锯齿形图搜索识别（单位）区间图 Corneil, Olariu, and Stewart [SODA 1998; SIAM Journal on Discrete Mathematics 2009] presented a recognition algorithm for interval graphs by six graph searches. Li and Wu [Discrete Mathematics \& Theoretical Computer Science 2014] simplified it to only four. The great simplicity of the latter algorithm is however eclipsed by the complicated and long proofs. The main purpose of this paper is to present a new and significantly short proof for Li and Wu's algorithm, as well as a simpler implementation. We also give a self-contained simpler interpretation of the recognition algorithm of Corneil [Discrete Applied Mathematics 2004] for unit interval graphs, based on three sweeps of graph searches. Moreover, we show that two sweeps are already sufficient. Toward the proofs of the main results, we make several new structural observations that might be of independent interests. Corneil、Olarius 和 Stewart [SODA 1998； SIAM Journal on Discrete Mathematics 2009]提出了一种通过六图搜索来识别区间图的算法。 Li和Wu [离散数学\&理论计算机科学2014]将其简化为只有四个。然而，后一种算法的极大简单性却因复杂而冗长的证明而黯然失色。本文的主要目的是为 Li 和 Wu 的算法提供一个新的且明显简短的证明，以及一个更简单的实现。我们还基于图搜索的三次扫描，对 Corneil [离散应用数学 2004] 的单位区间图识别算法给出了一个独立的简单解释。此外，我们证明两次扫描就足够了。为了证明主要结果，我们提出了一些可能具有独立利益的新结构观察。 本文旨在为区间图和单位区间图的识别算法提供更简洁的证明与实现方法。 Yixin Cao cs.DS

authors_text: Oliver Speidel,Maximilian Graf,Ankit Kaushik,Thanh Phan-Huu,Andreas Wedel,Klaus Dietmayer
title: Trajectory Planning for Automated Driving in Intersection Scenarios using Driver Models
title_zh: 利用驾驶员模型进行交叉路口场景自动驾驶轨迹规划
comment: Accepted on 5th International Conference on Robotics and Automation Engineering
comments: Accepted on 5th International Conference on Robotics and Automation Engineering
abstract: Efficient trajectory planning for urban intersections is currently one of the most challenging tasks for an Autonomous Vehicle (AV). Courteous behavior towards other traffic participants, the AV's comfort and its progression in the environment are the key aspects that determine the performance of trajectory planning algorithms. To capture these aspects, we propose a novel trajectory planning framework that ensures social compliance and simultaneously optimizes the AV's comfort subject to kinematic constraints. The framework combines a local continuous optimization approach and an efficient driver model to ensure fast behavior prediction, maneuver generation and decision making over long horizons. The proposed framework is evaluated in different scenarios to demonstrate its capabilities in terms of the resulting trajectories and runtime.
summary: Efficient trajectory planning for urban intersections is currently one of the most challenging tasks for an Autonomous Vehicle (AV). Courteous behavior towards other traffic participants, the AV's comfort and its progression in the environment are the key aspects that determine the performance of trajectory planning algorithms. To capture these aspects, we propose a novel trajectory planning framework that ensures social compliance and simultaneously optimizes the AV's comfort subject to kinematic constraints. The framework combines a local continuous optimization approach and an efficient driver model to ensure fast behavior prediction, maneuver generation and decision making over long horizons. The proposed framework is evaluated in different scenarios to demonstrate its capabilities in terms of the resulting trajectories and runtime.
abstract_zh: 城市十字路口的高效轨迹规划是目前自动驾驶车辆 (AV) 最具挑战性的任务之一。对其他交通参与者的礼貌行为、自动驾驶汽车的舒适度及其在环境中的进展是决定轨迹规划算法性能的关键方面。为了捕捉这些方面，我们提出了一种新颖的轨迹规划框架，该框架可确保社会合规性，同时优化自动驾驶汽车在运动学约束下的舒适度。该框架结合了局部连续优化方法和高效的驾驶员模型，以确保长期的快速行为预测、机动生成和决策。所提出的框架在不同的场景中进行评估，以展示其在结果轨迹和运行时方面的功能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合驾驶员模型的轨迹规划框架，旨在提升自动驾驶车辆在交叉路口场景中的社会合规性与乘坐舒适性。
AI.motivation: 城市交叉路口的轨迹规划需平衡礼貌行为、车辆舒适性与环境适应性，现有方法难以同时满足多目标优化需求。
AI.method: 融合局部连续优化算法与高效驾驶员模型，实现长期视野下的行为预测、路径生成及决策优化。
AI.result: 在多种场景测试中，框架生成的轨迹符合社会规范且运行效率高，验证了方法在轨迹质量与计算速度上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过整合驾驶员行为模型与优化算法，为自动驾驶提供了兼顾社会合规性、舒适性及实时性的轨迹规划解决方案。

authors_text: Moi Hoon Yap,Ryo Hachiuma,Azadeh Alavi,Raphael Brungel,Bill Cassidy,Manu Goyal,Hongtao Zhu,Johannes Ruckert,Moshe Olshansky,Xiao Huang,Hideo Saito,Saeed Hassanpour,Christoph M. Friedrich,David Ascher,Anping Song,Hiroki Kajita,David Gillespie,Neil D. Reeves,Joseph Pappachan,Claire O'Shea,Eibe Frank
title: Deep Learning in Diabetic Foot Ulcers Detection: A Comprehensive Evaluation
title_zh: 深度学习在糖尿病足溃疡检测中的应用：综合评估
abstract: There has been a substantial amount of research involving computer methods and technology for the detection and recognition of diabetic foot ulcers (DFUs), but there is a lack of systematic comparisons of state-of-the-art deep learning object detection frameworks applied to this problem. DFUC2020 provided participants with a comprehensive dataset consisting of 2,000 images for training and 2,000 images for testing. This paper summarises the results of DFUC2020 by comparing the deep learning-based algorithms proposed by the winning teams: Faster R-CNN, three variants of Faster R-CNN and an ensemble method; YOLOv3; YOLOv5; EfficientDet; and a new Cascade Attention Network. For each deep learning method, we provide a detailed description of model architecture, parameter settings for training and additional stages including pre-processing, data augmentation and post-processing. We provide a comprehensive evaluation for each method. All the methods required a data augmentation stage to increase the number of images available for training and a post-processing stage to remove false positives. The best performance was obtained from Deformable Convolution, a variant of Faster R-CNN, with a mean average precision (mAP) of 0.6940 and an F1-Score of 0.7434. Finally, we demonstrate that the ensemble method based on different deep learning methods can enhanced the F1-Score but not the mAP.
summary: There has been a substantial amount of research involving computer methods and technology for the detection and recognition of diabetic foot ulcers (DFUs), but there is a lack of systematic comparisons of state-of-the-art deep learning object detection frameworks applied to this problem. DFUC2020 provided participants with a comprehensive dataset consisting of 2,000 images for training and 2,000 images for testing. This paper summarises the results of DFUC2020 by comparing the deep learning-based algorithms proposed by the winning teams: Faster R-CNN, three variants of Faster R-CNN and an ensemble method; YOLOv3; YOLOv5; EfficientDet; and a new Cascade Attention Network. For each deep learning method, we provide a detailed description of model architecture, parameter settings for training and additional stages including pre-processing, data augmentation and post-processing. We provide a comprehensive evaluation for each method. All the methods required a data augmentation stage to increase the number of images available for training and a post-processing stage to remove false positives. The best performance was obtained from Deformable Convolution, a variant of Faster R-CNN, with a mean average precision (mAP) of 0.6940 and an F1-Score of 0.7434. Finally, we demonstrate that the ensemble method based on different deep learning methods can enhanced the F1-Score but not the mAP.
abstract_zh: 目前已经有大量涉及用于检测和识别糖尿病足溃疡 (DFU) 的计算机方法和技术的研究，但缺乏对应用于该问题的最先进的深度学习对象检测框架的系统比较。 DFUC2020 为参与者提供了一个全面的数据集，其中包含 2,000 张用于训练的图像和 2,000 张用于测试的图像。本文通过比较获胜团队提出的基于深度学习的算法，总结了 DFUC2020 的成果：Faster R-CNN、Faster R-CNN 的三种变体和集成方法； YOLOv3； YOLOv5；高效检测；和一个新的级联注意力网络。对于每种深度学习方法，我们提供了模型架构、训练参数设置以及包括预处理、数据增强和后处理在内的附加阶段的详细描述。我们为每种方法提供综合评估。所有方法都需要一个数据增强阶段来增加可用于训练的图像数量，并需要一个后处理阶段来消除误报。最佳性能来自可变形卷积（Faster R-CNN 的一种变体），平均精度 (mAP) 为 0.6940，F1 分数为 0.7434。最后，我们证明基于不同深度学习方法的集成方法可以增强 F1-Score，但不能增强 mAP。

AI.tldr: 本文对用于检测糖尿病足溃疡（DFUs）的深度学习方法进行了全面评估。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有大量关于计算机方法和糖尿病足溃疡检测的研究，但缺乏对最新深度学习目标检测框架的系统比较。
AI.method: 本文使用DFUC2020数据集，比较了多种深度学习方法，包括Faster R-CNN及其变体、YOLOv3、YOLOv5、EfficientDet以及一种新的级联注意力网络，并详细描述了模型架构、训练参数设置及预处理、数据增强和后处理阶段。
AI.result: Deformable Convolution变体的Faster R-CNN在mAP和F1-Score上表现最佳，分别为0.6940和0.7434。基于不同深度学习方法的集成方法提高了F1-Score，但未提高mAP。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法在DFU检测中表现良好，其中Deformable Convolution变体的Faster R-CNN效果最佳，集成方法在某些指标上有所提升。

title: Multi-label classification of promotions in digital leaflets using textual and visual information
title_zh: 使用文本和视觉信息对数字传单中的促销活动进行多标签分类
comment: Conference on Computational Linguistics (COLING). Workshop on Natural Language Processing in E-Commerce (EcomNLP 2020)
comments: Conference on Computational Linguistics (COLING). Workshop on Natural Language Processing in E-Commerce (EcomNLP 2020)
abstract: Product descriptions in e-commerce platforms contain detailed and valuable information about retailers assortment. In particular, coding promotions within digital leaflets are of great interest in e-commerce as they capture the attention of consumers by showing regular promotions for different products. However, this information is embedded into images, making it difficult to extract and process for downstream tasks. In this paper, we present an end-to-end approach that classifies promotions within digital leaflets into their corresponding product categories using both visual and textual information. Our approach can be divided into three key components: 1) region detection, 2) text recognition and 3) text classification. In many cases, a single promotion refers to multiple product categories, so we introduce a multi-label objective in the classification head. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach for two separated tasks: 1) image-based detection of the descriptions for each individual promotion and 2) multi-label classification of the product categories using the text from the product descriptions. We train and evaluate our models using a private dataset composed of images from digital leaflets obtained by Nielsen. Results show that we consistently outperform the proposed baseline by a large margin in all the experiments.
summary: Product descriptions in e-commerce platforms contain detailed and valuable information about retailers assortment. In particular, coding promotions within digital leaflets are of great interest in e-commerce as they capture the attention of consumers by showing regular promotions for different products. However, this information is embedded into images, making it difficult to extract and process for downstream tasks. In this paper, we present an end-to-end approach that classifies promotions within digital leaflets into their corresponding product categories using both visual and textual information. Our approach can be divided into three key components: 1) region detection, 2) text recognition and 3) text classification. In many cases, a single promotion refers to multiple product categories, so we introduce a multi-label objective in the classification head. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach for two separated tasks: 1) image-based detection of the descriptions for each individual promotion and 2) multi-label classification of the product categories using the text from the product descriptions. We train and evaluate our models using a private dataset composed of images from digital leaflets obtained by Nielsen. Results show that we consistently outperform the proposed baseline by a large margin in all the experiments.
abstract_zh: 电子商务平台中的产品描述包含有关零售商品种的详细且有价值的信息。特别是，数字传单中的编码促销在电子商务中引起了极大的兴趣，因为它们通过显示不同产品的定期促销来吸引消费者的注意力。然而，这些信息被嵌入到图像中，使得下游任务的提取和处理变得困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种端到端方法，使用视觉和文本信息将数字传单中的促销活动分类到相应的产品类别中。我们的方法可以分为三个关键部分：1）区域检测，2）文本识别和3）文本分类。在许多情况下，单个促销涉及多个产品类别，因此我们在分类头中引入多标签目标。我们证明了我们的方法对于两个独立任务的有效性：1）基于图像的每个单独促销的描述检测，2）使用产品描述中的文本对产品类别进行多标签分类。我们使用由尼尔森获得的数字传单图像组成的私人数据集来训练和评估我们的模型。结果表明，我们在所有实验中始终大幅优于建议的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合文本和视觉信息的端到端方法，用于对数字传单中的促销内容进行多标签分类，将其归类到对应的产品类别中。
AI.motivation: 数字传单中的促销信息以图像形式嵌入，难以提取和处理，而准确分类促销内容对电商下游任务至关重要。
AI.method: 方法分为三个关键步骤：1) 区域检测，2) 文本识别，3) 多标签文本分类。通过结合视觉与文本信息，利用多标签分类头处理单个促销可能涉及多个产品类别的特性。
AI.result: 在Nielsen提供的私有数据集上，模型在图像描述检测和多标签分类任务中均显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效整合视觉与文本信息，实现了对数字传单促销内容的准确多标签分类，为电商应用提供了可行方案。

title: Contour Primitive of Interest Extraction Network Based on One-Shot Learning for Object-Agnostic Vision Measurement
title_zh: 基于一次性学习的目标无关视觉测量的兴趣提取网络轮廓原语
abstract: Image contour based vision measurement is widely applied in robot manipulation and industrial automation. It is appealing to realize object-agnostic vision system, which can be conveniently reused for various types of objects. We propose the contour primitive of interest extraction network (CPieNet) based on the one-shot learning framework. First, CPieNet is featured by that its contour primitive of interest (CPI) output, a designated regular contour part lying on a specified object, provides the essential geometric information for vision measurement. Second, CPieNet has the one-shot learning ability, utilizing a support sample to assist the perception of the novel object. To realize lower-cost training, we generate support-query sample pairs from unpaired online public images, which cover a wide range of object categories. To obtain single-pixel wide contour for precise measurement, the Gabor-filters based non-maximum suppression is designed to thin the raw contour. For the novel CPI extraction task, we built the Object Contour Primitives dataset using online public images, and the Robotic Object Contour Measurement dataset using a camera mounted on a robot. The effectiveness of the proposed methods is validated by a series of experiments.
summary: Image contour based vision measurement is widely applied in robot manipulation and industrial automation. It is appealing to realize object-agnostic vision system, which can be conveniently reused for various types of objects. We propose the contour primitive of interest extraction network (CPieNet) based on the one-shot learning framework. First, CPieNet is featured by that its contour primitive of interest (CPI) output, a designated regular contour part lying on a specified object, provides the essential geometric information for vision measurement. Second, CPieNet has the one-shot learning ability, utilizing a support sample to assist the perception of the novel object. To realize lower-cost training, we generate support-query sample pairs from unpaired online public images, which cover a wide range of object categories. To obtain single-pixel wide contour for precise measurement, the Gabor-filters based non-maximum suppression is designed to thin the raw contour. For the novel CPI extraction task, we built the Object Contour Primitives dataset using online public images, and the Robotic Object Contour Measurement dataset using a camera mounted on a robot. The effectiveness of the proposed methods is validated by a series of experiments.
abstract_zh: 基于图像轮廓的视觉测量广泛应用于机器人操纵和工业自动化。实现与对象无关的视觉系统很有吸引力，它可以方便地重用于各种类型的对象。我们提出了基于一次性学习框架的轮廓基元兴趣提取网络（CPieNet）。首先，CPieNet 的特点是其感兴趣轮廓基元（CPI）输出，即位于指定物体上的指定规则轮廓部分，为视觉测量提供了必要的几何信息。其次，CPieNet具有一次性学习能力，利用支持样本来辅助新物体的感知。为了实现较低成本的训练，我们从不配对的在线公共图像中生成支持查询样本对，这些图像涵盖了广泛的对象类别。为了获得单像素宽轮廓以进行精确测量，设计了基于Gabor滤波器的非极大值抑制来细化原始轮廓。对于新颖的 CPI 提取任务，我们使用在线公共图像构建了对象轮廓基元数据集，并使用安装在机器人上的相机构建了机器人对象轮廓测量数据集。通过一系列实验验证了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于单次学习的轮廓特征提取网络CPieNet，用于实现无需物体先验知识的视觉测量系统。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉测量系统通常依赖特定物体模型，难以灵活适应多种物体。研究旨在开发一种无需物体先验知识、可复用的视觉测量框架。
AI.method: 设计CPieNet网络提取物体轮廓特征，结合单次学习框架利用支持样本进行新物体感知；通过Gabor滤波器实现单像素级轮廓细化，并构建两个公开数据集验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明CPieNet在多种物体的轮廓提取和视觉测量任务中均达到较高精度，验证了方法在无监督场景下的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的单次学习轮廓提取方法为通用视觉测量提供了新思路，数据集构建和网络设计对工业自动化领域具有实际应用价值。

title: YOdar: Uncertainty-based Sensor Fusion for Vehicle Detection with Camera and Radar Sensors
title_zh: YOdar：基于不确定性的传感器融合，用于使用摄像头和雷达传感器进行车辆检测
abstract: In this work, we present an uncertainty-based method for sensor fusion with camera and radar data. The outputs of two neural networks, one processing camera and the other one radar data, are combined in an uncertainty aware manner. To this end, we gather the outputs and corresponding meta information for both networks. For each predicted object, the gathered information is post-processed by a gradient boosting method to produce a joint prediction of both networks. In our experiments we combine the YOLOv3 object detection network with a customized $1D$ radar segmentation network and evaluate our method on the nuScenes dataset. In particular we focus on night scenes, where the capability of object detection networks based on camera data is potentially handicapped. Our experiments show, that this approach of uncertainty aware fusion, which is also of very modular nature, significantly gains performance compared to single sensor baselines and is in range of specifically tailored deep learning based fusion approaches.
summary: In this work, we present an uncertainty-based method for sensor fusion with camera and radar data. The outputs of two neural networks, one processing camera and the other one radar data, are combined in an uncertainty aware manner. To this end, we gather the outputs and corresponding meta information for both networks. For each predicted object, the gathered information is post-processed by a gradient boosting method to produce a joint prediction of both networks. In our experiments we combine the YOLOv3 object detection network with a customized $1D$ radar segmentation network and evaluate our method on the nuScenes dataset. In particular we focus on night scenes, where the capability of object detection networks based on camera data is potentially handicapped. Our experiments show, that this approach of uncertainty aware fusion, which is also of very modular nature, significantly gains performance compared to single sensor baselines and is in range of specifically tailored deep learning based fusion approaches.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于不确定性的传感器与相机和雷达数据融合的方法。两个神经网络（一个处理摄像头和另一个雷达数据）的输出以不确定性感知方式组合。为此，我们收集两个网络的输出和相应的元信息。对于每个预测对象，收集的信息通过梯度增强方法进行后处理，以产生两个网络的联合预测。在我们的实验中，我们将 YOLOv3 目标检测网络与定制的 $1D$ 雷达分割网络相结合，并在 nuScenes 数据集上评估我们的方法。我们特别关注夜间场景，其中基于摄像机数据的物体检测网络的能力可能会受到限制。我们的实验表明，这种不确定性感知融合方法也具有非常模块化的性质，与单传感器基线相比，显着提高了性能，并且属于专门定制的基于深度学习的融合方法的范围。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于不确定性的摄像头与雷达传感器融合方法，用于提升夜间车辆检测性能。
AI.motivation: 摄像头在夜间场景下检测能力受限，而雷达数据受环境影响较小，需通过传感器融合提升检测鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用YOLOv3处理摄像头数据，定制1D雷达分割网络，通过梯度提升方法融合两者的输出及不确定性信息。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集夜间场景中，该方法优于单一传感器基线及专门深度学习融合方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提模块化不确定性融合框架有效，可推广至其他多传感器融合任务。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于不确定性的摄像头与雷达传感器融合方法，用于提升夜间车辆检测性能。
ai_content.motivation: 摄像头在夜间场景下检测能力受限，而雷达数据受环境影响较小，需通过传感器融合提升检测鲁棒性。
ai_content.method: 采用YOLOv3处理摄像头数据，定制1D雷达分割网络，通过梯度提升方法融合两者的输出及不确定性信息。
ai_content.result: 在nuScenes数据集夜间场景中，该方法优于单一传感器基线及专门深度学习融合方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 所提模块化不确定性融合框架有效，可推广至其他多传感器融合任务。

search_text: YOdar: Uncertainty-based Sensor Fusion for Vehicle Detection with Camera and Radar Sensors YOdar：基于不确定性的传感器融合，用于使用摄像头和雷达传感器进行车辆检测 In this work, we present an uncertainty-based method for sensor fusion with camera and radar data. The outputs of two neural networks, one processing camera and the other one radar data, are combined in an uncertainty aware manner. To this end, we gather the outputs and corresponding meta information for both networks. For each predicted object, the gathered information is post-processed by a gradient boosting method to produce a joint prediction of both networks. In our experiments we combine the YOLOv3 object detection network with a customized $1D$ radar segmentation network and evaluate our method on the nuScenes dataset. In particular we focus on night scenes, where the capability of object detection networks based on camera data is potentially handicapped. Our experiments show, that this approach of uncertainty aware fusion, which is also of very modular nature, significantly gains performance compared to single sensor baselines and is in range of specifically tailored deep learning based fusion approaches. 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于不确定性的传感器与相机和雷达数据融合的方法。两个神经网络（一个处理摄像头和另一个雷达数据）的输出以不确定性感知方式组合。为此，我们收集两个网络的输出和相应的元信息。对于每个预测对象，收集的信息通过梯度增强方法进行后处理，以产生两个网络的联合预测。在我们的实验中，我们将 YOLOv3 目标检测网络与定制的 $1D$ 雷达分割网络相结合，并在 nuScenes 数据集上评估我们的方法。我们特别关注夜间场景，其中基于摄像机数据的物体检测网络的能力可能会受到限制。我们的实验表明，这种不确定性感知融合方法也具有非常模块化的性质，与单传感器基线相比，显着提高了性能，并且属于专门定制的基于深度学习的融合方法的范围。 本文提出一种基于不确定性的摄像头与雷达传感器融合方法，用于提升夜间车辆检测性能。 Kamil Kowol,Matthias Rottmann,Stefan Bracke,Hanno Gottschalk cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Rotation-Invariant Local-to-Global Representation Learning for 3D Point Cloud
title_zh: 3D 点云的旋转不变局部到全局表示学习
abstract: We propose a local-to-global representation learning algorithm for 3D point cloud data, which is appropriate to handle various geometric transformations, especially rotation, without explicit data augmentation with respect to the transformations. Our model takes advantage of multi-level abstraction based on graph convolutional neural networks, which constructs a descriptor hierarchy to encode rotation-invariant shape information of an input object in a bottom-up manner. The descriptors in each level are obtained from a neural network based on a graph via stochastic sampling of 3D points, which is effective in making the learned representations robust to the variations of input data. The proposed algorithm presents the state-of-the-art performance on the rotation-augmented 3D object recognition and segmentation benchmarks, and we further analyze its characteristics through comprehensive ablative experiments.
summary: We propose a local-to-global representation learning algorithm for 3D point cloud data, which is appropriate to handle various geometric transformations, especially rotation, without explicit data augmentation with respect to the transformations. Our model takes advantage of multi-level abstraction based on graph convolutional neural networks, which constructs a descriptor hierarchy to encode rotation-invariant shape information of an input object in a bottom-up manner. The descriptors in each level are obtained from a neural network based on a graph via stochastic sampling of 3D points, which is effective in making the learned representations robust to the variations of input data. The proposed algorithm presents the state-of-the-art performance on the rotation-augmented 3D object recognition and segmentation benchmarks, and we further analyze its characteristics through comprehensive ablative experiments.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于 3D 点云数据的局部到全局表示学习算法，该算法适合处理各种几何变换，尤其是旋转，而无需针对变换进行显式数据增强。我们的模型利用基于图卷积神经网络的多级抽象，构建描述符层次结构，以自下而上的方式对输入对象的旋转不变形状信息进行编码。每个级别的描述符都是通过 3D 点的随机采样从基于图的神经网络获得的，这可以有效地使学习到的表示对输入数据的变化具有鲁棒性。所提出的算法在旋转增强 3D 对象识别和分割基准上呈现出最先进的性能，并且我们通过全面的烧蚀实验进一步分析了其特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需显式数据增强的3D点云旋转不变局部到全局表示学习方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法处理3D点云旋转等几何变换时依赖显式数据增强，存在效率低、泛化性差的问题。
AI.method: 基于图卷积网络构建多级抽象描述符层次结构，通过随机抽样3D点实现旋转不变特征编码。
AI.result: 在旋转增强基准测试中达到最先进水平，消融实验证明方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过层次化特征学习实现了对旋转变化的鲁棒性，为3D点云处理提供新思路。

title: Batch Normalization Increases Adversarial Vulnerability and Decreases Adversarial Transferability: A Non-Robust Feature Perspective
title_zh: 批量归一化增加了对抗性脆弱性并降低了对抗性可转移性：非鲁棒特征视角
abstract: Batch normalization (BN) has been widely used in modern deep neural networks (DNNs) due to improved convergence. BN is observed to increase the model accuracy while at the cost of adversarial robustness. There is an increasing interest in the ML community to understand the impact of BN on DNNs, especially related to the model robustness. This work attempts to understand the impact of BN on DNNs from a non-robust feature perspective. Straightforwardly, the improved accuracy can be attributed to the better utilization of useful features. It remains unclear whether BN mainly favors learning robust features (RFs) or non-robust features (NRFs). Our work presents empirical evidence that supports that BN shifts a model towards being more dependent on NRFs. To facilitate the analysis of such a feature robustness shift, we propose a framework for disentangling robust usefulness into robustness and usefulness. Extensive analysis under the proposed framework yields valuable insight on the DNN behavior regarding robustness, e.g. DNNs first mainly learn RFs and then NRFs. The insight that RFs transfer better than NRFs, further inspires simple techniques to strengthen transfer-based black-box attacks.
summary: Batch normalization (BN) has been widely used in modern deep neural networks (DNNs) due to improved convergence. BN is observed to increase the model accuracy while at the cost of adversarial robustness. There is an increasing interest in the ML community to understand the impact of BN on DNNs, especially related to the model robustness. This work attempts to understand the impact of BN on DNNs from a non-robust feature perspective. Straightforwardly, the improved accuracy can be attributed to the better utilization of useful features. It remains unclear whether BN mainly favors learning robust features (RFs) or non-robust features (NRFs). Our work presents empirical evidence that supports that BN shifts a model towards being more dependent on NRFs. To facilitate the analysis of such a feature robustness shift, we propose a framework for disentangling robust usefulness into robustness and usefulness. Extensive analysis under the proposed framework yields valuable insight on the DNN behavior regarding robustness, e.g. DNNs first mainly learn RFs and then NRFs. The insight that RFs transfer better than NRFs, further inspires simple techniques to strengthen transfer-based black-box attacks.
abstract_zh: 由于改进的收敛性，批归一化（BN）已广泛应用于现代深度神经网络（DNN）中。据观察，BN 可以提高模型精度，但代价是对抗性鲁棒性。 ML 社区越来越有兴趣了解 BN 对 DNN 的影响，尤其是与模型鲁棒性相关的影响。这项工作试图从非鲁棒特征的角度理解 BN 对 DNN 的影响。简单地说，准确性的提高可以归因于有用特征的更好利用。目前尚不清楚 BN 主要倾向于学习鲁棒特征（RF）还是非鲁棒特征（NRF）。我们的工作提供了经验证据，支持 BN 将模型转向更加依赖 NRF。为了便于分析这种特征鲁棒性转变，我们提出了一个将鲁棒有用性分解为鲁棒性和有用性的框架。在所提出的框架下进行的广泛分析可以对 DNN 鲁棒性行为产生有价值的见解，例如DNN 首先主要学习 RF，然后学习 NRF。 RF 传输比 NRF 更好的见解进一步激发了增强基于传输的黑盒攻击的简单技术。

AI.tldr: 本文从非鲁棒特征视角分析批量归一化（BN）对深度神经网络（DNN）对抗鲁棒性的影响，揭示其如何增加模型的对抗脆弱性并降低对抗迁移性。
AI.motivation: BN虽提升模型准确率，但会削弱对抗鲁棒性。现有研究尚未明确BN是更倾向于学习鲁棒特征（RFs）还是非鲁棒特征（NRFs），需深入理解其对模型鲁棒性的具体影响机制。
AI.method: 提出一种将鲁棒性与特征有用性解耦的分析框架，通过实证研究对比BN对RFs和NRFs的依赖性差异，并结合对抗攻击实验验证特征迁移性差异。
AI.result: 实验证明BN使模型更依赖NRFs，且RFs比NRFs具有更好的迁移性。基于此发现，提出增强基于迁移的黑盒攻击的简单技术。
AI.conclusion: BN通过强化非鲁棒特征学习降低模型对抗鲁棒性，同时其特征迁移性差异为改进对抗攻击方法提供了新思路。

authors_text: Chaoning Zhang,Philipp Benz,Tooba Imtiaz,In So Kweon
title: CD-UAP: Class Discriminative Universal Adversarial Perturbation
title_zh: CD-UAP：类判别性普遍对抗性扰动
abstract: A single universal adversarial perturbation (UAP) can be added to all natural images to change most of their predicted class labels. It is of high practical relevance for an attacker to have flexible control over the targeted classes to be attacked, however, the existing UAP method attacks samples from all classes. In this work, we propose a new universal attack method to generate a single perturbation that fools a target network to misclassify only a chosen group of classes, while having limited influence on the remaining classes. Since the proposed attack generates a universal adversarial perturbation that is discriminative to targeted and non-targeted classes, we term it class discriminative universal adversarial perturbation (CD-UAP). We propose one simple yet effective algorithm framework, under which we design and compare various loss function configurations tailored for the class discriminative universal attack. The proposed approach has been evaluated with extensive experiments on various benchmark datasets. Additionally, our proposed approach achieves state-of-the-art performance for the original task of UAP attacking all classes, which demonstrates the effectiveness of our approach.
summary: A single universal adversarial perturbation (UAP) can be added to all natural images to change most of their predicted class labels. It is of high practical relevance for an attacker to have flexible control over the targeted classes to be attacked, however, the existing UAP method attacks samples from all classes. In this work, we propose a new universal attack method to generate a single perturbation that fools a target network to misclassify only a chosen group of classes, while having limited influence on the remaining classes. Since the proposed attack generates a universal adversarial perturbation that is discriminative to targeted and non-targeted classes, we term it class discriminative universal adversarial perturbation (CD-UAP). We propose one simple yet effective algorithm framework, under which we design and compare various loss function configurations tailored for the class discriminative universal attack. The proposed approach has been evaluated with extensive experiments on various benchmark datasets. Additionally, our proposed approach achieves state-of-the-art performance for the original task of UAP attacking all classes, which demonstrates the effectiveness of our approach.
abstract_zh: 可以将单个通用对抗性扰动（UAP）添加到所有自然图像中，以更改其大部分预测的类别标签。灵活控制待攻击的目标类别对于攻击者来说具有很高的实际意义，然而现有的UAP方法攻击的是所有类别的样本。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的通用攻击方法来生成单个扰动，欺骗目标网络仅对选定的一组类进行错误分类，同时对其余类的影响有限。由于所提出的攻击会产生一种对目标类别和非目标类别具有区分性的普遍对抗性扰动，因此我们将其称为类别歧视性普遍对抗性扰动（CD-UAP）。我们提出了一种简单而有效的算法框架，在该框架下，我们设计并比较了针对类判别通用攻击量身定制的各种损失函数配置。所提出的方法已经通过对各种基准数据集的广泛实验进行了评估。此外，我们提出的方法在 UAP 攻击所有类别的原始任务中实现了最先进的性能，这证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的通用对抗扰动方法CD-UAP，能够针对特定类别生成单一扰动以实现精准攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有通用对抗扰动（UAP）方法无法灵活控制目标类别，通常会对所有类别产生影响，缺乏对攻击目标的精细控制能力。
AI.method: 设计了一种简单有效的算法框架，通过定制化损失函数配置生成对目标类别具有判别性的通用对抗扰动，同时最小化对非目标类别的影响。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上实验验证了方法有效性，且在传统UAP攻击任务中达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: CD-UAP方法通过类判别性设计实现了对目标类别的精准攻击，同时保持对其他类别的低干扰，证明了方法的优越性。

title: Proximal Policy Optimization with Relative Pearson Divergence
title_zh: 具有相对皮尔逊散度的近端策略优化
abstract: The recent remarkable progress of deep reinforcement learning (DRL) stands on regularization of policy for stable and efficient learning. A popular method, named proximal policy optimization (PPO), has been introduced for this purpose. PPO clips density ratio of the latest and baseline policies with a threshold, while its minimization target is unclear. As another problem of PPO, the symmetric threshold is given numerically while the density ratio itself is in asymmetric domain, thereby causing unbalanced regularization of the policy. This paper therefore proposes a new variant of PPO by considering a regularization problem of relative Pearson (RPE) divergence, so-called PPO-RPE. This regularization yields the clear minimization target, which constrains the latest policy to the baseline one. Through its analysis, the intuitive threshold-based design consistent with the asymmetry of the threshold and the domain of density ratio can be derived. Through four benchmark tasks, PPO-RPE performed as well as or better than the conventional methods in terms of the task performance by the learned policy.
summary: The recent remarkable progress of deep reinforcement learning (DRL) stands on regularization of policy for stable and efficient learning. A popular method, named proximal policy optimization (PPO), has been introduced for this purpose. PPO clips density ratio of the latest and baseline policies with a threshold, while its minimization target is unclear. As another problem of PPO, the symmetric threshold is given numerically while the density ratio itself is in asymmetric domain, thereby causing unbalanced regularization of the policy. This paper therefore proposes a new variant of PPO by considering a regularization problem of relative Pearson (RPE) divergence, so-called PPO-RPE. This regularization yields the clear minimization target, which constrains the latest policy to the baseline one. Through its analysis, the intuitive threshold-based design consistent with the asymmetry of the threshold and the domain of density ratio can be derived. Through four benchmark tasks, PPO-RPE performed as well as or better than the conventional methods in terms of the task performance by the learned policy.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习（DRL）最近的显着进展代表着稳定高效学习的政策规范化。为此，引入了一种流行的方法，称为近端策略优化（PPO）。 PPO对最新政策和基线政策的密度比进行了阈值限制，而其最小化目标并不明确。 PPO的另一个问题是，对称阈值是数字给定的，而密度比本身处于非对称域，从而导致策略的正则化不平衡。因此，本文通过考虑相对皮尔逊（RPE）散度的正则化问题，提出了 PPO 的新变体，即所谓的 PPO-RPE。这种正则化产生了明确的最小化目标，它将最新的政策限制在基线政策之上。通过其分析，可以推导出符合阈值不对称性和密度比域的直观的基于阈值的设计。通过四个基准任务，PPO-RPE 在学习策略的任务性能方面表现与传统方法一样甚至更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于相对皮尔逊散度的近端策略优化方法（PPO-RPE），以解决传统PPO算法中目标不明确和正则化不平衡的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统PPO算法存在最小化目标不明确以及对称阈值与密度比不对称性导致的正则化不平衡问题，需改进其设计以提升策略优化效果。
AI.method: 通过引入相对皮尔逊散度（RPE）作为正则化项，明确策略更新的最小化目标，并推导出与密度比不对称性一致的阈值设计，形成PPO-RPE算法。
AI.result: 在四个基准任务中，PPO-RPE在策略性能上表现与传统方法相当或更优，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: PPO-RPE通过相对皮尔逊散度的正则化设计，解决了传统PPO的缺陷，在保持稳定性的同时提升了策略优化效果。

authors_text: Philipp Benz,Chaoning Zhang,Tooba Imtiaz,In So Kweon
title: Double Targeted Universal Adversarial Perturbations
title_zh: 双目标普遍对抗性扰动
abstract: Despite their impressive performance, deep neural networks (DNNs) are widely known to be vulnerable to adversarial attacks, which makes it challenging for them to be deployed in security-sensitive applications, such as autonomous driving. Image-dependent perturbations can fool a network for one specific image, while universal adversarial perturbations are capable of fooling a network for samples from all classes without selection. We introduce a double targeted universal adversarial perturbations (DT-UAPs) to bridge the gap between the instance-discriminative image-dependent perturbations and the generic universal perturbations. This universal perturbation attacks one targeted source class to sink class, while having a limited adversarial effect on other non-targeted source classes, for avoiding raising suspicions. Targeting the source and sink class simultaneously, we term it double targeted attack (DTA). This provides an attacker with the freedom to perform precise attacks on a DNN model while raising little suspicion. We show the effectiveness of the proposed DTA algorithm on a wide range of datasets and also demonstrate its potential as a physical attack.
summary: Despite their impressive performance, deep neural networks (DNNs) are widely known to be vulnerable to adversarial attacks, which makes it challenging for them to be deployed in security-sensitive applications, such as autonomous driving. Image-dependent perturbations can fool a network for one specific image, while universal adversarial perturbations are capable of fooling a network for samples from all classes without selection. We introduce a double targeted universal adversarial perturbations (DT-UAPs) to bridge the gap between the instance-discriminative image-dependent perturbations and the generic universal perturbations. This universal perturbation attacks one targeted source class to sink class, while having a limited adversarial effect on other non-targeted source classes, for avoiding raising suspicions. Targeting the source and sink class simultaneously, we term it double targeted attack (DTA). This provides an attacker with the freedom to perform precise attacks on a DNN model while raising little suspicion. We show the effectiveness of the proposed DTA algorithm on a wide range of datasets and also demonstrate its potential as a physical attack.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度神经网络 (DNN) 的性能令人印象深刻，但众所周知，它容易受到对抗性攻击，这使得它们在自动驾驶等安全敏感应用中部署面临挑战。与图像相关的扰动可以欺骗网络获取一幅特定图像，而通用对抗性扰动则能够欺骗网络获取来自所有类别的样本而不进行选择。我们引入了双目标通用对抗性扰动（DT-UAP）来弥合实例判别性图像相关扰动和通用通用扰动之间的差距。这种普遍的扰动从一个目标源类到下沉类进行攻击，同时对其他非目标源类产生有限的对抗性影响，以避免引起怀疑。同时针对源类和接收器类，我们将其称为双重目标攻击（DTA）。这为攻击者提供了对 DNN 模型执行精确攻击的自由，同时几乎不会引起怀疑。我们展示了所提出的 DTA 算法在广泛的数据集上的有效性，并展示了其作为物理攻击的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双目标通用对抗扰动（DT-UAPs），旨在通过同时针对源类和目标类，实现对深度神经网络的更隐蔽的对抗攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗扰动要么针对特定图像（效果有限），要么对所有类别通用（易被察觉）。需设计一种既能精准攻击目标类别又不易引起怀疑的扰动方法。
AI.method: 提出双目标对抗攻击（DTA）算法，在生成通用扰动时同时指定源类和目标类，使扰动对非目标类影响有限，从而降低被检测风险。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证了DTA算法的有效性，并展示了其作为物理攻击的潜在威胁。
AI.conclusion: DTA方法通过双目标设计实现了更隐蔽且高效的对抗攻击，为深度学习模型的安全性研究提供了新视角。

ai_content.conclusion: DTA方法通过双目标设计实现了更隐蔽且高效的对抗攻击，为深度学习模型的安全性研究提供了新视角。

ai_content_json.method: 提出双目标对抗攻击（DTA）算法，在生成通用扰动时同时指定源类和目标类，使扰动对非目标类影响有限，从而降低被检测风险。
ai_content_json.result: 在多个数据集上验证了DTA算法的有效性，并展示了其作为物理攻击的潜在威胁。
ai_content_json.conclusion: DTA方法通过双目标设计实现了更隐蔽且高效的对抗攻击，为深度学习模型的安全性研究提供了新视角。

search_text: Double Targeted Universal Adversarial Perturbations 双目标普遍对抗性扰动 Despite their impressive performance, deep neural networks (DNNs) are widely known to be vulnerable to adversarial attacks, which makes it challenging for them to be deployed in security-sensitive applications, such as autonomous driving. Image-dependent perturbations can fool a network for one specific image, while universal adversarial perturbations are capable of fooling a network for samples from all classes without selection. We introduce a double targeted universal adversarial perturbations (DT-UAPs) to bridge the gap between the instance-discriminative image-dependent perturbations and the generic universal perturbations. This universal perturbation attacks one targeted source class to sink class, while having a limited adversarial effect on other non-targeted source classes, for avoiding raising suspicions. Targeting the source and sink class simultaneously, we term it double targeted attack (DTA). This provides an attacker with the freedom to perform precise attacks on a DNN model while raising little suspicion. We show the effectiveness of the proposed DTA algorithm on a wide range of datasets and also demonstrate its potential as a physical attack. 尽管深度神经网络 (DNN) 的性能令人印象深刻，但众所周知，它容易受到对抗性攻击，这使得它们在自动驾驶等安全敏感应用中部署面临挑战。与图像相关的扰动可以欺骗网络获取一幅特定图像，而通用对抗性扰动则能够欺骗网络获取来自所有类别的样本而不进行选择。我们引入了双目标通用对抗性扰动（DT-UAP）来弥合实例判别性图像相关扰动和通用通用扰动之间的差距。这种普遍的扰动从一个目标源类到下沉类进行攻击，同时对其他非目标源类产生有限的对抗性影响，以避免引起怀疑。同时针对源类和接收器类，我们将其称为双重目标攻击（DTA）。这为攻击者提供了对 DNN 模型执行精确攻击的自由，同时几乎不会引起怀疑。我们展示了所提出的 DTA 算法在广泛的数据集上的有效性，并展示了其作为物理攻击的潜力。 本文提出了一种双目标通用对抗扰动（DT-UAPs），旨在通过同时针对源类和目标类，实现对深度神经网络的更隐蔽的对抗攻击。 Philipp Benz,Chaoning Zhang,Tooba Imtiaz,In So Kweon cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV

title: New Verification Schemes for Frequency-Based Functions on Data Streams
title_zh: 数据流上基于频率的函数的新验证方案
abstract: We study the general problem of computing frequency-based functions, i.e., the sum of any given function of data stream frequencies. Special cases include fundamental data stream problems such as computing the number of distinct elements ($F_0$), frequency moments ($F_k$), and heavy-hitters. It can also be applied to calculate the maximum frequency of an element ($F_{\infty}$). Given that exact computation of most of these special cases provably do not admit any sublinear space algorithm, a natural approach is to consider them in an enhanced data streaming model, where we have a computationally unbounded but untrusted prover sending proofs or help messages to ease the computation. Think of a memory-restricted client delegating the computation to a stronger cloud service whom it doesn't want to trust blindly. Using its limited memory, it wants to verify the proof that the cloud sends. Chakrabarti et al.~(ICALP '09) introduced this setting as the "annotated data streaming model" and showed that multiple problems including exact computation of frequency-based functions---that have no sublinear algorithms in basic streaming---do have annotated streaming algorithms, also called "schemes", with both space and proof-length sublinear in the input size. We give a general scheme for computing any frequency-based function with both space usage and proof-size of $O(n^{2/3}\log n)$ bits, where $n$ is the size of the universe. This improves upon the best known bound of $O(n^{2/3}\log^{4/3} n)$ given by the seminal paper of Chakrabarti et al.~and as a result, also improves upon the best known bounds for the important special cases of computing $F_0$ and $F_{\infty}$. We emphasize that while being quantitatively better, our scheme is also qualitatively better in the sense that it is simpler than the previously best scheme that uses intricate data structures and elaborate subroutines.
summary: We study the general problem of computing frequency-based functions, i.e., the sum of any given function of data stream frequencies. Special cases include fundamental data stream problems such as computing the number of distinct elements ($F_0$), frequency moments ($F_k$), and heavy-hitters. It can also be applied to calculate the maximum frequency of an element ($F_{\infty}$). Given that exact computation of most of these special cases provably do not admit any sublinear space algorithm, a natural approach is to consider them in an enhanced data streaming model, where we have a computationally unbounded but untrusted prover sending proofs or help messages to ease the computation. Think of a memory-restricted client delegating the computation to a stronger cloud service whom it doesn't want to trust blindly. Using its limited memory, it wants to verify the proof that the cloud sends. Chakrabarti et al.~(ICALP '09) introduced this setting as the "annotated data streaming model" and showed that multiple problems including exact computation of frequency-based functions---that have no sublinear algorithms in basic streaming---do have annotated streaming algorithms, also called "schemes", with both space and proof-length sublinear in the input size. We give a general scheme for computing any frequency-based function with both space usage and proof-size of $O(n^{2/3}\log n)$ bits, where $n$ is the size of the universe. This improves upon the best known bound of $O(n^{2/3}\log^{4/3} n)$ given by the seminal paper of Chakrabarti et al.~and as a result, also improves upon the best known bounds for the important special cases of computing $F_0$ and $F_{\infty}$. We emphasize that while being quantitatively better, our scheme is also qualitatively better in the sense that it is simpler than the previously best scheme that uses intricate data structures and elaborate subroutines.
abstract_zh: 我们研究计算基于频率的函数的一般问题，即数据流频率的任何给定函数的总和。特殊情况包括基本数据流问题，例如计算不同元素的数量 ($F_0$)、频率矩 ($F_k$) 和重要因素。它还可以用于计算元素的最大频率（$F_{\infty}$）。鉴于大多数这些特殊情况的精确计算可证明不允许任何亚线性空间算法，一种自然的方法是在增强的数据流模型中考虑它们，其中我们有一个计算上无限制但不受信任的证明者发送证明或帮助消息以简化计算。想象一个内存受限的客户端将计算委托给一个更强大的云服务，但它不想盲目信任该云服务。它想要利用其有限的内存来验证云发送的证据。 Chakrabarti 等人~(ICALP '09) 将此设置引入为“带注释的数据流模型”，并表明，包括基于频率的函数的精确计算在内的多个问题（在基本流中没有次线性算法）确实具有带注释的流算法，也称为“方案”，在输入大小中空间和证明长度都是次线性的。我们给出了计算任何基于频率的函数的通用方案，其空间使用和证明大小均为 $O(n^{2/3}\log n)$ 位，其中 $n$ 是宇宙的大小。这改进了 Chakrabarti 等人的开创性论文给出的 $O(n^{2/3}\log^{4/3} n)$ 的已知界限，因此，也改进了计算 $F_0$ 和 $F_{\infty}$ 的重要特殊情况的已知界限。我们强调，虽然在数量上更好，但我们的方案在质量上也更好，因为它比以前使用复杂数据结构和复杂子例程的最佳方案更简单。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于数据流中频率函数计算的新验证方案，通过引入不可信证明者模型来解决子线性空间限制下的计算问题。
AI.motivation: 传统数据流中精确计算频率函数（如F0、Fk、F∞）需要超线性空间，而现有方案在空间效率和复杂度上存在不足，需设计更高效的验证机制。
AI.method: 基于注释数据流模型，设计通用验证方案，利用分层抽样和哈希技术，将空间复杂度和证明长度降至O(n^{2/3} log n)。
AI.result: 改进了Chakrabarti等人O(n^{2/3} log^{4/3} n)的界，同时简化了算法结构，显著优化了F0和F∞等关键问题的计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方案在理论界和工程实现上均优于现有方法，为数据流验证提供了更简洁高效的通用框架。

title: Less is more: Faster and better music version identification with embedding distillation
title_zh: 少即是多：通过嵌入蒸馏更快更好地识别音乐版本
comment: Accepted to the 21st International Society for Music Information Retrieval Conference (ISMIR 2020)
comments: Accepted to the 21st International Society for Music Information Retrieval Conference (ISMIR 2020)
abstract: Version identification systems aim to detect different renditions of the same underlying musical composition (loosely called cover songs). By learning to encode entire recordings into plain vector embeddings, recent systems have made significant progress in bridging the gap between accuracy and scalability, which has been a key challenge for nearly two decades. In this work, we propose to further narrow this gap by employing a set of data distillation techniques that reduce the embedding dimensionality of a pre-trained state-of-the-art model. We compare a wide range of techniques and propose new ones, from classical dimensionality reduction to more sophisticated distillation schemes. With those, we obtain 99% smaller embeddings that, moreover, yield up to a 3% accuracy increase. Such small embeddings can have an important impact in retrieval time, up to the point of making a real-world system practical on a standalone laptop.
summary: Version identification systems aim to detect different renditions of the same underlying musical composition (loosely called cover songs). By learning to encode entire recordings into plain vector embeddings, recent systems have made significant progress in bridging the gap between accuracy and scalability, which has been a key challenge for nearly two decades. In this work, we propose to further narrow this gap by employing a set of data distillation techniques that reduce the embedding dimensionality of a pre-trained state-of-the-art model. We compare a wide range of techniques and propose new ones, from classical dimensionality reduction to more sophisticated distillation schemes. With those, we obtain 99% smaller embeddings that, moreover, yield up to a 3% accuracy increase. Such small embeddings can have an important impact in retrieval time, up to the point of making a real-world system practical on a standalone laptop.
abstract_zh: 版本识别系统旨在检测同一基础音乐作品（宽松地称为翻唱歌曲）的不同演绎。通过学习将整个录音编码为普通向量嵌入，最近的系统在弥合准确性和可扩展性之间的差距方面取得了重大进展，这一直是近二十年来的一个关键挑战。在这项工作中，我们建议通过采用一组数据蒸馏技术来进一步缩小这一差距，这些技术可以减少预先训练的最先进模型的嵌入维数。我们比较了多种技术并提出了新的技术，从经典的降维到更复杂的蒸馏方案。通过这些，我们获得了 99% 的较小嵌入，此外，准确率提高了 3%。这种小的嵌入可以对检索时间产生重要影响，甚至可以使现实世界的系统在独立笔记本电脑上实用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过嵌入蒸馏技术缩小预训练模型的嵌入维度，以提升音乐版本识别系统的效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐版本识别系统在准确率与可扩展性之间存在矛盾，需进一步缩小嵌入表示以提高实际应用效率。
AI.method: 采用数据蒸馏技术，包括经典降维方法和新型蒸馏方案，压缩预训练模型的嵌入维度。
AI.result: 实现嵌入体积缩小99%的同时，准确率提升3%，显著降低检索时间并支持单机部署。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持高精度的前提下大幅优化系统效率，为实际音乐版本识别应用提供了可行方案。

search_text: Less is more: Faster and better music version identification with embedding distillation 少即是多：通过嵌入蒸馏更快更好地识别音乐版本 Version identification systems aim to detect different renditions of the same underlying musical composition (loosely called cover songs). By learning to encode entire recordings into plain vector embeddings, recent systems have made significant progress in bridging the gap between accuracy and scalability, which has been a key challenge for nearly two decades. In this work, we propose to further narrow this gap by employing a set of data distillation techniques that reduce the embedding dimensionality of a pre-trained state-of-the-art model. We compare a wide range of techniques and propose new ones, from classical dimensionality reduction to more sophisticated distillation schemes. With those, we obtain 99% smaller embeddings that, moreover, yield up to a 3% accuracy increase. Such small embeddings can have an important impact in retrieval time, up to the point of making a real-world system practical on a standalone laptop. 版本识别系统旨在检测同一基础音乐作品（宽松地称为翻唱歌曲）的不同演绎。通过学习将整个录音编码为普通向量嵌入，最近的系统在弥合准确性和可扩展性之间的差距方面取得了重大进展，这一直是近二十年来的一个关键挑战。在这项工作中，我们建议通过采用一组数据蒸馏技术来进一步缩小这一差距，这些技术可以减少预先训练的最先进模型的嵌入维数。我们比较了多种技术并提出了新的技术，从经典的降维到更复杂的蒸馏方案。通过这些，我们获得了 99% 的较小嵌入，此外，准确率提高了 3%。这种小的嵌入可以对检索时间产生重要影响，甚至可以使现实世界的系统在独立笔记本电脑上实用。 本文提出通过嵌入蒸馏技术缩小预训练模型的嵌入维度，以提升音乐版本识别系统的效率和准确性。 Furkan Yesiler,Joan Serrà,Emilia Gómez cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

title: Don't Trigger Me! A Triggerless Backdoor Attack Against Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 别触发我！针对深度神经网络的无触发后门攻击
abstract: Backdoor attack against deep neural networks is currently being profoundly investigated due to its severe security consequences. Current state-of-the-art backdoor attacks require the adversary to modify the input, usually by adding a trigger to it, for the target model to activate the backdoor. This added trigger not only increases the difficulty of launching the backdoor attack in the physical world, but also can be easily detected by multiple defense mechanisms. In this paper, we present the first triggerless backdoor attack against deep neural networks, where the adversary does not need to modify the input for triggering the backdoor. Our attack is based on the dropout technique. Concretely, we associate a set of target neurons that are dropped out during model training with the target label. In the prediction phase, the model will output the target label when the target neurons are dropped again, i.e., the backdoor attack is launched. This triggerless feature of our attack makes it practical in the physical world. Extensive experiments show that our triggerless backdoor attack achieves a perfect attack success rate with a negligible damage to the model's utility.
summary: Backdoor attack against deep neural networks is currently being profoundly investigated due to its severe security consequences. Current state-of-the-art backdoor attacks require the adversary to modify the input, usually by adding a trigger to it, for the target model to activate the backdoor. This added trigger not only increases the difficulty of launching the backdoor attack in the physical world, but also can be easily detected by multiple defense mechanisms. In this paper, we present the first triggerless backdoor attack against deep neural networks, where the adversary does not need to modify the input for triggering the backdoor. Our attack is based on the dropout technique. Concretely, we associate a set of target neurons that are dropped out during model training with the target label. In the prediction phase, the model will output the target label when the target neurons are dropped again, i.e., the backdoor attack is launched. This triggerless feature of our attack makes it practical in the physical world. Extensive experiments show that our triggerless backdoor attack achieves a perfect attack success rate with a negligible damage to the model's utility.
abstract_zh: 由于其严重的安全后果，针对深度神经网络的后门攻击目前正在深入研究。当前最先进的后门攻击要求对手修改输入，通常是通过向其添加触发器，以便目标模型激活后门。这种增加的触发器不仅增加了在物理世界发起后门攻击的难度，而且很容易被多种防御机制检测到。在本文中，我们提出了第一个针对深度神经网络的无触发后门攻击，其中对手不需要修改输入来触发后门。我们的攻击基于 dropout 技术。具体来说，我们将模型训练期间丢失的一组目标神经元与目标标签相关联。在预测阶段，当目标神经元再次被丢弃时，即发起后门攻击，模型将输出目标标签。我们的攻击的这种无触发功能使其在现实世界中变得实用。大量实验表明，我们的无触发后门攻击实现了完美的攻击成功率，对模型效用的损害可以忽略不计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需触发器的深度神经网络后门攻击方法，通过利用dropout技术实现目标标签的触发。
AI.motivation: 现有后门攻击依赖于物理世界难以实施且易被检测的触发器，本文旨在消除触发器需求以提升攻击实用性与隐蔽性。
AI.method: 基于dropout机制，将训练阶段随机丢弃的特定神经元与目标标签关联，预测时通过再次丢弃这些神经元即可激活后门。
AI.result: 实验表明该攻击在保持模型实用性能几乎无损的前提下，实现了完美的攻击成功率。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的无触发器后门攻击方法为深度学习模型提供了新的安全威胁视角，凸显了现有防御机制的不足。

title: Learning to Explain: Datasets and Models for Identifying Valid Reasoning Chains in Multihop Question-Answering
title_zh: 学习解释：用于识别多跳问答中有效推理链的数据集和模型
abstract: Despite the rapid progress in multihop question-answering (QA), models still have trouble explaining why an answer is correct, with limited explanation training data available to learn from. To address this, we introduce three explanation datasets in which explanations formed from corpus facts are annotated. Our first dataset, eQASC, contains over 98K explanation annotations for the multihop question answering dataset QASC, and is the first that annotates multiple candidate explanations for each answer. The second dataset eQASC-perturbed is constructed by crowd-sourcing perturbations (while preserving their validity) of a subset of explanations in QASC, to test consistency and generalization of explanation prediction models. The third dataset eOBQA is constructed by adding explanation annotations to the OBQA dataset to test generalization of models trained on eQASC. We show that this data can be used to significantly improve explanation quality (+14% absolute F1 over a strong retrieval baseline) using a BERT-based classifier, but still behind the upper bound, offering a new challenge for future research. We also explore a delexicalized chain representation in which repeated noun phrases are replaced by variables, thus turning them into generalized reasoning chains (for example: "X is a Y" AND "Y has Z" IMPLIES "X has Z"). We find that generalized chains maintain performance while also being more robust to certain perturbations.
summary: Despite the rapid progress in multihop question-answering (QA), models still have trouble explaining why an answer is correct, with limited explanation training data available to learn from. To address this, we introduce three explanation datasets in which explanations formed from corpus facts are annotated. Our first dataset, eQASC, contains over 98K explanation annotations for the multihop question answering dataset QASC, and is the first that annotates multiple candidate explanations for each answer. The second dataset eQASC-perturbed is constructed by crowd-sourcing perturbations (while preserving their validity) of a subset of explanations in QASC, to test consistency and generalization of explanation prediction models. The third dataset eOBQA is constructed by adding explanation annotations to the OBQA dataset to test generalization of models trained on eQASC. We show that this data can be used to significantly improve explanation quality (+14% absolute F1 over a strong retrieval baseline) using a BERT-based classifier, but still behind the upper bound, offering a new challenge for future research. We also explore a delexicalized chain representation in which repeated noun phrases are replaced by variables, thus turning them into generalized reasoning chains (for example: "X is a Y" AND "Y has Z" IMPLIES "X has Z"). We find that generalized chains maintain performance while also being more robust to certain perturbations.
abstract_zh: 尽管多跳问答 (QA) 领域取得了快速进展，但模型仍然难以解释答案为何正确，可供学习的解释训练数据有限。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了三个解释数据集，其中对由语料库事实形成的解释进行了注释。我们的第一个数据集 eQASC 包含多跳问答数据集 QASC 的超过 98K 个解释注释，并且是第一个为每个答案注释多个候选解释的数据集。第二个数据集 eQASC-perturbed 是通过 QASC 中解释子集的众包扰动（同时保留其有效性）构建的，以测试解释预测模型的一致性和泛化性。第三个数据集 eOBQA 是通过向 OBQA 数据集添加解释注释来构建的，以测试在 eQASC 上训练的模型的泛化能力。我们表明，使用基于 BERT 的分类器，这些数据可用于显着提高解释质量（在强检索基线上 +14% 的绝对 F1），但仍低于上限，为未来的研究提供了新的挑战。我们还探索了一种去词汇化链表示，其中重复的名词短语被变量替换，从而将它们变成广义推理链（例如：“X 是 Y”AND“Y 有 Z”意味着“X 有 Z”）。我们发现广义链在保持性能的同时对某些扰动也更加鲁棒。

AI.tldr: 该论文旨在构建数据集和模型以识别多跳问答中的有效推理链，提升模型的解释能力。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在多跳问答任务中难以生成合理解释，且缺乏足够的训练数据支持。
AI.method: 引入三个解释数据集（eQASC、eQASC-perturbed、eOBQA），并采用BERT分类器训练模型，同时提出去词化链表示方法。
AI.result: BERT分类器使解释质量提升14% F1值，但未达上限；去词化链表示在保持性能的同时更鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 新数据集和方法为解释生成提供有效途径，但仍需进一步研究以提升模型上限。
