title: Narrative Text Generation with a Latent Discrete Plan
title_zh: 具有潜在离散计划的叙事文本生成
abstract: Past work on story generation has demonstrated the usefulness of conditioning on a generation plan to generate coherent stories. However, these approaches have used heuristics or off-the-shelf models to first tag training stories with the desired type of plan, and then train generation models in a supervised fashion. In this paper, we propose a deep latent variable model that first samples a sequence of anchor words, one per sentence in the story, as part of its generative process. During training, our model treats the sequence of anchor words as a latent variable and attempts to induce anchoring sequences that help guide generation in an unsupervised fashion. We conduct experiments with several types of sentence decoder distributions: left-to-right and non-monotonic, with different degrees of restriction. Further, since we use amortized variational inference to train our model, we introduce two corresponding types of inference network for predicting the posterior on anchor words. We conduct human evaluations which demonstrate that the stories produced by our model are rated better in comparison with baselines which do not consider story plans, and are similar or better in quality relative to baselines which use external supervision for plans. Additionally, the proposed model gets favorable scores when evaluated on perplexity, diversity, and control of story via discrete plan.
summary: Past work on story generation has demonstrated the usefulness of conditioning on a generation plan to generate coherent stories. However, these approaches have used heuristics or off-the-shelf models to first tag training stories with the desired type of plan, and then train generation models in a supervised fashion. In this paper, we propose a deep latent variable model that first samples a sequence of anchor words, one per sentence in the story, as part of its generative process. During training, our model treats the sequence of anchor words as a latent variable and attempts to induce anchoring sequences that help guide generation in an unsupervised fashion. We conduct experiments with several types of sentence decoder distributions: left-to-right and non-monotonic, with different degrees of restriction. Further, since we use amortized variational inference to train our model, we introduce two corresponding types of inference network for predicting the posterior on anchor words. We conduct human evaluations which demonstrate that the stories produced by our model are rated better in comparison with baselines which do not consider story plans, and are similar or better in quality relative to baselines which use external supervision for plans. Additionally, the proposed model gets favorable scores when evaluated on perplexity, diversity, and control of story via discrete plan.
abstract_zh: 过去关于故事生成的工作已经证明了对生成计划进行调节以生成连贯故事的有用性。然而，这些方法使用启发式或现成的模型，首先用所需的计划类型标记训练故事，然后以监督方式训练生成模型。在本文中，我们提出了一种深度潜在变量模型，该模型首先对锚定词序列进行采样，故事中的每个句子一个，作为其生成过程的一部分。在训练过程中，我们的模型将锚定词序列视为潜在变量，并尝试引入锚定序列，以帮助以无监督的方式指导生成。我们对几种类型的句子解码器分布进行了实验：从左到右和非单调，具有不同程度的限制。此外，由于我们使用摊销变分推理来训练我们的模型，因此我们引入了两种相应类型的推理网络来预测锚定词的后验。我们进行的人工评估表明，与不考虑故事计划的基线相比，我们的模型生成的故事得到了更好的评价，并且相对于使用外部监督计划的基线而言，质量相似或更好。此外，当通过离散计划对故事的复杂性、多样性和控制进行评估时，所提出的模型获得了良好的分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于潜在离散计划的叙事文本生成模型，通过无监督学习锚定词序列来提升故事连贯性和生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有故事生成方法依赖启发式或外部监督标记计划，难以自动学习有效的故事结构，需探索无监督方式诱导潜在计划序列。
AI.method: 设计深度潜在变量模型，在生成过程中采样锚定词序列作为潜在变量，结合变分推理训练，并引入两种推理网络预测锚定词后验，对比不同解码器分布策略。
AI.result: 人类评估显示生成故事质量优于无计划基线，与外部监督方法相当；自动评估在困惑度、多样性和计划控制指标上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 无监督学习锚定序列能有效指导叙事生成，模型在质量与控制性上优于传统方法，验证了潜在离散计划的有效性。

search_text: Narrative Text Generation with a Latent Discrete Plan 具有潜在离散计划的叙事文本生成 Past work on story generation has demonstrated the usefulness of conditioning on a generation plan to generate coherent stories. However, these approaches have used heuristics or off-the-shelf models to first tag training stories with the desired type of plan, and then train generation models in a supervised fashion. In this paper, we propose a deep latent variable model that first samples a sequence of anchor words, one per sentence in the story, as part of its generative process. During training, our model treats the sequence of anchor words as a latent variable and attempts to induce anchoring sequences that help guide generation in an unsupervised fashion. We conduct experiments with several types of sentence decoder distributions: left-to-right and non-monotonic, with different degrees of restriction. Further, since we use amortized variational inference to train our model, we introduce two corresponding types of inference network for predicting the posterior on anchor words. We conduct human evaluations which demonstrate that the stories produced by our model are rated better in comparison with baselines which do not consider story plans, and are similar or better in quality relative to baselines which use external supervision for plans. Additionally, the proposed model gets favorable scores when evaluated on perplexity, diversity, and control of story via discrete plan. 过去关于故事生成的工作已经证明了对生成计划进行调节以生成连贯故事的有用性。然而，这些方法使用启发式或现成的模型，首先用所需的计划类型标记训练故事，然后以监督方式训练生成模型。在本文中，我们提出了一种深度潜在变量模型，该模型首先对锚定词序列进行采样，故事中的每个句子一个，作为其生成过程的一部分。在训练过程中，我们的模型将锚定词序列视为潜在变量，并尝试引入锚定序列，以帮助以无监督的方式指导生成。我们对几种类型的句子解码器分布进行了实验：从左到右和非单调，具有不同程度的限制。此外，由于我们使用摊销变分推理来训练我们的模型，因此我们引入了两种相应类型的推理网络来预测锚定词的后验。我们进行的人工评估表明，与不考虑故事计划的基线相比，我们的模型生成的故事得到了更好的评价，并且相对于使用外部监督计划的基线而言，质量相似或更好。此外，当通过离散计划对故事的复杂性、多样性和控制进行评估时，所提出的模型获得了良好的分数。 本文提出一种基于潜在离散计划的叙事文本生成模型，通过无监督学习锚定词序列来提升故事连贯性和生成质量。 Harsh Jhamtani,Taylor Berg-Kirkpatrick cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Xiao Kang,Xingbo Liu,Xiushan Nie,Xiaoming Xi,Yilong Yin
title: Attention Model Enhanced Network for Classification of Breast Cancer Image
title_zh: 用于乳腺癌图像分类的注意力模型增强网络
abstract: Breast cancer classification remains a challenging task due to inter-class ambiguity and intra-class variability. Existing deep learning-based methods try to confront this challenge by utilizing complex nonlinear projections. However, these methods typically extract global features from entire images, neglecting the fact that the subtle detail information can be crucial in extracting discriminative features. In this study, we propose a novel method named Attention Model Enhanced Network (AMEN), which is formulated in a multi-branch fashion with pixel-wised attention model and classification submodular. Specifically, the feature learning part in AMEN can generate pixel-wised attention map, while the classification submodular are utilized to classify the samples. To focus more on subtle detail information, the sample image is enhanced by the pixel-wised attention map generated from former branch. Furthermore, boosting strategy are adopted to fuse classification results from different branches for better performance. Experiments conducted on three benchmark datasets demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method under various scenarios.
summary: Breast cancer classification remains a challenging task due to inter-class ambiguity and intra-class variability. Existing deep learning-based methods try to confront this challenge by utilizing complex nonlinear projections. However, these methods typically extract global features from entire images, neglecting the fact that the subtle detail information can be crucial in extracting discriminative features. In this study, we propose a novel method named Attention Model Enhanced Network (AMEN), which is formulated in a multi-branch fashion with pixel-wised attention model and classification submodular. Specifically, the feature learning part in AMEN can generate pixel-wised attention map, while the classification submodular are utilized to classify the samples. To focus more on subtle detail information, the sample image is enhanced by the pixel-wised attention map generated from former branch. Furthermore, boosting strategy are adopted to fuse classification results from different branches for better performance. Experiments conducted on three benchmark datasets demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method under various scenarios.
abstract_zh: 由于类间模糊性和类内变异性，乳腺癌分类仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。现有的基于深度学习的方法试图通过利用复杂的非线性投影来应对这一挑战。然而，这些方法通常从整个图像中提取全局特征，忽略了微妙的细节信息对于提取判别性特征至关重要的事实。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种名为注意力模型增强网络（AMEN）的新方法，该方法以多分支方式制定，具有像素级注意力模型和分类子模块。具体来说，AMEN中的特征学习部分可以生成像素级的注意力图，而分类子模块则用于对样本进行分类。为了更多地关注微妙的细节信息，样本图像通过前一个分支生成的像素级注意力图进行了增强。此外，采用提升策略来融合不同分支的分类结果以获得更好的性能。在三个基准数据集上进行的实验证明了所提出的方法在各种场景下的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种增强注意力模型的网络（AMEN），用于改进乳腺癌图像分类任务。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在乳腺癌分类中因忽略细微细节信息而表现不足，需通过关注局部特征提升分类性能。
AI.method: 设计多分支架构，结合像素级注意力模型生成注意力图增强图像，并利用分类子模块与boosting策略融合多分支结果。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上验证了AMEN在不同场景下的优越性，证明其有效性。
AI.conclusion: AMEN通过聚焦细微细节信息，有效提升了乳腺癌图像分类的准确性和鲁棒性。

title: Low-Rank Robust Online Distance/Similarity Learning based on the Rescaled Hinge Loss
title_zh: 基于重新调整的铰链损失的低秩鲁棒在线距离/相似性学习
comment: An Online Distance-Similarity learning approach in noisy environment
comments: An Online Distance-Similarity learning approach in noisy environment
abstract: An important challenge in metric learning is scalability to both size and dimension of input data. Online metric learning algorithms are proposed to address this challenge. Existing methods are commonly based on (Passive Aggressive) PA approach. Hence, they can rapidly process large volumes of data with an adaptive learning rate. However, these algorithms are based on the Hinge loss and so are not robust against outliers and label noise. Also, existing online methods usually assume training triplets or pairwise constraints are exist in advance. However, many datasets in real-world applications are in the form of input data and their associated labels. We address these challenges by formulating the online Distance-Similarity learning problem with the robust Rescaled hinge loss function. The proposed model is rather general and can be applied to any PA-based online Distance-Similarity algorithm. Also, we develop an efficient robust one-pass triplet construction algorithm. Finally, to provide scalability in high dimensional DML environments, the low-rank version of the proposed methods is presented that not only reduces the computational cost significantly but also keeps the predictive performance of the learned metrics. Also, it provides a straightforward extension of our methods for deep Distance-Similarity learning. We conduct several experiments on datasets from various applications. The results confirm that the proposed methods significantly outperform state-of-the-art online DML methods in the presence of label noise and outliers by a large margin.
summary: An important challenge in metric learning is scalability to both size and dimension of input data. Online metric learning algorithms are proposed to address this challenge. Existing methods are commonly based on (Passive Aggressive) PA approach. Hence, they can rapidly process large volumes of data with an adaptive learning rate. However, these algorithms are based on the Hinge loss and so are not robust against outliers and label noise. Also, existing online methods usually assume training triplets or pairwise constraints are exist in advance. However, many datasets in real-world applications are in the form of input data and their associated labels. We address these challenges by formulating the online Distance-Similarity learning problem with the robust Rescaled hinge loss function. The proposed model is rather general and can be applied to any PA-based online Distance-Similarity algorithm. Also, we develop an efficient robust one-pass triplet construction algorithm. Finally, to provide scalability in high dimensional DML environments, the low-rank version of the proposed methods is presented that not only reduces the computational cost significantly but also keeps the predictive performance of the learned metrics. Also, it provides a straightforward extension of our methods for deep Distance-Similarity learning. We conduct several experiments on datasets from various applications. The results confirm that the proposed methods significantly outperform state-of-the-art online DML methods in the presence of label noise and outliers by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 度量学习的一个重要挑战是输入数据的大小和维度的可扩展性。在线度量学习算法被提出来应对这一挑战。现有方法通常基于（被动攻击）PA 方法。因此，它们可以以自适应学习率快速处理大量数据。然而，这些算法基于 Hinge 损失，因此对于异常值和标签噪声来说并不稳健。此外，现有的在线方法通常假设预先存在训练三元组或成对约束。然而，现实应用中的许多数据集都是输入数据及其关联标签的形式。我们通过使用鲁棒的重缩放铰链损失函数来制定在线距离相似性学习问题来解决这些挑战。所提出的模型相当通用，可以应用于任何基于 PA 的在线距离相似度算法。此外，我们还开发了一种高效、鲁棒的一次性三元组构造算法。最后，为了在高维 DML 环境中提供可扩展性，提出了所提出方法的低秩版本，不仅显着降低了计算成本，而且保持了学习指标的预测性能。此外，它还为我们的深度距离相似性学习方法提供了直接的扩展。我们对来自各种应用程序的数据集进行了多次实验。结果证实，在存在标签噪声和异常值的情况下，所提出的方法明显优于最先进的在线 DML 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于重缩放铰链损失的低秩鲁棒在线距离/相似性学习方法，以解决大规模数据下的度量学习问题。
AI.motivation: 现有在线度量学习方法基于铰链损失，对异常值和标签噪声不鲁棒，且依赖预定义的三元组或成对约束，难以适应实际数据。
AI.method: 设计鲁棒的重缩放铰链损失函数，开发高效的一次性三元组生成算法，并引入低秩版本以降低计算成本同时保持预测性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法在存在标签噪声和异常值的情况下显著优于现有在线度量学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在鲁棒性、可扩展性和计算效率方面具有优势，适用于高维和大规模数据场景。

search_text: Low-Rank Robust Online Distance/Similarity Learning based on the Rescaled Hinge Loss 基于重新调整的铰链损失的低秩鲁棒在线距离/相似性学习 An important challenge in metric learning is scalability to both size and dimension of input data. Online metric learning algorithms are proposed to address this challenge. Existing methods are commonly based on (Passive Aggressive) PA approach. Hence, they can rapidly process large volumes of data with an adaptive learning rate. However, these algorithms are based on the Hinge loss and so are not robust against outliers and label noise. Also, existing online methods usually assume training triplets or pairwise constraints are exist in advance. However, many datasets in real-world applications are in the form of input data and their associated labels. We address these challenges by formulating the online Distance-Similarity learning problem with the robust Rescaled hinge loss function. The proposed model is rather general and can be applied to any PA-based online Distance-Similarity algorithm. Also, we develop an efficient robust one-pass triplet construction algorithm. Finally, to provide scalability in high dimensional DML environments, the low-rank version of the proposed methods is presented that not only reduces the computational cost significantly but also keeps the predictive performance of the learned metrics. Also, it provides a straightforward extension of our methods for deep Distance-Similarity learning. We conduct several experiments on datasets from various applications. The results confirm that the proposed methods significantly outperform state-of-the-art online DML methods in the presence of label noise and outliers by a large margin. 度量学习的一个重要挑战是输入数据的大小和维度的可扩展性。在线度量学习算法被提出来应对这一挑战。现有方法通常基于（被动攻击）PA 方法。因此，它们可以以自适应学习率快速处理大量数据。然而，这些算法基于 Hinge 损失，因此对于异常值和标签噪声来说并不稳健。此外，现有的在线方法通常假设预先存在训练三元组或成对约束。然而，现实应用中的许多数据集都是输入数据及其关联标签的形式。我们通过使用鲁棒的重缩放铰链损失函数来制定在线距离相似性学习问题来解决这些挑战。所提出的模型相当通用，可以应用于任何基于 PA 的在线距离相似度算法。此外，我们还开发了一种高效、鲁棒的一次性三元组构造算法。最后，为了在高维 DML 环境中提供可扩展性，提出了所提出方法的低秩版本，不仅显着降低了计算成本，而且保持了学习指标的预测性能。此外，它还为我们的深度距离相似性学习方法提供了直接的扩展。我们对来自各种应用程序的数据集进行了多次实验。结果证实，在存在标签噪声和异常值的情况下，所提出的方法明显优于最先进的在线 DML 方法。 本文提出了一种基于重缩放铰链损失的低秩鲁棒在线距离/相似性学习方法，以解决大规模数据下的度量学习问题。 Davood Zabihzadeh,Amar Tuama,Ali Karami-Mollaee cs.LG,cs.CV,stat.ML

title: Learning Binary Semantic Embedding for Histology Image Classification and Retrieval
title_zh: 学习用于组织学图像分类和检索的二进制语义嵌入
abstract: With the development of medical imaging technology and machine learning, computer-assisted diagnosis which can provide impressive reference to pathologists, attracts extensive research interests. The exponential growth of medical images and uninterpretability of traditional classification models have hindered the applications of computer-assisted diagnosis. To address these issues, we propose a novel method for Learning Binary Semantic Embedding (LBSE). Based on the efficient and effective embedding, classification and retrieval are performed to provide interpretable computer-assisted diagnosis for histology images. Furthermore, double supervision, bit uncorrelation and balance constraint, asymmetric strategy and discrete optimization are seamlessly integrated in the proposed method for learning binary embedding. Experiments conducted on three benchmark datasets validate the superiority of LBSE under various scenarios.
summary: With the development of medical imaging technology and machine learning, computer-assisted diagnosis which can provide impressive reference to pathologists, attracts extensive research interests. The exponential growth of medical images and uninterpretability of traditional classification models have hindered the applications of computer-assisted diagnosis. To address these issues, we propose a novel method for Learning Binary Semantic Embedding (LBSE). Based on the efficient and effective embedding, classification and retrieval are performed to provide interpretable computer-assisted diagnosis for histology images. Furthermore, double supervision, bit uncorrelation and balance constraint, asymmetric strategy and discrete optimization are seamlessly integrated in the proposed method for learning binary embedding. Experiments conducted on three benchmark datasets validate the superiority of LBSE under various scenarios.
abstract_zh: 随着医学影像技术和机器学习的发展，计算机辅助诊断可以为病理学家提供令人印象深刻的参考，吸引了广泛的研究兴趣。医学图像的指数级增长和传统分类模型的不可解释性阻碍了计算机辅助诊断的应用。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种学习二进制语义嵌入（LBSE）的新方法。基于高效有效的嵌入、分类和检索，为组织学图像提供可解释的计算机辅助诊断。此外，双监督、位不相关和平衡约束、非对称策略和离散优化无缝集成在所提出的学习二进制嵌入的方法中。在三个基准数据集上进行的实验验证了 LBSE 在各种场景下的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为LBSE的新方法，用于组织学图像分类和检索，通过学习二进制语义嵌入解决传统模型的不可解释性问题。
AI.motivation: 医疗图像数据激增且传统分类模型缺乏可解释性，导致计算机辅助诊断应用受限，需开发高效且可解释的解决方案。
AI.method: 整合双监督机制、位不相关性约束、平衡策略、非对称优化及离散优化技术，构建二进制语义嵌入学习框架LBSE。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上实验验证，LBSE在多种场景下均表现出优于现有方法的分类与检索性能。
AI.conclusion: LBSE通过可解释的二进制嵌入有效提升组织学图像诊断效率，为医学影像分析提供新思路与实用工具。

authors_text: Gamhewage C. de Silva,Tamara Smyth,Michael J. Lyons
title: A Novel Face-tracking Mouth Controller and its Application to Interacting with Bioacoustic Models
title_zh: 一种新型面部追踪口控制器及其在生物声学模型交互中的应用
comment: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2004 (NIME-04)
comments: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2004 (NIME-04)
abstract: We describe a simple, computationally light, real-time system for tracking the lower face and extracting information about the shape of the open mouth from a video sequence. The system allows unencumbered control of audio synthesis modules by the action of the mouth. We report work in progress to use the mouth controller to interact with a physical model of sound production by the avian syrinx.
summary: We describe a simple, computationally light, real-time system for tracking the lower face and extracting information about the shape of the open mouth from a video sequence. The system allows unencumbered control of audio synthesis modules by the action of the mouth. We report work in progress to use the mouth controller to interact with a physical model of sound production by the avian syrinx.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了一个简单的、计算量小的实时系统，用于跟踪下脸并从视频序列中提取有关张开嘴形状的信息。该系统允许通过嘴的动作不受阻碍地控制音频合成模块。我们报告了正在进行的工作，使用嘴控制器与鸟类鸣管发出声音的物理模型进行交互。

AI.tldr: 开发一种实时面部追踪嘴部控制器，用于控制音频合成模块并与生物声学模型交互。
AI.motivation: 现有系统可能缺乏轻量化和实时性，需通过无约束的嘴部动作控制音频合成以增强生物声学模型交互。
AI.method: 基于视频序列实时追踪下部面部，提取张嘴形状信息并映射至音频合成模块控制参数。
AI.result: 实现了嘴部控制器原型，并初步应用于鸟类鸣管声学模型的交互测试中。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为生物声学模型提供了新的交互方式，未来可优化模型精度与实时性。

authors_text: Diego Monteiro,Hai-Ning Liang,Jialin Wang,Hao Chen,Nilufar Baghaei
title: An In-Depth Exploration of the Effect of 2D/3D Views and Controller Types on First Person Shooter Games in Virtual Reality
title_zh: 深入探索 2D/3D 视图和控制器类型对虚拟现实中第一人称射击游戏的影响
abstract: The amount of interest in Virtual Reality (VR) research has significantly increased over the past few years, both in academia and industry. The release of commercial VR Head-Mounted Displays (HMDs) has been a major contributing factor. However, there is still much to be learned, especially how views and input techniques, as well as their interaction, affect the VR experience. There is little work done on First-Person Shooter (FPS) games in VR, and those few studies have focused on a single aspect of VR FPS. They either focused on the view, e.g., comparing VR to a typical 2D display or on the controller types. To the best of our knowledge, there are no studies investigating variations of 2D/3D views in HMDs, controller types, and their interactions. As such, it is challenging to distinguish findings related to the controller type from those related to the view. If a study does not control for the input method and finds that 2D displays lead to higher performance than VR, we cannot generalize the results because of the confounding variables. To understand their interaction, we propose to analyze in more depth, whether it is the view (2D vs. 3D) or the way it is controlled that gives the platforms their respective advantages. To study the effects of the 2D/3D views, we created a 2D visual technique, PlaneFrame, that was applied inside the VR headset. Our results show that the controller type can have a significant positive impact on performance, immersion, and simulator sickness when associated with a 2D view. They further our understanding of the interactions that controllers and views have and demonstrate that comparisons are highly dependent on how both factors go together. Further, through a series of three experiments, we developed a technique that can lead to a substantial performance, a good level of immersion, and can minimize the level of simulator sickness.

The release of commercial VR Head-Mounted Displays (HMDs) has been a major contributing factor. However, there is still much to be learned, especially how views and input techniques, as well as their interaction, affect the VR experience. There is little work done on First-Person Shooter (FPS) games in VR, and those few studies have focused on a single aspect of VR FPS. They either focused on the view, e.g., comparing VR to a typical 2D display or on the controller types. To the best of our knowledge, there are no studies investigating variations of 2D/3D views in HMDs, controller types, and their interactions. As such, it is challenging to distinguish findings related to the controller type from those related to the view. If a study does not control for the input method and finds that 2D displays lead to higher performance than VR, we cannot generalize the results because of the confounding variables. To understand their interaction, we propose to analyze in more depth, whether it is the view (2D vs. 3D) or the way it is controlled that gives the platforms their respective advantages. To study the effects of the 2D/3D views, we created a 2D visual technique, PlaneFrame, that was applied inside the VR headset. Our results show that the controller type can have a significant positive impact on performance, immersion, and simulator sickness when associated with a 2D view. They further our understanding of the interactions that controllers and views have and demonstrate that comparisons are highly dependent on how both factors go together. Further, through a series of three experiments, we developed a technique that can lead to a substantial performance, a good level of immersion, and can minimize the level of simulator sickness.
abstract_zh: 过去几年，学术界和工业界对虚拟现实 (VR) 研究的兴趣显着增加。商用 VR 头戴式显示器 (HMD) 的发布是一个主要因素。然而，仍有很多东西需要学习，特别是视图和输入技术以及它们的交互如何影响 VR 体验。关于 VR 中第一人称射击 (FPS) 游戏的研究很少，而且这些研究都集中在 VR FPS 的某个方面。他们要么关注视图，例如将 VR 与典型的 2D 显示器进行比较，要么关注控制器类型。据我们所知，还没有研究调查 HMD 中 2D/3D 视图的变化、控制器类型及其交互。因此，区分与控制器类型相关的发现和与视图相关的发现是具有挑战性的。如果一项研究不控制输入法并发现 2D 显示器比 VR 具有更高的性能，则由于存在混杂变量，我们无法概括结果。为了理解它们的交互，我们建议更深入地分析，无论是视图（2D 与 3D）还是控制方式赋予了平台各自的优势。为了研究 2D/3D 视图的效果，我们创建了一种 2D 视觉技术 PlaneFrame，并将其应用于 VR 耳机内部。我们的结果表明，与 2D 视图关联时，控制器类型可以对性能、沉浸感和模拟器眩晕感产生显着的积极影响。它们进一步加深了我们对控制器和视图之间交互的理解，并证明比较高度依赖于这两个因素如何结合在一起。此外，通过一系列的三个实验，我们开发了一种技术，可以带来实质性的性能、良好的沉浸感，并可以最大限度地减少模拟器晕眩的程度。

AI.tldr: 本文深入探讨了虚拟现实（VR）中第一人称射击（FPS）游戏中2D/3D视图与控制器类型对用户体验的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多单独分析VR视图或控制器类型，缺乏对其交互作用的系统研究，导致结果存在混淆变量，难以明确区分视图与控制器的独立影响。
AI.method: 开发了2D视图技术PlaneFrame并集成于VR头显中，通过三组实验对比分析2D/3D视图与不同控制器类型的组合效果。
AI.result: 控制器类型对性能、沉浸感和模拟器眩晕有显著影响，尤其在2D视图下表现更优，且视图与控制器的交互作用高度依赖其组合方式。
AI.conclusion: 视图与控制器的交互作用复杂，需综合考虑两者组合以优化VR FPS游戏体验，为后续研究提供新的方向。

search_text: An In-Depth Exploration of the Effect of 2D/3D Views and Controller Types on First Person Shooter Games in Virtual Reality 深入探索 2D/3D 视图和控制器类型对虚拟现实中第一人称射击游戏的影响 The amount of interest in Virtual Reality (VR) research has significantly increased over the past few years, both in academia and industry. The release of commercial VR Head-Mounted Displays (HMDs) has been a major contributing factor. However, there is still much to be learned, especially how views and input techniques, as well as their interaction, affect the VR experience. There is little work done on First-Person Shooter (FPS) games in VR, and those few studies have focused on a single aspect of VR FPS. They either focused on the view, e.g., comparing VR to a typical 2D display or on the controller types. To the best of our knowledge, there are no studies investigating variations of 2D/3D views in HMDs, controller types, and their interactions. As such, it is challenging to distinguish findings related to the controller type from those related to the view. If a study does not control for the input method and finds that 2D displays lead to higher performance than VR, we cannot generalize the results because of the confounding variables. To understand their interaction, we propose to analyze in more depth, whether it is the view (2D vs. 3D) or the way it is controlled that gives the platforms their respective advantages. To study the effects of the 2D/3D views, we created a 2D visual technique, PlaneFrame, that was applied inside the VR headset. Our results show that the controller type can have a significant positive impact on performance, immersion, and simulator sickness when associated with a 2D view. They further our understanding of the interactions that controllers and views have and demonstrate that comparisons are highly dependent on how both factors go together. Further, through a series of three experiments, we developed a technique that can lead to a substantial performance, a good level of immersion, and can minimize the level of simulator sickness. 过去几年，学术界和工业界对虚拟现实 (VR) 研究的兴趣显着增加。商用 VR 头戴式显示器 (HMD) 的发布是一个主要因素。然而，仍有很多东西需要学习，特别是视图和输入技术以及它们的交互如何影响 VR 体验。关于 VR 中第一人称射击 (FPS) 游戏的研究很少，而且这些研究都集中在 VR FPS 的某个方面。他们要么关注视图，例如将 VR 与典型的 2D 显示器进行比较，要么关注控制器类型。据我们所知，还没有研究调查 HMD 中 2D/3D 视图的变化、控制器类型及其交互。因此，区分与控制器类型相关的发现和与视图相关的发现是具有挑战性的。如果一项研究不控制输入法并发现 2D 显示器比 VR 具有更高的性能，则由于存在混杂变量，我们无法概括结果。为了理解它们的交互，我们建议更深入地分析，无论是视图（2D 与 3D）还是控制方式赋予了平台各自的优势。为了研究 2D/3D 视图的效果，我们创建了一种 2D 视觉技术 PlaneFrame，并将其应用于 VR 耳机内部。我们的结果表明，与 2D 视图关联时，控制器类型可以对性能、沉浸感和模拟器眩晕感产生显着的积极影响。它们进一步加深了我们对控制器和视图之间交互的理解，并证明比较高度依赖于这两个因素如何结合在一起。此外，通过一系列的三个实验，我们开发了一种技术，可以带来实质性的性能、良好的沉浸感，并可以最大限度地减少模拟器晕眩的程度。 本文深入探讨了虚拟现实（VR）中第一人称射击（FPS）游戏中2D/3D视图与控制器类型对用户体验的影响。 Diego Monteiro,Hai-Ning Liang,Jialin Wang,Hao Chen,Nilufar Baghaei cs.HC

authors_text: Jingyi Xu,Hieu Le,Mingzhen Huang,ShahRukh Athar,Dimitris Samaras
title: Variational Feature Disentangling for Fine-Grained Few-Shot Classification
title_zh: 细粒度少样本分类的变分特征解缠
abstract: Fine-grained few-shot recognition often suffers from the problem of training data scarcity for novel categories.The network tends to overfit and does not generalize well to unseen classes due to insufficient training data. Many methods have been proposed to synthesize additional data to support the training. In this paper, we focus one enlarging the intra-class variance of the unseen class to improve few-shot classification performance. We assume that the distribution of intra-class variance generalizes across the base class and the novel class. Thus, the intra-class variance of the base set can be transferred to the novel set for feature augmentation. Specifically, we first model the distribution of intra-class variance on the base set via variational inference. Then the learned distribution is transferred to the novel set to generate additional features, which are used together with the original ones to train a classifier. Experimental results show a significant boost over the state-of-the-art methods on the challenging fine-grained few-shot image classification benchmarks.
summary: Fine-grained few-shot recognition often suffers from the problem of training data scarcity for novel categories.The network tends to overfit and does not generalize well to unseen classes due to insufficient training data. Many methods have been proposed to synthesize additional data to support the training. In this paper, we focus one enlarging the intra-class variance of the unseen class to improve few-shot classification performance. We assume that the distribution of intra-class variance generalizes across the base class and the novel class. Thus, the intra-class variance of the base set can be transferred to the novel set for feature augmentation. Specifically, we first model the distribution of intra-class variance on the base set via variational inference. Then the learned distribution is transferred to the novel set to generate additional features, which are used together with the original ones to train a classifier. Experimental results show a significant boost over the state-of-the-art methods on the challenging fine-grained few-shot image classification benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 细粒度的少样本识别经常遇到新类别训练数据稀缺的问题。由于训练数据不足，网络往往会过度拟合，并且不能很好地泛化到未见过的类别。已经提出了许多方法来合成额外的数据来支持训练。在本文中，我们的重点是扩大未见类的类内方差，以提高少样本分类性能。我们假设类内方差的分布泛化到基类和新类。因此，基集的类内方差可以转移到新集以进行特征增强。具体来说，我们首先通过变分推理对基集上的类内方差分布进行建模。然后将学习到的分布转移到新的集合中以生成附加特征，这些特征与原始特征一起用于训练分类器。实验结果表明，在具有挑战性的细粒度少样本图像分类基准上，比最先进的方法有了显着的提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过扩大未见类的类内方差来提升细粒度少样本分类性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 细粒度少样本分类因训练数据稀缺导致模型过拟合，现有数据合成方法效果有限，而类内方差分布可能在基础类与新类间通用。
AI.method: 通过变分推断建模基础类的类内方差分布，并将其迁移至新类生成额外特征以增强分类器训练。
AI.result: 在细粒度少样本分类基准测试中显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效利用类内方差分布迁移提升模型泛化能力，为少样本学习提供新思路。

title: Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces and Machine Learning for Wireless Fingerprinting Localization
title_zh: 用于无线指纹定位的可重构智能表面和机器学习
abstract: Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces (RISs) promise improved, secure and more efficient wireless communications. We propose and demonstrate how to exploit the diversity offered by RISs to generate and select easily differentiable radio maps for use in wireless fingerprinting localization applications. Further, we apply machine learning feature selection methods to prune the large state space of the RIS, thus reducing complexity and enhancing localization accuracy and position acquisition time. We evaluate our proposed approach by generation of radio maps with a novel radio propagation modelling and simulations.
summary: Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces (RISs) promise improved, secure and more efficient wireless communications. We propose and demonstrate how to exploit the diversity offered by RISs to generate and select easily differentiable radio maps for use in wireless fingerprinting localization applications. Further, we apply machine learning feature selection methods to prune the large state space of the RIS, thus reducing complexity and enhancing localization accuracy and position acquisition time. We evaluate our proposed approach by generation of radio maps with a novel radio propagation modelling and simulations.
abstract_zh: 可重构智能表面 (RIS) 有望改善、安全且更高效的无线通信。我们提出并演示了如何利用 RIS 提供的多样性来生成和选择易于区分的无线电地图，以用于无线指纹定位应用。此外，我们应用机器学习特征选择方法来修剪 RIS 的大状态空间，从而降低复杂性并提高定位精度和位置获取时间。我们通过使用新颖的无线电传播建模和模拟生成无线电地图来评估我们提出的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用可重构智能表面（RIS）与机器学习方法生成可区分的无线电地图，以提升无线指纹定位的精度与效率。
AI.motivation: RIS能增强无线通信性能，但其复杂状态空间限制了定位应用。需通过特征选择优化以实现高效、精准的无线指纹定位。
AI.method: 通过RIS生成多样化的无线电地图，并结合机器学习特征选择算法压缩状态空间，降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 基于新型无线电传播模型的仿真验证了方法有效性，显著提升定位精度并缩短位置获取时间。
AI.conclusion: RIS与机器学习结合可有效解决无线定位中的复杂性与精度问题，为未来智能通信系统提供新思路。

search_text: Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces and Machine Learning for Wireless Fingerprinting Localization 用于无线指纹定位的可重构智能表面和机器学习 Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces (RISs) promise improved, secure and more efficient wireless communications. We propose and demonstrate how to exploit the diversity offered by RISs to generate and select easily differentiable radio maps for use in wireless fingerprinting localization applications. Further, we apply machine learning feature selection methods to prune the large state space of the RIS, thus reducing complexity and enhancing localization accuracy and position acquisition time. We evaluate our proposed approach by generation of radio maps with a novel radio propagation modelling and simulations. 可重构智能表面 (RIS) 有望改善、安全且更高效的无线通信。我们提出并演示了如何利用 RIS 提供的多样性来生成和选择易于区分的无线电地图，以用于无线指纹定位应用。此外，我们应用机器学习特征选择方法来修剪 RIS 的大状态空间，从而降低复杂性并提高定位精度和位置获取时间。我们通过使用新颖的无线电传播建模和模拟生成无线电地图来评估我们提出的方法。 本文提出利用可重构智能表面（RIS）与机器学习方法生成可区分的无线电地图，以提升无线指纹定位的精度与效率。 Cam Ly Nguyen,Orestis Georgiou,Gabriele Gradoni eess.SP,cs.ET,cs.LG

authors_text: Xueshi Lu,Difeng Yu,Hai-Ning Liang,Wenge Xu,Yuzheng Chen,Xiang Li,Khalad Hasan
title: Exploration of Hands-free Text Entry Techniques For Virtual Reality
title_zh: 虚拟现实免提文本输入技术的探索
abstract: Text entry is a common activity in virtual reality (VR) systems. There is a limited number of available hands-free techniques, which allow users to carry out text entry when users' hands are busy such as holding items or hand-based devices are not available. The most used hands-free text entry technique is DwellType, where a user selects a letter by dwelling over it for a specific period. However, its performance is limited due to the fixed dwell time for each character selection. In this paper, we explore two other hands-free text entry mechanisms in VR: BlinkType and NeckType, which leverage users' eye blinks and neck's forward and backward movements to select letters. With a user study, we compare the performance of the two techniques with DwellType. Results show that users can achieve an average text entry rate of 13.47, 11.18 and 11.65 words per minute with BlinkType, NeckType, and DwellType, respectively. Users' subjective feedback shows BlinkType as the preferred technique for text entry in VR.
summary: Text entry is a common activity in virtual reality (VR) systems. There is a limited number of available hands-free techniques, which allow users to carry out text entry when users' hands are busy such as holding items or hand-based devices are not available. The most used hands-free text entry technique is DwellType, where a user selects a letter by dwelling over it for a specific period. However, its performance is limited due to the fixed dwell time for each character selection. In this paper, we explore two other hands-free text entry mechanisms in VR: BlinkType and NeckType, which leverage users' eye blinks and neck's forward and backward movements to select letters. With a user study, we compare the performance of the two techniques with DwellType. Results show that users can achieve an average text entry rate of 13.47, 11.18 and 11.65 words per minute with BlinkType, NeckType, and DwellType, respectively. Users' subjective feedback shows BlinkType as the preferred technique for text entry in VR.
abstract_zh: 文本输入是虚拟现实 (VR) 系统中的常见活动。可用的免提技术数量有限，这些技术允许用户在用户的手忙碌时（例如无法握住物品或手持设备）进行文本输入。最常用的免提文本输入技术是 DwellType，用户通过在字母上停留一段特定的时间来选择该字母。然而，由于每个字符选择的停留时间固定，其性能受到限制。在本文中，我们探索了 VR 中的另外两种免提文本输入机制：BlinkType 和 NeckType，它们利用用户的眨眼和颈部的前后运动来选择字母。通过用户研究，我们将两种技术与 DwellType 的性能进行比较。结果显示，用户使用 BlinkType、NeckType 和 DwellType 的平均文本输入率分别为每分钟 13.47、11.18 和 11.65 个单词。用户的主观反馈表明 BlinkType 是 VR 中文本输入的首选技术。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了虚拟现实环境中两种新型无手持文本输入技术BlinkType和NeckType，并与现有DwellType技术进行对比。
AI.motivation: 现有无手持文本输入技术DwellType因固定注视时间导致效率受限，需探索更高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 通过用户实验对比BlinkType（利用眨眼）、NeckType（利用颈部动作）与DwellType的文本输入效率及用户体验。
AI.result: BlinkType平均输入速率为13.47字/分钟，NeckType为11.65字/分钟，DwellType为11.18字/分钟，用户更倾向使用BlinkType。
AI.conclusion: BlinkType在输入效率和用户偏好上优于其他两种技术，为VR环境提供更优的无手持输入方案。

title: Learning Clusterable Visual Features for Zero-Shot Recognition
title_zh: 学习用于零样本识别的可聚类视觉特征
abstract: In zero-shot learning (ZSL), conditional generators have been widely used to generate additional training features. These features can then be used to train the classifiers for testing data. However, some testing data are considered "hard" as they lie close to the decision boundaries and are prone to misclassification, leading to performance degradation for ZSL. In this paper, we propose to learn clusterable features for ZSL problems. Using a Conditional Variational Autoencoder (CVAE) as the feature generator, we project the original features to a new feature space supervised by an auxiliary classification loss. To further increase clusterability, we fine-tune the features using Gaussian similarity loss. The clusterable visual features are not only more suitable for CVAE reconstruction but are also more separable which improves classification accuracy. Moreover, we introduce Gaussian noise to enlarge the intra-class variance of the generated features, which helps to improve the classifier's robustness. Our experiments on SUN,CUB, and AWA2 datasets show consistent improvement over previous state-of-the-art ZSL results by a large margin. In addition to its effectiveness on zero-shot classification, experiments show that our method to increase feature clusterability benefits few-shot learning algorithms as well.
summary: In zero-shot learning (ZSL), conditional generators have been widely used to generate additional training features. These features can then be used to train the classifiers for testing data. However, some testing data are considered "hard" as they lie close to the decision boundaries and are prone to misclassification, leading to performance degradation for ZSL. In this paper, we propose to learn clusterable features for ZSL problems. Using a Conditional Variational Autoencoder (CVAE) as the feature generator, we project the original features to a new feature space supervised by an auxiliary classification loss. To further increase clusterability, we fine-tune the features using Gaussian similarity loss. The clusterable visual features are not only more suitable for CVAE reconstruction but are also more separable which improves classification accuracy. Moreover, we introduce Gaussian noise to enlarge the intra-class variance of the generated features, which helps to improve the classifier's robustness. Our experiments on SUN,CUB, and AWA2 datasets show consistent improvement over previous state-of-the-art ZSL results by a large margin. In addition to its effectiveness on zero-shot classification, experiments show that our method to increase feature clusterability benefits few-shot learning algorithms as well.
abstract_zh: 在零样本学习（ZSL）中，条件生成器已被广泛用于生成额外的训练特征。然后可以使用这些特征来训练测试数据的分类器。然而，一些测试数据被认为是“困难的”，因为它们靠近决策边界并且容易错误分类，从而导致 ZSL 的性能下降。在本文中，我们建议学习 ZSL 问题的可聚类特征。使用条件变分自动编码器（CVAE）作为特征生成器，我们将原始特征投影到由辅助分类损失监督的新特征空间。为了进一步提高可聚类性，我们使用高斯相似性损失来微调特征。可聚类的视觉特征不仅更适合CVAE重建，而且更可分离，从而提高了分类精度。此外，我们引入高斯噪声来放大生成特征的类内方差，这有助于提高分类器的鲁棒性。我们在 SUN、CUB 和 AWA2 数据集上的实验表明，与之前最先进的 ZSL 结果相比，有了很大的持续改进。除了零样本分类的有效性之外，实验表明，我们提高特征可聚类性的方法也有利于少样本学习算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种学习可聚类视觉特征的方法，以提升零样本识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本学习方法在处理靠近决策边界的'困难'测试数据时易出现误分类，导致性能下降。
AI.method: 采用条件变分自编码器（CVAE）生成特征，并通过辅助分类损失监督特征空间投影；利用高斯相似性损失微调特征以增强聚类性，同时引入高斯噪声扩大类内方差提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在SUN、CUB和AWA2数据集上显著优于现有最优方法，且对少样本学习算法同样有效。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过增强特征聚类性有效提升了零样本分类性能，并扩展至少样本学习场景。

authors_text: Suzanne C. Wetstein,Nikolas Stathonikos,Josien P. W. Pluim,Yujing J. Heng,Natalie D. ter Hoeve,Celien P. H. Vreuls,Paul J. van Diest,Mitko Veta
title: Deep Learning-Based Grading of Ductal Carcinoma In Situ in Breast Histopathology Images
title_zh: 基于深度学习的乳腺组织病理学图像中导管原位癌分级
abstract: Ductal carcinoma in situ (DCIS) is a non-invasive breast cancer that can progress into invasive ductal carcinoma (IDC). Studies suggest DCIS is often overtreated since a considerable part of DCIS lesions may never progress into IDC. Lower grade lesions have a lower progression speed and risk, possibly allowing treatment de-escalation. However, studies show significant inter-observer variation in DCIS grading. Automated image analysis may provide an objective solution to address high subjectivity of DCIS grading by pathologists. In this study, we developed a deep learning-based DCIS grading system. It was developed using the consensus DCIS grade of three expert observers on a dataset of 1186 DCIS lesions from 59 patients. The inter-observer agreement, measured by quadratic weighted Cohen's kappa, was used to evaluate the system and compare its performance to that of expert observers. We present an analysis of the lesion-level and patient-level inter-observer agreement on an independent test set of 1001 lesions from 50 patients. The deep learning system (dl) achieved on average slightly higher inter-observer agreement to the observers (o1, o2 and o3) ($κ_{o1,dl}=0.81, κ_{o2,dl}=0.53, κ_{o3,dl}=0.40$) than the observers amongst each other ($κ_{o1,o2}=0.58, κ_{o1,o3}=0.50, κ_{o2,o3}=0.42$) at the lesion-level. At the patient-level, the deep learning system achieved similar agreement to the observers ($κ_{o1,dl}=0.77, κ_{o2,dl}=0.75, κ_{o3,dl}=0.70$) as the observers amongst each other ($κ_{o1,o2}=0.77, κ_{o1,o3}=0.75, κ_{o2,o3}=0.72$). In conclusion, we developed a deep learning-based DCIS grading system that achieved a performance similar to expert observers. We believe this is the first automated system that could assist pathologists by providing robust and reproducible second opinions on DCIS grade.

In conclusion, we developed a deep learning-based DCIS grading system that achieved a performance similar to expert observers. We believe this is the first automated system that could assist pathologists by providing robust and reproducible second opinions on DCIS grade.
abstract_zh: 导管原位癌 (DCIS) 是一种非浸润性乳腺癌，可进展为浸润性导管癌 (IDC)。研究表明，导管原位癌 (DCIS) 经常被过度治疗，因为相当一部分导管原位癌 (DCIS) 病变可能永远不会进展为 IDC。较低级别的病变具有较低的进展速度和风险，可能允许治疗降级。然而，研究表明 DCIS 分级存在显着的观察者间差异。自动图像分析可以提供客观的解决方案来解决病理学家对 DCIS 分级的高度主观性问题。在这项研究中，我们开发了一个基于深度学习的 DCIS 评分系统。它是根据三位专家观察员对来自 59 名患者的 1186 个 DCIS 病变的数据集的共识 DCIS 分级而开发的。通过二次加权科恩卡帕测量的观察者间一致性用于评估系统并将其性能与专家观察者的性能进行比较。我们对来自 50 名患者的 1001 个病变的独立测试集进行了病变级别和患者级别观察者间一致性的分析。深度学习系统 (dl) 与观察者（o1、o2 和 o3）之间的平均观察者间一致性（$κ_{o1,dl}=0.81，κ_{o2,dl}=0.53，κ_{o3,dl}=0.40$）比观察者之间的一致性（$κ_{o1,o2}=0.58， κ_{o1,o3}=0.50, κ_{o2,o3}=0.42$) 在病变水平。在患者层面，深度学习系统与观察者之间取得了相似的一致性（$κ_{o1,dl}=0.77，κ_{o2,dl}=0.75，κ_{o3,dl}=0.70$），而观察者之间也达到了相似的一致性（$κ_{o1,o2}=0.77，κ_{o1,o3}=0.75， κ_{o2,o3}=0.72$)。总之，我们开发了一种基于深度学习的 DCIS 评分系统，其性能与专家观察员相似。我们相信这是第一个可以通过提供关于 DCIS 分级的可靠且可重复的第二意见来帮助病理学家的自动化系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的乳腺导管原位癌（DCIS）分级系统，旨在通过自动化图像分析减少病理学家主观判断的差异。
AI.motivation: DCIS分级存在显著的观察者间差异，导致治疗决策不一致，而自动化系统可能提供更客观的分级方法以辅助临床决策。
AI.method: 利用59名患者1186个病变的三名专家共识分级数据训练深度学习模型，并通过二次方加权Cohen's kappa系数评估模型与专家及观察者间的一致性。
AI.result: 病变层面模型与专家的一致性（κ=0.81-0.40）优于专家间一致性（κ=0.58-0.42）；患者层面模型与专家一致性（κ=0.77-0.70）与专家间一致性（κ=0.77-0.72）相当。
AI.conclusion: 开发的深度学习系统在DCIS分级上表现与专家相当，是首个可为病理学家提供稳健复现第二意见的自动化系统。

search_text: Deep Learning-Based Grading of Ductal Carcinoma In Situ in Breast Histopathology Images 基于深度学习的乳腺组织病理学图像中导管原位癌分级 Ductal carcinoma in situ (DCIS) is a non-invasive breast cancer that can progress into invasive ductal carcinoma (IDC). Studies suggest DCIS is often overtreated since a considerable part of DCIS lesions may never progress into IDC. Lower grade lesions have a lower progression speed and risk, possibly allowing treatment de-escalation. However, studies show significant inter-observer variation in DCIS grading. Automated image analysis may provide an objective solution to address high subjectivity of DCIS grading by pathologists. In this study, we developed a deep learning-based DCIS grading system. It was developed using the consensus DCIS grade of three expert observers on a dataset of 1186 DCIS lesions from 59 patients. The inter-observer agreement, measured by quadratic weighted Cohen's kappa, was used to evaluate the system and compare its performance to that of expert observers. We present an analysis of the lesion-level and patient-level inter-observer agreement on an independent test set of 1001 lesions from 50 patients. The deep learning system (dl) achieved on average slightly higher inter-observer agreement to the observers (o1, o2 and o3) ($κ_{o1,dl}=0.81, κ_{o2,dl}=0.53, κ_{o3,dl}=0.40$) than the observers amongst each other ($κ_{o1,o2}=0.58, κ_{o1,o3}=0.50, κ_{o2,o3}=0.42$) at the lesion-level. At the patient-level, the deep learning system achieved similar agreement to the observers ($κ_{o1,dl}=0.77, κ_{o2,dl}=0.75, κ_{o3,dl}=0.70$) as the observers amongst each other ($κ_{o1,o2}=0.77, κ_{o1,o3}=0.75, κ_{o2,o3}=0.72$). In conclusion, we developed a deep learning-based DCIS grading system that achieved a performance similar to expert observers. We believe this is the first automated system that could assist pathologists by providing robust and reproducible second opinions on DCIS grade. 导管原位癌 (DCIS) 是一种非浸润性乳腺癌，可进展为浸润性导管癌 (IDC)。研究表明，导管原位癌 (DCIS) 经常被过度治疗，因为相当一部分导管原位癌 (DCIS) 病变可能永远不会进展为 IDC。较低级别的病变具有较低的进展速度和风险，可能允许治疗降级。然而，研究表明 DCIS 分级存在显着的观察者间差异。自动图像分析可以提供客观的解决方案来解决病理学家对 DCIS 分级的高度主观性问题。在这项研究中，我们开发了一个基于深度学习的 DCIS 评分系统。它是根据三位专家观察员对来自 59 名患者的 1186 个 DCIS 病变的数据集的共识 DCIS 分级而开发的。通过二次加权科恩卡帕测量的观察者间一致性用于评估系统并将其性能与专家观察者的性能进行比较。我们对来自 50 名患者的 1001 个病变的独立测试集进行了病变级别和患者级别观察者间一致性的分析。深度学习系统 (dl) 与观察者（o1、o2 和 o3）之间的平均观察者间一致性（$κ_{o1,dl}=0.81，κ_{o2,dl}=0.53，κ_{o3,dl}=0.40$）比观察者之间的一致性（$κ_{o1,o2}=0.58， κ_{o1,o3}=0.50, κ_{o2,o3}=0.42$) 在病变水平。在患者层面，深度学习系统与观察者之间取得了相似的一致性（$κ_{o1,dl}=0.77，κ_{o2,dl}=0.75，κ_{o3,dl}=0.70$），而观察者之间也达到了相似的一致性（$κ_{o1,o2}=0.77，κ_{o1,o3}=0.75， κ_{o2,o3}=0.72$)。总之，我们开发了一种基于深度学习的 DCIS 评分系统，其性能与专家观察员相似。我们相信这是第一个可以通过提供关于 DCIS 分级的可靠且可重复的第二意见来帮助病理学家的自动化系统。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的乳腺导管原位癌（DCIS）分级系统，旨在通过自动化图像分析减少病理学家主观判断的差异。 Suzanne C. Wetstein,Nikolas Stathonikos,Josien P. W. Pluim,Yujing J. Heng,Natalie D. ter Hoeve,Celien P. H. Vreuls,Paul J. van Diest,Mitko Veta eess.IV,cs.CV

title: FairMixRep : Self-supervised Robust Representation Learning for Heterogeneous Data with Fairness constraints
title_zh: FairMixRep：具有公平性约束的异构数据的自监督鲁棒表示学习
comment: This paper has been accepted at the ICDM'2020 DLC Workshop
comments: This paper has been accepted at the ICDM'2020 DLC Workshop
abstract: Representation Learning in a heterogeneous space with mixed variables of numerical and categorical types has interesting challenges due to its complex feature manifold. Moreover, feature learning in an unsupervised setup, without class labels and a suitable learning loss function, adds to the problem complexity. Further, the learned representation and subsequent predictions should not reflect discriminatory behavior towards certain sensitive groups or attributes. The proposed feature map should preserve maximum variations present in the data and needs to be fair with respect to the sensitive variables. We propose, in the first phase of our work, an efficient encoder-decoder framework to capture the mixed-domain information. The second phase of our work focuses on de-biasing the mixed space representations by adding relevant fairness constraints. This ensures minimal information loss between the representations before and after the fairness-preserving projections. Both the information content and the fairness aspect of the final representation learned has been validated through several metrics where it shows excellent performance. Our work (FairMixRep) addresses the problem of Mixed Space Fair Representation learning from an unsupervised perspective and learns a Universal representation that is timely, unique, and a novel research contribution.
summary: Representation Learning in a heterogeneous space with mixed variables of numerical and categorical types has interesting challenges due to its complex feature manifold. Moreover, feature learning in an unsupervised setup, without class labels and a suitable learning loss function, adds to the problem complexity. Further, the learned representation and subsequent predictions should not reflect discriminatory behavior towards certain sensitive groups or attributes. The proposed feature map should preserve maximum variations present in the data and needs to be fair with respect to the sensitive variables. We propose, in the first phase of our work, an efficient encoder-decoder framework to capture the mixed-domain information. The second phase of our work focuses on de-biasing the mixed space representations by adding relevant fairness constraints. This ensures minimal information loss between the representations before and after the fairness-preserving projections. Both the information content and the fairness aspect of the final representation learned has been validated through several metrics where it shows excellent performance. Our work (FairMixRep) addresses the problem of Mixed Space Fair Representation learning from an unsupervised perspective and learns a Universal representation that is timely, unique, and a novel research contribution.
abstract_zh: 由于其复杂的特征流形，具有数值和分类类型混合变量的异构空间中的表示学习面临着有趣的挑战。此外，在无监督设置中进行特征学习，没有类标签和合适的学习损失函数，增加了问题的复杂性。此外，学习到的表示和随后的预测不应反映对某些敏感群体或属性的歧视行为。所提出的特征图应保留数据中存在的最大变化，并且需要对敏感变量保持公平。在我们工作的第一阶段，我们提出了一个有效的编码器-解码器框架来捕获混合域信息。我们工作的第二阶段重点是通过添加相关的公平性约束来消除混合空间表示的偏差。这确保了公平性保护预测之前和之后的表示之间的信息损失最小。最终学习到的表示的信息内容和公平性都已通过多个指标进行了验证，显示出出色的性能。我们的工作（FairMixRep）从无监督的角度解决了混合空间公平表示学习的问题，并学习了及时、独特且新颖的研究贡献的通用表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FairMixRep方法，在无监督环境下学习异构数据的公平表示，解决混合变量空间中的信息保留与公平性约束问题。
AI.motivation: 异构数据包含数值与类别变量，其复杂特征空间使表示学习面临挑战；同时需避免模型对敏感属性产生歧视，现有方法在无监督场景下难以兼顾信息保留与公平性。
AI.method: 分两阶段构建框架：第一阶段使用编码器-解码器捕捉混合域信息，第二阶段通过引入公平性约束进行去偏，最小化公平投影前后的信息损失。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在信息保留和公平性指标上均表现优异，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: FairMixRep为无监督异构数据公平表示学习提供了新颖且有效的解决方案，具有及时性和创新性。

title: Sonification of Facial Actions for Musical Expression
title_zh: 面部动作的声音化以表达音乐
comment: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2005 (NIME-05)
comments: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2005 (NIME-05)
abstract: The central role of the face in social interaction and non-verbal communication suggests we explore facial action as a means of musical expression. This paper presents the design, implementation, and preliminary studies of a novel system utilizing face detection and optic flow algorithms to associate facial movements with sound synthesis in a topographically specific fashion. We report on our experience with various gesture-to-sound mappings and applications, and describe our preliminary experiments at musical performance using the system.
summary: The central role of the face in social interaction and non-verbal communication suggests we explore facial action as a means of musical expression. This paper presents the design, implementation, and preliminary studies of a novel system utilizing face detection and optic flow algorithms to associate facial movements with sound synthesis in a topographically specific fashion. We report on our experience with various gesture-to-sound mappings and applications, and describe our preliminary experiments at musical performance using the system.
abstract_zh: 面部在社交互动和非语言交流中的核心作用表明我们将面部动作作为音乐表达的一种手段进行探索。本文介绍了一种新颖系统的设计、实现和初步研究，该系统利用人脸检测和光流算法以地形特定的方式将面部运动与声音合成相关联。我们报告了我们在各种手势到声音映射和应用方面的经验，并描述了我们使用该系统进行音乐表演的初步实验。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并实现了一种将面部动作转化为音乐表达的系统，通过面部检测和光流算法实现面部运动与声音合成的拓扑映射。
AI.motivation: 面部在社交互动和非语言交流中具有核心地位，探索面部动作作为音乐表达的新途径可增强人机交互的自然性和创造性。
AI.method: 结合面部检测技术与光流算法，建立面部运动与声音合成的拓扑映射关系，并通过多种手势-声音映射方案及音乐表演实验验证系统可行性。
AI.result: 成功开发出原型系统，并完成初步音乐表演测试，验证了面部动作驱动声音合成的潜力及不同映射方案的实现效果。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为音乐表演提供了新颖的交互界面，但需进一步优化映射算法和提升实时性以实现更自然的音乐表达。

search_text: Sonification of Facial Actions for Musical Expression 面部动作的声音化以表达音乐 The central role of the face in social interaction and non-verbal communication suggests we explore facial action as a means of musical expression. This paper presents the design, implementation, and preliminary studies of a novel system utilizing face detection and optic flow algorithms to associate facial movements with sound synthesis in a topographically specific fashion. We report on our experience with various gesture-to-sound mappings and applications, and describe our preliminary experiments at musical performance using the system. 面部在社交互动和非语言交流中的核心作用表明我们将面部动作作为音乐表达的一种手段进行探索。本文介绍了一种新颖系统的设计、实现和初步研究，该系统利用人脸检测和光流算法以地形特定的方式将面部运动与声音合成相关联。我们报告了我们在各种手势到声音映射和应用方面的经验，并描述了我们使用该系统进行音乐表演的初步实验。 本文设计并实现了一种将面部动作转化为音乐表达的系统，通过面部检测和光流算法实现面部运动与声音合成的拓扑映射。 Mathias Funk,Kazuhiro Kuwabara,Michael J. title: Unsupervised Evaluation for Question Answering with Transformers
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 进行问答的无监督评估
comment: 8 pages, to be published in the Proceedings of the 2020 EMNLP Workshop BlackboxNLP: Analysing and Interpreting Neural Networks for NLP
comments: 8 pages, to be published in the Proceedings of the 2020 EMNLP Workshop BlackboxNLP: Analysing and Interpreting Neural Networks for NLP
abstract: It is challenging to automatically evaluate the answer of a QA model at inference time. Although many models provide confidence scores, and simple heuristics can go a long way towards indicating answer correctness, such measures are heavily dataset-dependent and are unlikely to generalize. In this work, we begin by investigating the hidden representations of questions, answers, and contexts in transformer-based QA architectures. We observe a consistent pattern in the answer representations, which we show can be used to automatically evaluate whether or not a predicted answer span is correct. Our method does not require any labeled data and outperforms strong heuristic baselines, across 2 datasets and 7 domains. We are able to predict whether or not a model's answer is correct with 91.37% accuracy on SQuAD, and 80.7% accuracy on SubjQA. We expect that this method will have broad applications, e.g., in the semi-automatic development of QA datasets

abstract_zh: 在推理时自动评估 QA 模型的答案具有挑战性。尽管许多模型提供置信度分数，并且简单的启发式方法可以在很大程度上表明答案的正确性，但此类度量在很大程度上依赖于数据集，并且不太可能概括。在这项工作中，我们首先研究基于 Transformer 的 QA 架构中问题、答案和上下文的隐藏表示。我们观察到答案表示中存在一致的模式，我们证明该模式可用于自动评估预测的答案范围是否正确。我们的方法不需要任何标记数据，并且在 2 个数据集和 7 个领域中优于强大的启发式基线。我们能够预测模型的答案是否正确，在 SQuAD 上的准确度为 91.37%，在 SubjQA 上的准确度为 80.7%。我们预计该方法将具有广泛的应用，例如，在 QA 数据集的半自动开发中

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需监督的自动评估方法，用于判断基于Transformer的问答模型的答案是否正确。
AI.motivation: 现有问答模型的评估方法依赖于数据集特定的启发式规则，难以泛化，需一种通用且无需标注数据的评估方法。
AI.method: 通过分析Transformer模型中问题、答案和上下文的隐藏表示，利用答案表示中的模式自动判断预测答案的正确性。
AI.result: 在SQuAD数据集上达到91.37%的准确率，在SubjQA数据集上达到80.7%的准确率，优于现有启发式基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可广泛应用于问答数据集的半自动开发，为模型评估提供了一种无需标注数据的新途径。

authors_text: Zheng Wang,Rencheng Zheng,Edric John Cruz Nacpil,Kimihiko Nakano
title: Modeling and analysis of driver behavior under shared control through weighted visual and haptic guidance
title_zh: 通过加权视觉和触觉指导对共享控制下的驾驶员行为进行建模和分析
abstract: For the optimum design of a driver-automation shared control system, an understanding of driver behavior based on measurements and modeling is crucial early in the development process. This paper presents a driver model through a weighting process of visual guidance from the road ahead and haptic guidance from a steering system for a lane-following task. The proposed weighting process describes the interaction of a driver with the haptic guidance steering and the driver reliance on it. A driving simulator experiment is conducted to identify the model parameters for driving manually and with haptic guidance. The proposed driver model matched the driver input torque with a satisfactory goodness of fit among fourteen participants after considering the individual differences. The validation results reveal that the simulated trajectory effectively followed the driving course by matching the measured trajectory, thereby indicating that the proposed driver model is capable of predicting driver behavior during haptic guidance. Furthermore, the effect of different degrees of driver reliance on driving performance is evaluated considering various driver states and with system failure via numerical analysis. The model evaluation results reveal the potential of the proposed driver model to be applied in the design and evaluation of a haptic guidance system.
summary: For the optimum design of a driver-automation shared control system, an understanding of driver behavior based on measurements and modeling is crucial early in the development process. This paper presents a driver model through a weighting process of visual guidance from the road ahead and haptic guidance from a steering system for a lane-following task. The proposed weighting process describes the interaction of a driver with the haptic guidance steering and the driver reliance on it. A driving simulator experiment is conducted to identify the model parameters for driving manually and with haptic guidance. The proposed driver model matched the driver input torque with a satisfactory goodness of fit among fourteen participants after considering the individual differences. The validation results reveal that the simulated trajectory effectively followed the driving course by matching the measured trajectory, thereby indicating that the proposed driver model is capable of predicting driver behavior during haptic guidance. Furthermore, the effect of different degrees of driver reliance on driving performance is evaluated considering various driver states and with system failure via numerical analysis. The model evaluation results reveal the potential of the proposed driver model to be applied in the design and evaluation of a haptic guidance system.
abstract_zh: 为了实现驾驶员自动化共享控制系统的优化设计，在开发过程的早期基于测量和建模来了解驾驶员行为至关重要。本文提出了一种驾驶员模型，通过来自前方道路的视觉引导和来自转向系统的触觉引导的加权过程来完成车道跟踪任务。所提出的加权过程描述了驾驶员与触觉引导转向的交互以及驾驶员对其的依赖。进行驾驶模拟器实验来确定手动驾驶和触觉引导的模型参数。在考虑个体差异后，所提出的驾驶员模型将驾驶员输入扭矩与十四名参与者之间令人满意的拟合优度相匹配。验证结果表明，模拟轨迹通过与测量轨迹相匹配，有效地遵循了驾驶路线，从而表明所提出的驾驶员模型能够预测触觉引导期间的驾驶员行为。此外，通过数值分析，考虑不同的驾驶员状态和系统故障，评估不同程度的驾驶员依赖对驾驶性能的影响。模型评估结果揭示了所提出的驾驶员模型在触觉引导系统设计和评估中的应用潜力。

AI.tldr: 构建结合视觉与触觉引导权重的驾驶员行为模型，用于共享控制系统的优化设计。
AI.motivation: 共享控制系统设计需理解驾驶员在手动驾驶及触觉引导下的行为特征，以提升系统协同效率与安全性。
AI.method: 通过加权融合前方视觉信息与转向触觉反馈，建立驾驶员模型；利用驾驶模拟实验获取参数，并考虑个体差异进行验证与数值分析。
AI.result: 模型参数拟合度良好，轨迹预测与实际驾驶匹配度高，且能有效评估不同依赖程度对驾驶性能的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该模型可准确预测驾驶员行为，为触觉引导系统的开发与评估提供理论支持。

ai_content.tldr: 构建结合视觉与触觉引导权重的驾驶员行为模型，用于共享控制系统的优化设计。

The model evaluation results reveal the potential of the proposed driver model to be applied in the design and evaluation of a haptic guidance system. 为了实现驾驶员自动化共享控制系统的优化设计，在开发过程的早期基于测量和建模来了解驾驶员行为至关重要。本文提出了一种驾驶员模型，通过来自前方道路的视觉引导和来自转向系统的触觉引导的加权过程来完成车道跟踪任务。所提出的加权过程描述了驾驶员与触觉引导转向的交互以及驾驶员对其的依赖。进行驾驶模拟器实验来确定手动驾驶和触觉引导的模型参数。在考虑个体差异后，所提出的驾驶员模型将驾驶员输入扭矩与十四名参与者之间令人满意的拟合优度相匹配。验证结果表明，模拟轨迹通过与测量轨迹相匹配，有效地遵循了驾驶路线，从而表明所提出的驾驶员模型能够预测触觉引导期间的驾驶员行为。此外，通过数值分析，考虑不同的驾驶员状态和系统故障，评估不同程度的驾驶员依赖对驾驶性能的影响。模型评估结果揭示了所提出的驾驶员模型在触觉引导系统设计和评估中的应用潜力。 构建结合视觉与触觉引导权重的驾驶员行为模型，用于共享控制系统的优化设计。 Zheng Wang,Rencheng Zheng,Edric John Cruz Nacpil,Kimihiko Nakano cs.HC,cs.RO,eess.SY

title: Designing, Playing, and Performing with a Vision-based Mouth Interface
title_zh: 使用基于视觉的口界面进行设计、演奏和表演
comment: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2003
comments: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2003
abstract: The role of the face and mouth in speech production as well asnon-verbal communication suggests the use of facial action tocontrol musical sound. Here we document work on theMouthesizer, a system which uses a headworn miniaturecamera and computer vision algorithm to extract shapeparameters from the mouth opening and output these as MIDIcontrol changes. We report our experience with variousgesture-to-sound mappings and musical applications, anddescribe a live performance which used the Mouthesizerinterface.
summary: The role of the face and mouth in speech production as well asnon-verbal communication suggests the use of facial action tocontrol musical sound. Here we document work on theMouthesizer, a system which uses a headworn miniaturecamera and computer vision algorithm to extract shapeparameters from the mouth opening and output these as MIDIcontrol changes. We report our experience with variousgesture-to-sound mappings and musical applications, anddescribe a live performance which used the Mouthesizerinterface.
abstract_zh: 面部和嘴巴在言语产生以及非语言交流中的作用表明可以使用面部动作来控制音乐声音。在这里，我们记录了 Mouthesizer 的工作，该系统使用头戴式微型摄像头和计算机视觉算法从嘴部开口中提取形状参数，并将这些参数输出为 MIDI 控制变化。我们报告了我们在各种手势到声音映射和音乐应用程序方面的经验，并描述了使用 Moutthesizer 界面的现场表演。

AI.tldr: 设计并实现一种基于视觉的嘴巴接口系统，通过分析嘴巴动作生成MIDI控制信号以控制音乐
AI.motivation: 利用面部和嘴巴动作作为音乐控制的新途径，探索非传统交互方式在音乐表演中的应用
AI.method: 采用头戴式微型摄像头与计算机视觉算法提取嘴巴开口形状参数，将其映射为MIDI控制变化，实现音乐控制
AI.result: 成功开发出Mouthesizer系统，并通过多种音乐应用和现场表演验证了其可行性
AI.conclusion: 展示了基于视觉的嘴巴接口在音乐表演中的潜力，为非传统交互方式提供了创新案例

authors_text: Robert Lee,Daniel Ward,Akansel Cosgun,Vibhavari Dasagi,Peter Corke,Jurgen Leitner
title: Learning Arbitrary-Goal Fabric Folding with One Hour of Real Robot Experience
title_zh: 通过一小时的真实机器人体验学习任意目标织物折叠
abstract: Manipulating deformable objects, such as fabric, is a long standing problem in robotics, with state estimation and control posing a significant challenge for traditional methods. In this paper, we show that it is possible to learn fabric folding skills in only an hour of self-supervised real robot experience, without human supervision or simulation. Our approach relies on fully convolutional networks and the manipulation of visual inputs to exploit learned features, allowing us to create an expressive goal-conditioned pick and place policy that can be trained efficiently with real world robot data only. Folding skills are learned with only a sparse reward function and thus do not require reward function engineering, merely an image of the goal configuration. We demonstrate our method on a set of towel-folding tasks, and show that our approach is able to discover sequential folding strategies, purely from trial-and-error. We achieve state-of-the-art results without the need for demonstrations or simulation, used in prior approaches. Videos available at: https://sites.google.com/view/learningtofold
summary: Manipulating deformable objects, such as fabric, is a long standing problem in robotics, with state estimation and control posing a significant challenge for traditional methods. In this paper, we show that it is possible to learn fabric folding skills in only an hour of self-supervised real robot experience, without human supervision or simulation. Our approach relies on fully convolutional networks and the manipulation of visual inputs to exploit learned features, allowing us to create an expressive goal-conditioned pick and place policy that can be trained efficiently with real world robot data only. Folding skills are learned with only a sparse reward function and thus do not require reward function engineering, merely an image of the goal configuration. We demonstrate our method on a set of towel-folding tasks, and show that our approach is able to discover sequential folding strategies, purely from trial-and-error. We achieve state-of-the-art results without the need for demonstrations or simulation, used in prior approaches. Videos available at: https://sites.google.com/view/learningtofold
abstract_zh: 操纵可变形物体（例如织物）是机器人技术中长期存在的问题，状态估计和控制对传统方法构成了重大挑战。在本文中，我们证明了只需一个小时的自我监督真实机器人体验即可学习织物折叠技能，无需人工监督或模拟。我们的方法依赖于完全卷积网络和视觉输入的操纵来利用学习到的特征，使我们能够创建一个富有表现力的目标条件拾取和放置策略，该策略可以仅使用现实世界的机器人数据进行有效训练。折叠技能仅通过稀疏奖励函数学习，因此不需要奖励函数工程，仅需要目标配置的图像。我们在一组毛巾折叠任务上演示了我们的方法，并表明我们的方法能够纯粹通过反复试验来发现顺序折叠策略。我们无需使用先前方法中的演示或模拟即可获得最先进的结果。视频可访问：https://sites.google.com/view/learningtofold

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需人工监督或模拟的机器人学习方法，仅通过一小时的真实机器人操作经验，学会完成任意目标的布料折叠任务。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理可变形物体（如布料）的操控时面临状态估计和控制难题，而现有方法常依赖模拟或人工演示，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 采用全卷积网络处理视觉输入，通过稀疏奖励函数训练目标条件化的抓取与放置策略，仅需真实世界数据即可高效学习折叠技能。
AI.result: 在毛巾折叠任务中实现最先进的效果，无需演示或模拟，通过试错发现顺序折叠策略，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明了通过真实机器人经验直接学习复杂变形物体操控的可能性，为无监督、无模拟的机器人技能学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Bodhisattwa Prasad Majumder,Harsh Jhamtani,Taylor Berg-Kirkpatrick,Julian McAuley
title: Like hiking? You probably enjoy nature: Persona-grounded Dialog with Commonsense Expansions
title_zh: 喜欢徒步旅行吗？您可能喜欢大自然：基于角色的对话与常识扩展
abstract: Existing persona-grounded dialog models often fail to capture simple implications of given persona descriptions, something which humans are able to do seamlessly. For example, state-of-the-art models cannot infer that interest in hiking might imply love for nature or longing for a break. In this paper, we propose to expand available persona sentences using existing commonsense knowledge bases and paraphrasing resources to imbue dialog models with access to an expanded and richer set of persona descriptions. Additionally, we introduce fine-grained grounding on personas by encouraging the model to make a discrete choice among persona sentences while synthesizing a dialog response. Since such a choice is not observed in the data, we model it using a discrete latent random variable and use variational learning to sample from hundreds of persona expansions. Our model outperforms competitive baselines on the PersonaChat dataset in terms of dialog quality and diversity while achieving persona-consistent and controllable dialog generation.
summary: Existing persona-grounded dialog models often fail to capture simple implications of given persona descriptions, something which humans are able to do seamlessly. For example, state-of-the-art models cannot infer that interest in hiking might imply love for nature or longing for a break. In this paper, we propose to expand available persona sentences using existing commonsense knowledge bases and paraphrasing resources to imbue dialog models with access to an expanded and richer set of persona descriptions. Additionally, we introduce fine-grained grounding on personas by encouraging the model to make a discrete choice among persona sentences while synthesizing a dialog response. Since such a choice is not observed in the data, we model it using a discrete latent random variable and use variational learning to sample from hundreds of persona expansions. Our model outperforms competitive baselines on the PersonaChat dataset in terms of dialog quality and diversity while achieving persona-consistent and controllable dialog generation.
abstract_zh: 现有的基于角色的对话模型通常无法捕获给定角色描述的简单含义，而人类可以无缝地做到这一点。例如，最先进的模型无法推断出对徒步旅行的兴趣可能意味着对自然的热爱或渴望休息。在本文中，我们建议使用现有的常识知识库和释义资源来扩展可用的角色句子，以使对话模型能够访问扩展且更丰富的角色描述集。此外，我们通过鼓励模型在合成对话响应时在角色句子中做出离散选择，引入了角色模型的细粒度基础。由于在数据中没有观察到这样的选择，我们使用离散潜在随机变量对其进行建模，并使用变分学习从数百个角色扩展中进行采样。我们的模型在对话质量和多样性方面优于 PersonaChat 数据集上的竞争基准，同时实现了角色一致且可控的对话生成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过常识知识库和重述资源扩展人物描述，提升基于人物设定的对话生成模型的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有基于人物设定的对话模型难以捕捉人物描述中的简单隐含信息，例如无法从‘喜欢徒步旅行’推断出‘热爱自然’等常识关联。
AI.method: 利用常识知识库和重述资源扩展人物描述，并引入离散潜在变量通过变分学习从数百个扩展描述中采样，实现细粒度人物设定对齐。
AI.result: 在PersonaChat数据集上，模型在对话质量和多样性指标上优于现有基线，同时生成更符合人物设定且可控的对话。
AI.conclusion: 通过常识扩展和离散潜在变量建模，可有效提升对话模型对人物设定的深层理解和生成能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出通过常识知识库和重述资源扩展人物描述，提升基于人物设定的对话生成模型的表现。

ai_content.result: 在PersonaChat数据集上，模型在对话质量和多样性指标上优于现有基线，同时生成更符合人物设定且可控的对话。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过常识扩展和离散潜在变量建模，可有效提升对话模型对人物设定的深层理解和生成能力。

method: 利用常识知识库和重述资源扩展人物描述，并引入离散潜在变量通过变分学习从数百个扩展描述中采样，实现细粒度人物设定对齐。

search_text: Like hiking? You probably enjoy nature: Persona-grounded Dialog with Commonsense Expansions 喜欢徒步旅行吗？您可能喜欢大自然：基于角色的对话与常识扩展 Existing persona-grounded dialog models often fail to capture simple implications of given persona descriptions, something which humans are able to do seamlessly. For example, state-of-the-art models cannot infer that interest in hiking might imply love for nature or longing for a break. In this paper, we propose to expand available persona sentences using existing commonsense knowledge bases and paraphrasing resources to imbue dialog models with access to an expanded and richer set of persona descriptions. Additionally, we introduce fine-grained grounding on personas by encouraging the model to make a discrete choice among persona sentences while synthesizing a dialog response. Since such a choice is not observed in the data, we model it using a discrete latent random variable and use variational learning to sample from hundreds of persona expansions. Our model outperforms competitive baselines on the PersonaChat dataset in terms of dialog quality and diversity while achieving persona-consistent and controllable dialog generation. 现有的基于角色的对话模型通常无法捕获给定角色描述的简单含义，而人类可以无缝地做到这一点。例如，最先进的模型无法推断出对徒步旅行的兴趣可能意味着对自然的热爱或渴望休息。在本文中，我们建议使用现有的常识知识库和释义资源来扩展可用的角色句子，以使对话模型能够访问扩展且更丰富的角色描述集。此外，我们通过鼓励模型在合成对话响应时在角色句子中做出离散选择，引入了角色模型的细粒度基础。由于在数据中没有观察到这样的选择，我们使用离散潜在随机变量对其进行建模，并使用变分学习从数百个角色扩展中进行采样。我们的模型在对话质量和多样性方面优于 PersonaChat 数据集上的竞争基准，同时实现了角色一致且可控的对话生成。 本文提出通过常识知识库和重述资源扩展人物描述，提升基于人物设定的对话生成模型的表现。 Bodhisattwa Prasad Majumder,Harsh Jhamtani,Taylor Berg-Kirkpatrick,Julian McAuley cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Yan Yang,Md Zakir Hossain,Tom Gedeon,Shafin Rahman
title: RealSmileNet: A Deep End-To-End Network for Spontaneous and Posed Smile Recognition
title_zh: RealSmileNet：用于自发微笑和姿势微笑识别的深度端到端网络
abstract: Smiles play a vital role in the understanding of social interactions within different communities, and reveal the physical state of mind of people in both real and deceptive ways. Several methods have been proposed to recognize spontaneous and posed smiles. All follow a feature-engineering based pipeline requiring costly pre-processing steps such as manual annotation of face landmarks, tracking, segmentation of smile phases, and hand-crafted features. The resulting computation is expensive, and strongly dependent on pre-processing steps. We investigate an end-to-end deep learning model to address these problems, the first end-to-end model for spontaneous and posed smile recognition. Our fully automated model is fast and learns the feature extraction processes by training a series of convolution and ConvLSTM layer from scratch. Our experiments on four datasets demonstrate the robustness and generalization of the proposed model by achieving state-of-the-art performances.
summary: Smiles play a vital role in the understanding of social interactions within different communities, and reveal the physical state of mind of people in both real and deceptive ways. Several methods have been proposed to recognize spontaneous and posed smiles. All follow a feature-engineering based pipeline requiring costly pre-processing steps such as manual annotation of face landmarks, tracking, segmentation of smile phases, and hand-crafted features. The resulting computation is expensive, and strongly dependent on pre-processing steps. We investigate an end-to-end deep learning model to address these problems, the first end-to-end model for spontaneous and posed smile recognition. Our fully automated model is fast and learns the feature extraction processes by training a series of convolution and ConvLSTM layer from scratch. Our experiments on four datasets demonstrate the robustness and generalization of the proposed model by achieving state-of-the-art performances.
abstract_zh: 微笑对于理解不同社区内的社交互动起着至关重要的作用，并以真实和欺骗的方式揭示人们的身体心理状态。已经提出了几种方法来识别自发的微笑和摆出的微笑。所有这些都遵循基于特征工程的流程，需要昂贵的预处理步骤，例如面部标志的手动注释、跟踪、微笑阶段的分割和手工制作的特征。由此产生的计算成本很高，并且强烈依赖于预处理步骤。我们研究了一种端到端深度学习模型来解决这些问题，这是第一个用于自发和摆出微笑识别的端到端模型。我们的全自动模型速度很快，并通过从头开始训练一系列卷积和 ConvLSTM 层来学习特征提取过程。我们对四个数据集的实验通过实现最先进的性能证明了所提出模型的鲁棒性和泛化性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RealSmileNet，一种端到端深度学习网络，用于自动识别自发性和摆拍微笑，避免传统方法复杂的预处理步骤。
AI.motivation: 现有微笑识别方法依赖耗时的手动标注、跟踪和特征工程，计算成本高且依赖预处理，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 设计端到端网络，通过卷积层和ConvLSTM层从头学习特征，无需预处理步骤，实现全自动微笑识别。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上验证模型，证明其鲁棒性和泛化能力，达到当时最先进的性能指标。
AI.conclusion: 端到端深度学习有效解决传统方法局限性，为微笑识别提供高效自动化方案，推动相关研究发展。

authors_text: Xuelin Qian,Huazhu Fu,Weiya Shi,Tao Chen,Yanwei Fu,Fei Shan,Xiangyang Xue
title: M3Lung-Sys: A Deep Learning System for Multi-Class Lung Pneumonia Screening from CT Imaging
title_zh: M3Lung-Sys：用于 CT 成像多类肺部肺炎筛查的深度学习系统
comment: IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics (JBHI), 2020
comments: IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics (JBHI), 2020
abstract: To counter the outbreak of COVID-19, the accurate diagnosis of suspected cases plays a crucial role in timely quarantine, medical treatment, and preventing the spread of the pandemic. Considering the limited training cases and resources (e.g, time and budget), we propose a Multi-task Multi-slice Deep Learning System (M3Lung-Sys) for multi-class lung pneumonia screening from CT imaging, which only consists of two 2D CNN networks, i.e., slice- and patient-level classification networks. The former aims to seek the feature representations from abundant CT slices instead of limited CT volumes, and for the overall pneumonia screening, the latter one could recover the temporal information by feature refinement and aggregation between different slices. In addition to distinguish COVID-19 from Healthy, H1N1, and CAP cases, our M 3 Lung-Sys also be able to locate the areas of relevant lesions, without any pixel-level annotation. To further demonstrate the effectiveness of our model, we conduct extensive experiments on a chest CT imaging dataset with a total of 734 patients (251 healthy people, 245 COVID-19 patients, 105 H1N1 patients, and 133 CAP patients). The quantitative results with plenty of metrics indicate the superiority of our proposed model on both slice- and patient-level classification tasks. More importantly, the generated lesion location maps make our system interpretable and more valuable to clinicians.
summary: To counter the outbreak of COVID-19, the accurate diagnosis of suspected cases plays a crucial role in timely quarantine, medical treatment, and preventing the spread of the pandemic. Considering the limited training cases and resources (e.g, time and budget), we propose a Multi-task Multi-slice Deep Learning System (M3Lung-Sys) for multi-class lung pneumonia screening from CT imaging, which only consists of two 2D CNN networks, i.e., slice- and patient-level classification networks. The former aims to seek the feature representations from abundant CT slices instead of limited CT volumes, and for the overall pneumonia screening, the latter one could recover the temporal information by feature refinement and aggregation between different slices. In addition to distinguish COVID-19 from Healthy, H1N1, and CAP cases, our M 3 Lung-Sys also be able to locate the areas of relevant lesions, without any pixel-level annotation. To further demonstrate the effectiveness of our model, we conduct extensive experiments on a chest CT imaging dataset with a total of 734 patients (251 healthy people, 245 COVID-19 patients, 105 H1N1 patients, and 133 CAP patients). The quantitative results with plenty of metrics indicate the superiority of our proposed model on both slice- and patient-level classification tasks. More importantly, the generated lesion location maps make our system interpretable and more valuable to clinicians.
abstract_zh: 为应对新型冠状病毒肺炎（COVID-19）疫情，疑似病例的准确诊断对于及时隔离、医疗救治、防止疫情蔓延发挥着至关重要的作用。考虑到有限的训练案例和资源（例如时间和预算），我们提出了一种用于 CT 成像多类肺部肺炎筛查的多任务多切片深度学习系统（M3Lung-Sys），该系统仅由两个 2D CNN 网络组成，即切片级分类网络和患者级分类网络。前者旨在从丰富的CT切片而不是有限的CT体积中寻求特征表示，而对于整体肺炎筛查，后者可以通过不同切片之间的特征细化和聚合来恢复时间信息。除了区分 COVID-19 与健康病例、H1N1 病例和 CAP 病例外，我们的 M 3 Lung-Sys 还能够定位相关病变区域，无需任何像素级注释。为了进一步证明我们模型的有效性，我们对总共 734 名患者（251 名健康人、245 名 COVID-19 患者、105 名 H1N1 患者和 133 名 CAP 患者）的胸部 CT 成像数据集进行了广泛的实验。具有大量指标的定量结果表明我们提出的模型在切片和患者级别分类任务上的优越性。更重要的是，生成的病变位置图使我们的系统易于解释，对临床医生更有价值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的多任务系统M3Lung-Sys，用于通过CT影像进行多类肺部肺炎筛查。
AI.motivation: 针对新冠疫情中肺炎诊断的迫切需求，解决训练数据有限及资源不足的问题，同时实现多类别区分与病灶定位。
AI.method: 构建包含两个2D CNN网络的系统：切片级分类网络提取多切片特征，患者级网络通过特征聚合恢复时序信息，无需像素级标注即可定位病灶。
AI.result: 在734例患者数据集（含健康、COVID-19、H1N1、CAP四类）上，模型在切片级和患者级分类任务中均表现优异，且生成的病灶热图提升可解释性。
AI.conclusion: M3Lung-Sys在多类肺炎筛查中具有优越性能，其可解释性设计为临床实践提供了有效工具。

To further demonstrate the effectiveness of our model, we conduct extensive experiments on a chest CT imaging dataset with a total of 734 patients (251 healthy people, 245 COVID-19 patients, 105 H1N1 patients, and 133 CAP patients). More importantly, the generated lesion location maps make our system interpretable and more valuable to clinicians. 为应对新型冠状病毒肺炎（COVID-19）疫情，疑似病例的准确诊断对于及时隔离、医疗救治、防止疫情蔓延发挥着至关重要的作用。考虑到有限的训练案例和资源（例如时间和预算），我们提出了一种用于 CT 成像多类肺部肺炎筛查的多任务多切片深度学习系统（M3Lung-Sys），该系统仅由两个 2D CNN 网络组成，即切片级分类网络和患者级分类网络。前者旨在从丰富的CT切片而不是有限的CT体积中寻求特征表示，而对于整体肺炎筛查，后者可以通过不同切片之间的特征细化和聚合来恢复时间信息。除了区分 COVID-19 与健康病例、H1N1 病例和 CAP 病例外，我们的 M 3 Lung-Sys 还能够定位相关病变区域，无需任何像素级注释。为了进一步证明我们模型的有效性，我们对总共 734 名患者（251 名健康人、245 名 COVID-19 患者、105 名 H1N1 患者和 133 名 CAP 患者）的胸部 CT 成像数据集进行了广泛的实验。具有大量指标的定量结果表明我们提出的模型在切片和患者级别分类任务上的优越性。更重要的是，生成的病变位置图使我们的系统易于解释，对临床医生更有价值。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的多任务系统M3Lung-Sys，用于通过CT影像进行多类肺部肺炎筛查。 Xuelin Qian,Huazhu Fu,Weiya Shi,Tao Chen,Yanwei Fu,Fei Shan,Xiangyang Xue eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: WDN: A Wide and Deep Network to Divide-and-Conquer Image Super-resolution
title_zh: WDN：用于分而治之图像超分辨率的宽而深的网络
abstract: Divide and conquer is an established algorithm design paradigm that has proven itself to solve a variety of problems efficiently. However, it is yet to be fully explored in solving problems with a neural network, particularly the problem of image super-resolution. In this work, we propose an approach to divide the problem of image super-resolution into multiple sub-problems and then solve/conquer them with the help of a neural network. Unlike a typical deep neural network, we design an alternate network architecture that is much wider (along with being deeper) than existing networks and is specially designed to implement the divide-and-conquer design paradigm with a neural network. Additionally, a technique to calibrate the intensities of feature map pixels is being introduced. Extensive experimentation on five datasets reveals that our approach towards the problem and the proposed architecture generate better and sharper results than current state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Divide and conquer is an established algorithm design paradigm that has proven itself to solve a variety of problems efficiently. However, it is yet to be fully explored in solving problems with a neural network, particularly the problem of image super-resolution. In this work, we propose an approach to divide the problem of image super-resolution into multiple sub-problems and then solve/conquer them with the help of a neural network. Unlike a typical deep neural network, we design an alternate network architecture that is much wider (along with being deeper) than existing networks and is specially designed to implement the divide-and-conquer design paradigm with a neural network. Additionally, a technique to calibrate the intensities of feature map pixels is being introduced. Extensive experimentation on five datasets reveals that our approach towards the problem and the proposed architecture generate better and sharper results than current state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 分而治之是一种既定的算法设计范式，已证明可以有效地解决各种问题。然而，神经网络在解决问题方面尚未得到充分探索，特别是图像超分辨率问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种将图像超分辨率问题划分为多个子问题的方法，然后借助神经网络来解决/征服它们。与典型的深度神经网络不同，我们设计了一种替代网络架构，它比现有网络更宽（也更深），并且专门设计用于使用神经网络实现分而治之的设计范例。此外，还引入了一种校准特征图像素强度的技术。对五个数据集的广泛实验表明，我们解决问题的方法和提出的架构比当前最先进的方法产生了更好、更清晰的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为WDN的宽深网络，通过分而治之的策略解决图像超分辨率问题。
AI.motivation: 分而治之算法虽在传统领域广泛应用，但尚未在神经网络中充分探索，尤其在图像超分辨率任务中存在改进空间。
AI.method: 设计更宽更深的网络架构实现分而治之策略，并引入特征图像素强度校准技术以提升重建质量。
AI.result: 在五个数据集上实验表明，该方法生成的图像比现有最先进方法更清晰且细节更丰富。
AI.conclusion: 分而治之策略结合宽深网络架构能有效提升图像超分辨率性能，验证了该范式在神经网络中的可行性。
