authors_text: Ekta U. Samani,Xingjian Yang,Ashis G. Banerjee
title: Visual Object Recognition in Indoor Environments Using Topologically Persistent Features
title_zh: 使用拓扑持久特征的室内环境中的视觉对象识别
comment: This work has been accepted for publication in the IEEE Robotics And Automation Letters
comments: This work has been accepted for publication in the IEEE Robotics And Automation Letters
abstract: Object recognition in unseen indoor environments remains a challenging problem for visual perception of mobile robots. In this letter, we propose the use of topologically persistent features, which rely on the objects' shape information, to address this challenge. In particular, we extract two kinds of features, namely, sparse persistence image (PI) and amplitude, by applying persistent homology to multi-directional height function-based filtrations of the cubical complexes representing the object segmentation maps. The features are then used to train a fully connected network for recognition. For performance evaluation, in addition to a widely used shape dataset and a benchmark indoor scenes dataset, we collect a new dataset, comprising scene images from two different environments, namely, a living room and a mock warehouse. The scenes are captured using varying camera poses under different illumination conditions and include up to five different objects from a given set of fourteen objects. On the benchmark indoor scenes dataset, sparse PI features show better recognition performance in unseen environments than the features learned using the widely used ResNetV2-56 and EfficientNet-B4 models. Further, they provide slightly higher recall and accuracy values than Faster R-CNN, an end-to-end object detection method, and its state-of-the-art variant, Domain Adaptive Faster R-CNN. The performance of our methods also remains relatively unchanged from the training environment (living room) to the unseen environment (mock warehouse) in the new dataset. In contrast, the performance of the object detection methods drops substantially. We also implement the proposed method on a real-world robot to demonstrate its usefulness.
summary: Object recognition in unseen indoor environments remains a challenging problem for visual perception of mobile robots. In this letter, we propose the use of topologically persistent features, which rely on the objects' shape information, to address this challenge. In particular, we extract two kinds of features, namely, sparse persistence image (PI) and amplitude, by applying persistent homology to multi-directional height function-based filtrations of the cubical complexes representing the object segmentation maps. The features are then used to train a fully connected network for recognition. For performance evaluation, in addition to a widely used shape dataset and a benchmark indoor scenes dataset, we collect a new dataset, comprising scene images from two different environments, namely, a living room and a mock warehouse. The scenes are captured using varying camera poses under different illumination conditions and include up to five different objects from a given set of fourteen objects. On the benchmark indoor scenes dataset, sparse PI features show better recognition performance in unseen environments than the features learned using the widely used ResNetV2-56 and EfficientNet-B4 models. Further, they provide slightly higher recall and accuracy values than Faster R-CNN, an end-to-end object detection method, and its state-of-the-art variant, Domain Adaptive Faster R-CNN. The performance of our methods also remains relatively unchanged from the training environment (living room) to the unseen environment (mock warehouse) in the new dataset. In contrast, the performance of the object detection methods drops substantially. We also implement the proposed method on a real-world robot to demonstrate its usefulness.
abstract_zh: 对于移动机器人的视觉感知来说，看不见的室内环境中的物体识别仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。在这封信中，我们建议使用依赖于对象形状信息的拓扑持久特征来解决这一挑战。特别是，我们通过将持久同源应用于表示对象分割图的立方复合体的基于多向高度函数的过滤来提取两种特征，即稀疏持久图像（PI）和幅度。然后使用这些特征来训练全连接网络进行识别。为了进行性能评估，除了广泛使用的形状数据集和基准室内场景数据集之外，我们还收集了一个新的数据集，其中包含来自两个不同环境（即客厅和模拟仓库）的场景图像。这些场景是在不同的照明条件下使用不同的相机姿势捕获的，并且包括给定的十四个对象中最多五个不同的对象。在基准室内场景数据集上，稀疏 PI 特征在不可见的环境中表现出比使用广泛使用的 ResNetV2-56 和 EfficientNet-B4 模型学习的特征更好的识别性能。此外，它们提供比 Faster R-CNN（一种端到端对象检测方法）及其最先进的变体 Domain Adaptive Faster R-CNN 稍高的召回率和准确率值。从训练环境（客厅）到新数据集中看不见的环境（模拟仓库），我们的方法的性能也保持相对不变。相比之下，目标检测方法的性能大幅下降。我们还在现实世界的机器人上实现了所提出的方法，以证明其有用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用拓扑持久特征进行室内环境中的视觉物体识别，以解决移动机器人在未见过的室内环境中感知的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在未见过的室内环境中物体识别效果不佳，需开发更鲁棒的特征提取方法以适应不同光照和视角变化。
AI.method: 通过持续同调分析多方向高度函数过滤的立方体复形，提取稀疏持续图像（PI）和振幅特征，并训练全连接网络进行识别。同时构建包含客厅和模拟仓库场景的新数据集进行评估。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上，稀疏PI特征优于ResNetV2-56和EfficientNet-B4模型，在新数据集中从训练环境（客厅）到未见过环境（模拟仓库）性能稳定，而目标检测方法性能显著下降。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑持久特征能有效提升未见过室内环境中的物体识别鲁棒性，为移动机器人实际应用提供可行方案。

authors_text: Anshuman Tripathi,Jaeyoung Kim,Qian Zhang,Han Lu,Hasim Sak
title: Transformer Transducer: One Model Unifying Streaming and Non-streaming Speech Recognition
title_zh: Transformer Transducer：统一流式和非流式语音识别的一种模型
abstract: In this paper we present a Transformer-Transducer model architecture and a training technique to unify streaming and non-streaming speech recognition models into one model. The model is composed of a stack of transformer layers for audio encoding with no lookahead or right context and an additional stack of transformer layers on top trained with variable right context. In inference time, the context length for the variable context layers can be changed to trade off the latency and the accuracy of the model. We also show that we can run this model in a Y-model architecture with the top layers running in parallel in low latency and high latency modes. This allows us to have streaming speech recognition results with limited latency and delayed speech recognition results with large improvements in accuracy (20% relative improvement for voice-search task). We show that with limited right context (1-2 seconds of audio) and small additional latency (50-100 milliseconds) at the end of decoding, we can achieve similar accuracy with models using unlimited audio right context. We also present optimizations for audio and label encoders to speed up the inference in streaming and non-streaming speech decoding.
summary: In this paper we present a Transformer-Transducer model architecture and a training technique to unify streaming and non-streaming speech recognition models into one model. The model is composed of a stack of transformer layers for audio encoding with no lookahead or right context and an additional stack of transformer layers on top trained with variable right context. In inference time, the context length for the variable context layers can be changed to trade off the latency and the accuracy of the model. We also show that we can run this model in a Y-model architecture with the top layers running in parallel in low latency and high latency modes. This allows us to have streaming speech recognition results with limited latency and delayed speech recognition results with large improvements in accuracy (20% relative improvement for voice-search task). We show that with limited right context (1-2 seconds of audio) and small additional latency (50-100 milliseconds) at the end of decoding, we can achieve similar accuracy with models using unlimited audio right context. We also present optimizations for audio and label encoders to speed up the inference in streaming and non-streaming speech decoding.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种 Transformer-Transducer 模型架构和一种训练技术，将流式和非流式语音识别模型统一为一个模型。该模型由一堆用于音频编码的变压器层组成，没有前瞻或右上下文，以及顶部的附加变压器层堆栈，使用可变的右上下文进行训练。在推理时间内，可以更改可变上下文层的上下文长度，以权衡模型的延迟和准确性。我们还表明，我们可以在 Y 模型架构中运行该模型，其中顶层在低延迟和高延迟模式下并行运行。这使我们能够获得延迟有限的流式语音识别结果和延迟语音识别结果，并且准确性大幅提高（语音搜索任务相对提高 20%）。我们证明，在解码结束时，在有限的正确上下文（1-2 秒的音频）和较小的额外延迟（50-100 毫秒）的情况下，我们可以使用使用无限音频正确上下文的模型实现类似的准确性。我们还提出了对音频和标签编码器的优化，以加速流式和非流式语音解码中的推理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一流式与非流式语音识别的Transformer-Transducer模型架构。
AI.motivation: 现有流式和非流式语音识别模型分别存在延迟高或精度低的矛盾，需设计兼顾两者优势的统一模型。
AI.method: 采用双栈Transformer结构，底层无右上下文实现流式推理，顶层通过可变右上下文调整延迟-精度平衡，并引入Y型并行架构支持高低延迟模式切换。
AI.result: 在语音搜索任务中实现20%相对准确率提升，1-2秒右上下文配合50-100ms延迟即可达到非流式模型精度，推理优化提升解码速度。
AI.conclusion: 该模型成功融合流式与非流式优势，在保持低延迟的同时显著提升识别精度，优化后的架构有效支持实时与高精度场景需求。

search_text: Transformer Transducer: One Model Unifying Streaming and Non-streaming Speech Recognition Transformer Transducer：统一流式和非流式语音识别的一种模型 In this paper we present a Transformer-Transducer model architecture and a training technique to unify streaming and non-streaming speech recognition models into one model. The model is composed of a stack of transformer layers for audio encoding with no lookahead or right context and an additional stack of transformer layers on top trained with variable right context. In inference time, the context length for the variable context layers can be changed to trade off the latency and the accuracy of the model. We also show that we can run this model in a Y-model architecture with the top layers running in parallel in low latency and high latency modes. This allows us to have streaming speech recognition results with limited latency and delayed speech recognition results with large improvements in accuracy (20% relative improvement for voice-search task). We show that with limited right context (1-2 seconds of audio) and small additional latency (50-100 milliseconds) at the end of decoding, we can achieve similar accuracy with models using unlimited audio right context. We also present optimizations for audio and label encoders to speed up the inference in streaming and non-streaming speech decoding. 在本文中，我们提出了一种 Transformer-Transducer 模型架构和一种训练技术，将流式和非流式语音识别模型统一为一个模型。该模型由一堆用于音频编码的变压器层组成，没有前瞻或右上下文，以及顶部的附加变压器层堆栈，使用可变的右上下文进行训练。在推理时间内，可以更改可变上下文层的上下文长度，以权衡模型的延迟和准确性。我们还表明，我们可以在 Y 模型架构中运行该模型，其中顶层在低延迟和高延迟模式下并行运行。这使我们能够获得延迟有限的流式语音识别结果和延迟语音识别结果，并且准确性大幅提高（语音搜索任务相对提高 20%）。我们证明，在解码结束时，在有限的正确上下文（1-2 秒的音频）和较小的额外延迟（50-100 毫秒）的情况下，我们可以使用使用无限音频正确上下文的模型实现类似的准确性。我们还提出了对音频和标签编码器的优化，以加速流式和非流式语音解码中的推理。 本文提出一种统一流式与非流式语音识别的Transformer-Transducer模型架构。 Anshuman Tripathi,Jaeyoung Kim,Qian Zhang,Han Lu,Hasim Sak cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

title: Generative Melody Composition with Human-in-the-Loop Bayesian Optimization
title_zh: 具有人在环贝叶斯优化的生成旋律创作
comment: 10 pages, 2 figures, Proceedings of the 2020 Joint Conference on AI Music Creativity (CSMC-MuMe 2020)
comments: 10 pages, 2 figures, Proceedings of the 2020 Joint Conference on AI Music Creativity (CSMC-MuMe 2020)
abstract: Deep generative models allow even novice composers to generate various melodies by sampling latent vectors. However, finding the desired melody is challenging since the latent space is unintuitive and high-dimensional. In this work, we present an interactive system that supports generative melody composition with human-in-the-loop Bayesian optimization (BO). This system takes a mixed-initiative approach; the system generates candidate melodies to evaluate, and the user evaluates them and provides preferential feedback (i.e., picking the best melody among the candidates) to the system. This process is iteratively performed based on BO techniques until the user finds the desired melody. We conducted a pilot study using our prototype system, suggesting the potential of this approach.
summary: Deep generative models allow even novice composers to generate various melodies by sampling latent vectors. However, finding the desired melody is challenging since the latent space is unintuitive and high-dimensional. In this work, we present an interactive system that supports generative melody composition with human-in-the-loop Bayesian optimization (BO). This system takes a mixed-initiative approach; the system generates candidate melodies to evaluate, and the user evaluates them and provides preferential feedback (i.e., picking the best melody among the candidates) to the system. This process is iteratively performed based on BO techniques until the user finds the desired melody. We conducted a pilot study using our prototype system, suggesting the potential of this approach.
abstract_zh: 深度生成模型甚至允许新手作曲家通过采样潜在向量来生成各种旋律。然而，找到所需的旋律具有挑战性，因为潜在空间是不直观且高维的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个交互式系统，支持通过人机循环贝叶斯优化（BO）生成旋律创作。该系统采用混合主动方法；系统生成候选旋律进行评估，用户对其进行评估并向系统提供优先反馈（即在候选旋律中选择最佳旋律）。这个过程基于 BO 技术迭代执行，直到用户找到所需的旋律。我们使用我们的原型系统进行了一项试点研究，表明了这种方法的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合人类反馈的贝叶斯优化交互系统，用于生成用户满意的旋律。
AI.motivation: 深度生成模型虽能生成旋律，但高维潜在空间难以直观控制，用户难以找到理想结果。
AI.method: 采用人机协作的贝叶斯优化框架，系统生成候选旋律并收集用户偏好反馈进行迭代优化。
AI.result: 原型系统试点研究表明该方法具有生成符合用户预期旋律的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 人类反馈驱动的贝叶斯优化能有效提升生成旋律的质量与用户满意度。

authors_text: Soyeon Caren Han,Siqu Long,Siwen Luo,Kunze Wang,Josiah Poon
title: VICTR: Visual Information Captured Text Representation for Text-to-Image Multimodal Tasks
title_zh: VICTR：用于文本到图像多模式任务的视觉信息捕获文本表示
abstract: Text-to-image multimodal tasks, generating/retrieving an image from a given text description, are extremely challenging tasks since raw text descriptions cover quite limited information in order to fully describe visually realistic images. We propose a new visual contextual text representation for text-to-image multimodal tasks, VICTR, which captures rich visual semantic information of objects from the text input. First, we use the text description as initial input and conduct dependency parsing to extract the syntactic structure and analyse the semantic aspect, including object quantities, to extract the scene graph. Then, we train the extracted objects, attributes, and relations in the scene graph and the corresponding geometric relation information using Graph Convolutional Networks, and it generates text representation which integrates textual and visual semantic information. The text representation is aggregated with word-level and sentence-level embedding to generate both visual contextual word and sentence representation. For the evaluation, we attached VICTR to the state-of-the-art models in text-to-image generation.VICTR is easily added to existing models and improves across both quantitative and qualitative aspects.
summary: Text-to-image multimodal tasks, generating/retrieving an image from a given text description, are extremely challenging tasks since raw text descriptions cover quite limited information in order to fully describe visually realistic images. We propose a new visual contextual text representation for text-to-image multimodal tasks, VICTR, which captures rich visual semantic information of objects from the text input. First, we use the text description as initial input and conduct dependency parsing to extract the syntactic structure and analyse the semantic aspect, including object quantities, to extract the scene graph. Then, we train the extracted objects, attributes, and relations in the scene graph and the corresponding geometric relation information using Graph Convolutional Networks, and it generates text representation which integrates textual and visual semantic information. The text representation is aggregated with word-level and sentence-level embedding to generate both visual contextual word and sentence representation. For the evaluation, we attached VICTR to the state-of-the-art models in text-to-image generation.VICTR is easily added to existing models and improves across both quantitative and qualitative aspects.
abstract_zh: 文本到图像多模态任务，从给定的文本描述生成/检索图像，是极具挑战性的任务，因为原始文本描述覆盖的信息非常有限，无法充分描述视觉上真实的图像。我们提出了一种用于文本到图像多模态任务的新视觉上下文文本表示 VICTR，它从文本输入中捕获对象的丰富视觉语义信息。首先，我们使用文本描述作为初始输入，并进行依存解析来提取句法结构并分析语义方面（包括对象数量）以提取场景图。然后，我们使用图卷积网络训练场景图中提取的对象、属性和关系以及相应的几何关系信息，并生成融合文本和视觉语义信息的文本表示。文本表示与单词级和句子级嵌入聚合，以生成视觉上下文单词和句子表示。为了进行评估，我们将 VICTR 附加到文本到图像生成方面最先进的模型。VICTR 可以轻松添加到现有模型中，并在定量和定性方面进行改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为VICTR的视觉上下文文本表示方法，用于提升文本到图像的多模态任务性能。
AI.motivation: 文本描述难以充分涵盖生成视觉真实图像所需的详细信息，现有方法在捕捉文本中的视觉语义信息方面存在不足。
AI.method: 通过依存句法分析提取场景图，利用图卷积网络（GCN）学习物体、属性及关系的视觉语义信息，并与词级/句级嵌入融合生成视觉上下文表示。
AI.result: 将VICTR集成到先进模型后，在定量和定性指标上均取得提升，且方法具有良好的模型兼容性。
AI.conclusion: VICTR通过显式建模文本中的视觉语义关系，有效增强了文本到图像生成任务的表现，为多模态任务提供了可扩展的解决方案。

search_text: VICTR: Visual Information Captured Text Representation for Text-to-Image Multimodal Tasks VICTR：用于文本到图像多模式任务的视觉信息捕获文本表示 Text-to-image multimodal tasks, generating/retrieving an image from a given text description, are extremely challenging tasks since raw text descriptions cover quite limited information in order to fully describe visually realistic images. We propose a new visual contextual text representation for text-to-image multimodal tasks, VICTR, which captures rich visual semantic information of objects from the text input. First, we use the text description as initial input and conduct dependency parsing to extract the syntactic structure and analyse the semantic aspect, including object quantities, to extract the scene graph. Then, we train the extracted objects, attributes, and relations in the scene graph and the corresponding geometric relation information using Graph Convolutional Networks, and it generates text representation which integrates textual and visual semantic information. The text representation is aggregated with word-level and sentence-level embedding to generate both visual contextual word and sentence representation. For the evaluation, we attached VICTR to the state-of-the-art models in text-to-image generation.VICTR is easily added to existing models and improves across both quantitative and qualitative aspects. 文本到图像多模态任务，从给定的文本描述生成/检索图像，是极具挑战性的任务，因为原始文本描述覆盖的信息非常有限，无法充分描述视觉上真实的图像。我们提出了一种用于文本到图像多模态任务的新视觉上下文文本表示 VICTR，它从文本输入中捕获对象的丰富视觉语义信息。首先，我们使用文本描述作为初始输入，并进行依存解析来提取句法结构并分析语义方面（包括对象数量）以提取场景图。然后，我们使用图卷积网络训练场景图中提取的对象、属性和关系以及相应的几何关系信息，并生成融合文本和视觉语义信息的文本表示。文本表示与单词级和句子级嵌入聚合，以生成视觉上下文单词和句子表示。为了进行评估，我们将 VICTR 附加到文本到图像生成方面最先进的模型。VICTR 可以轻松添加到现有模型中，并在定量和定性方面进行改进。 本文提出一种名为VICTR的视觉上下文文本表示方法，用于提升文本到图像的多模态任务性能。 Soyeon Caren Han,Siqu Long,Siwen Luo,Kunze Wang,Josiah Poon cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Jiayin Xie,Chenghao Bi,David J. Cappelleri,Nilanjan Chakraborty
title: Dynamic Simulation-Guided Design of Tumbling Magnetic Microrobots
title_zh: 动态仿真引导的翻滚磁力微型机器人设计
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1907.12699
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1907.12699
abstract: Design of robots at the small scale is a trial-and-error based process, which is costly and time-consuming. There are few dynamic simulation tools available to accurately predict the motion or performance of untethered microrobots as they move over a substrate. At smaller length scales, the influence of adhesion and friction, which scales with surface area, becomes more pronounced. Thus, rigid body dynamic simulators, which implicitly assume that contact between two bodies can be modeled as point contact are not suitable. In this paper, we present techniques for simulating the motion of microrobots where there can be intermittent and non-point contact between the robot and the substrate. We use these techniques to study the motion of tumbling microrobots of different shapes and select shapes that are optimal for improving locomotion performance. Simulation results are verified using experimental data on linear velocity, maximum climbable incline angle, and microrobot trajectory. Microrobots with improved geometry were fabricated, but limitations in the fabrication process resulted in unexpected manufacturing errors and material/size scale adjustments. The developed simulation model is able to incorporate these limitations and emulate their effect on the microrobot's motion, reproducing the experimental behavior of the tumbling microrobots, further showcasing the effectiveness of having such a dynamic model.
summary: Design of robots at the small scale is a trial-and-error based process, which is costly and time-consuming. There are few dynamic simulation tools available to accurately predict the motion or performance of untethered microrobots as they move over a substrate. At smaller length scales, the influence of adhesion and friction, which scales with surface area, becomes more pronounced. Thus, rigid body dynamic simulators, which implicitly assume that contact between two bodies can be modeled as point contact are not suitable. In this paper, we present techniques for simulating the motion of microrobots where there can be intermittent and non-point contact between the robot and the substrate. We use these techniques to study the motion of tumbling microrobots of different shapes and select shapes that are optimal for improving locomotion performance. Simulation results are verified using experimental data on linear velocity, maximum climbable incline angle, and microrobot trajectory. Microrobots with improved geometry were fabricated, but limitations in the fabrication process resulted in unexpected manufacturing errors and material/size scale adjustments. The developed simulation model is able to incorporate these limitations and emulate their effect on the microrobot's motion, reproducing the experimental behavior of the tumbling microrobots, further showcasing the effectiveness of having such a dynamic model.
abstract_zh: 小规模机器人的设计是一个基于试错的过程，既昂贵又耗时。很少有动态模拟工具可以准确预测不受束缚的微型机器人在基板上移动时的运动或性能。在较小的长度尺度上，与表面积成比例的粘附力和摩擦力的影响变得更加明显。因此，隐式假设两个物体之间的接触可以建模为点接触的刚体动态模拟器是不合适的。在本文中，我们提出了模拟微型机器人运动的技术，其中机器人和基板之间可能存在间歇性和非点接触。我们使用这些技术来研究不同形状的翻滚微型机器人的运动，并选择最适合提高运动性能的形状。使用线速度、最大可攀爬倾斜角和微型机器人轨迹的实验数据验证仿真结果。制造了具有改进几何形状的微型机器人，但制造过程的限制导致了意外的制造错误和材料/尺寸比例调整。开发的仿真模型能够纳入这些限制并模拟它们对微型机器人运动的影响，再现翻滚微型机器人的实验行为，进一步展示了这种动态模型的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种动态仿真引导的翻滚磁性微机器人设计方法，通过模拟与实验验证优化其几何形状。
AI.motivation: 传统微机器人设计依赖试错法，成本高且耗时；现有刚体动力学模拟工具无法准确反映微尺度下的粘附力和摩擦力影响。
AI.method: 开发考虑非点接触和间歇接触的动态仿真技术，结合实验数据验证不同形状微机器人的运动性能，并优化几何设计。
AI.result: 仿真结果与实验数据（线速度、最大爬坡角、轨迹）吻合，改进后的微机器人因制造误差被调整，仿真模型成功模拟了实际行为。
AI.conclusion: 动态仿真模型有效指导了微机器人设计，即使存在制造限制也能准确预测其运动特性，验证了该方法的实用性。

title: A Study on Trees's Knots Prediction from their Bark Outer-Shape
title_zh: 从树皮外形预测树木节子的研究
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2002.04571
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2002.04571
abstract: In the industry, the value of wood-logs strongly depends on their internal structure and more specifically on the knots' distribution inside the trees. As of today, CT-scanners are the prevalent tool to acquire accurate images of the trees internal structure. However, CT-scanners are expensive, and slow, making their use impractical for most industrial applications. Knowing where the knots are within a tree could improve the efficiency of the overall tree industry by reducing waste and improving the quality of wood-logs by-products. In this paper we evaluate different deep-learning based architectures to predict the internal knots distribution of a tree from its outer-shape, something that has never been done before. Three types of techniques based on Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) will be studied. The architectures are tested on both real and synthetic CT-scanned trees. With these experiments, we demonstrate that CNNs can be used to predict internal knots distribution based on the external surface of the trees. The goal being to show that these inexpensive and fast methods could be used to replace the CT-scanners. Additionally, we look into the performance of several off-the-shelf object-detectors to detect knots inside CT-scanned images. This method is used to autonomously label part of our real CT-scanned trees alleviating the need to manually segment the whole of the images.
summary: In the industry, the value of wood-logs strongly depends on their internal structure and more specifically on the knots' distribution inside the trees. As of today, CT-scanners are the prevalent tool to acquire accurate images of the trees internal structure. However, CT-scanners are expensive, and slow, making their use impractical for most industrial applications. Knowing where the knots are within a tree could improve the efficiency of the overall tree industry by reducing waste and improving the quality of wood-logs by-products. In this paper we evaluate different deep-learning based architectures to predict the internal knots distribution of a tree from its outer-shape, something that has never been done before. Three types of techniques based on Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) will be studied. The architectures are tested on both real and synthetic CT-scanned trees. With these experiments, we demonstrate that CNNs can be used to predict internal knots distribution based on the external surface of the trees. The goal being to show that these inexpensive and fast methods could be used to replace the CT-scanners. Additionally, we look into the performance of several off-the-shelf object-detectors to detect knots inside CT-scanned images. This method is used to autonomously label part of our real CT-scanned trees alleviating the need to manually segment the whole of the images.
abstract_zh: 在行业中，原木的价值很大程度上取决于其内部结构，更具体地说取决于树节在树内的分布。截至目前，CT 扫描仪是获取树木内部结构精确图像的流行工具。然而，CT 扫描仪价格昂贵且速度缓慢，使得其在大多数工业应用中不切实际。了解树节在树内的位置可以通过减少浪费和提高原木副产品的质量来提高整个树木产业的效率。在本文中，我们评估了不同的基于深度学习的架构，以从树的外部形状预测树的内部结分布，这是以前从未做过的事情。将研究三种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的技术。该架构在真实和合成的 CT 扫描树上进行了测试。通过这些实验，我们证明了 CNN 可用于根据树木的外表面预测内部结分布。目的是证明这些廉价且快速的方法可以用来取代 CT 扫描仪。此外，我们还研究了几种现成的物体检测器的性能，以检测 CT 扫描图像内的结。该方法用于自动标记真实 CT 扫描树木的一部分，从而减少手动分割整个图像的需要。

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于树木树皮外部形状预测其内部结分布的深度学习方法，以替代传统的CT扫描技术。
AI.motivation: CT扫描仪虽能准确获取树木内部结构，但成本高且速度慢，难以满足工业需求。通过外部形状预测内部结分布可降低损耗并提高木材加工效率。
AI.method: 采用三种卷积神经网络（CNN）架构，结合真实与合成CT扫描数据进行训练与测试；同时使用现成目标检测器自动标注CT图像中的结区域。
AI.result: 实验表明CNN能有效预测树木内部结分布，且目标检测器可辅助自动标注，减少人工分割需求。
AI.conclusion: 基于外部形状的深度学习方法可作为CT扫描仪的低成本替代方案，推动林业产业智能化发展。

This method is used to autonomously label part of our real CT-scanned trees alleviating the need to manually segment the whole of the images. 在行业中，原木的价值很大程度上取决于其内部结构，更具体地说取决于树节在树内的分布。截至目前，CT 扫描仪是获取树木内部结构精确图像的流行工具。然而，CT 扫描仪价格昂贵且速度缓慢，使得其在大多数工业应用中不切实际。了解树节在树内的位置可以通过减少浪费和提高原木副产品的质量来提高整个树木产业的效率。在本文中，我们评估了不同的基于深度学习的架构，以从树的外部形状预测树的内部结分布，这是以前从未做过的事情。将研究三种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的技术。该架构在真实和合成的 CT 扫描树上进行了测试。通过这些实验，我们证明了 CNN 可用于根据树木的外表面预测内部结分布。目的是证明这些廉价且快速的方法可以用来取代 CT 扫描仪。此外，我们还研究了几种现成的物体检测器的性能，以检测 CT 扫描图像内的结。该方法用于自动标记真实 CT 扫描树木的一部分，从而减少手动分割整个图像的需要。 本文研究基于树木树皮外部形状预测其内部结分布的深度学习方法，以替代传统的CT扫描技术。 Mejri Mohamed,Antoine Richard,Cedric Pradalier cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

title: Modeling and Prediction of Rigid Body Motion with Planar Non-Convex Contact
title_zh: 平面非凸接触刚体运动建模与预测
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1904.07723
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1904.07723
abstract: We present a principled method for motion prediction via dynamic simulation for rigid bodies in intermittent contact with each other where the contact region is a planar non-convex contact patch. Such methods are useful in planning and control for robotic manipulation. The planar non-convex contact patch can either be a topologically connected set or disconnected set. Most work in rigid body dynamic simulation assume that the contact between objects is a point contact, which may not be valid in many applications. In this paper, by using the convex hull of the contact patch, we build on our recent work on simulating rigid bodies with convex contact patches for simulating motion of objects with planar non-convex contact patches. We formulate a discrete-time mixed complementarity problem where we solve the contact detection and integration of the equations of motion simultaneously. We solve for the equivalent contact point (ECP) and contact impulse of each contact patch simultaneously along with the state, i.e., configuration and velocity of the objects. We prove that although we are representing a patch contact by an equivalent point, our model for enforcing non-penetration constraints ensure that there is no artificial penetration between the contacting rigid bodies. We provide empirical evidence to show that our method can seamlessly capture transition among different contact modes like patch contact, multiple or single point contact.
summary: We present a principled method for motion prediction via dynamic simulation for rigid bodies in intermittent contact with each other where the contact region is a planar non-convex contact patch. Such methods are useful in planning and control for robotic manipulation. The planar non-convex contact patch can either be a topologically connected set or disconnected set. Most work in rigid body dynamic simulation assume that the contact between objects is a point contact, which may not be valid in many applications. In this paper, by using the convex hull of the contact patch, we build on our recent work on simulating rigid bodies with convex contact patches for simulating motion of objects with planar non-convex contact patches. We formulate a discrete-time mixed complementarity problem where we solve the contact detection and integration of the equations of motion simultaneously. We solve for the equivalent contact point (ECP) and contact impulse of each contact patch simultaneously along with the state, i.e., configuration and velocity of the objects. We prove that although we are representing a patch contact by an equivalent point, our model for enforcing non-penetration constraints ensure that there is no artificial penetration between the contacting rigid bodies. We provide empirical evidence to show that our method can seamlessly capture transition among different contact modes like patch contact, multiple or single point contact.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种通过动态模拟对彼此间歇接触的刚体进行运动预测的原理方法，其中接触区域是平面非凸接触面。这些方法可用于机器人操作的规划和控制。平面非凸接触面可以是拓扑连通集或不连通集。刚体动力学仿真中的大多数工作都假设物体之间的接触是点接触，这在许多应用中可能并不有效。在本文中，通过使用接触面的凸包，我们以最近模拟具有凸接触面的刚体的工作为基础，以模拟具有平面非凸接触面的物体的运动。我们制定了一个离散时间混合互补问题，同时解决接触检测和运动方程的积分。我们同时求解每个接触片的等效接触点 (ECP) 和接触冲量以及物体的状态，即结构和速度。我们证明，虽然我们用等效点表示贴片接触，但我们用于强制非穿透约束的模型确保了接触刚体之间不存在人为穿透。我们提供的经验证据表明，我们的方法可以无缝捕获不同接触模式（如贴片接触、多点或单点接触）之间的过渡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于模拟具有平面非凸接触面的刚体运动的原理方法，以解决机器人操作中的规划和控制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有刚体动力学模拟方法多假设点接触，难以处理实际应用中复杂的非凸接触面，导致模拟不准确。
AI.method: 通过构建接触面的凸包，将非凸接触面转化为等效接触点，并建立离散时间混合互补问题，同步求解接触检测、运动方程积分及非穿透约束。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法能无缝处理不同接触模式（如面接触、多点/单点接触）的过渡，且无虚假穿透现象。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为处理非凸接触的刚体运动模拟提供了有效解决方案，可提升机器人操作的规划与控制精度。

title: Adversarial attacks on audio source separation
title_zh: 对音频源分离的对抗性攻击
abstract: Despite the excellent performance of neural-network-based audio source separation methods and their wide range of applications, their robustness against intentional attacks has been largely neglected. In this work, we reformulate various adversarial attack methods for the audio source separation problem and intensively investigate them under different attack conditions and target models. We further propose a simple yet effective regularization method to obtain imperceptible adversarial noise while maximizing the impact on separation quality with low computational complexity. Experimental results show that it is possible to largely degrade the separation quality by adding imperceptibly small noise when the noise is crafted for the target model. We also show the robustness of source separation models against a black-box attack. This study provides potentially useful insights for developing content protection methods against the abuse of separated signals and improving the separation performance and robustness.
summary: Despite the excellent performance of neural-network-based audio source separation methods and their wide range of applications, their robustness against intentional attacks has been largely neglected. In this work, we reformulate various adversarial attack methods for the audio source separation problem and intensively investigate them under different attack conditions and target models. We further propose a simple yet effective regularization method to obtain imperceptible adversarial noise while maximizing the impact on separation quality with low computational complexity. Experimental results show that it is possible to largely degrade the separation quality by adding imperceptibly small noise when the noise is crafted for the target model. We also show the robustness of source separation models against a black-box attack. This study provides potentially useful insights for developing content protection methods against the abuse of separated signals and improving the separation performance and robustness.
abstract_zh: 尽管基于神经网络的音频源分离方法性能优异且应用广泛，但其针对故意攻击的鲁棒性却在很大程度上被忽视了。在这项工作中，我们针对音频源分离问题重新制定了各种对抗性攻击方法，并在不同的攻击条件和目标模型下深入研究它们。我们进一步提出了一种简单而有效的正则化方法，以获得难以察觉的对抗性噪声，同时以低计算复杂度最大化对分离质量的影响。实验结果表明，在为目标模型制作噪声时，添加难以察觉的小噪声可能会大大降低分离质量。我们还展示了源分离模型针对黑盒攻击的鲁棒性。这项研究为开发内容保护方法以防止滥用分离信号并提高分离性能和鲁棒性提供了潜在有用的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究针对音频源分离模型的对抗攻击方法，并提出一种生成不可感知对抗噪声的正则化技术以降低分离质量。
AI.motivation: 现有音频源分离模型在面对有意设计的对抗攻击时存在鲁棒性缺陷，可能引发内容安全风险，需探索攻击机制与防御策略。
AI.method: 重构多种对抗攻击算法，设计低复杂度正则化方法生成微小但有效的对抗噪声，并验证其在不同模型与攻击场景下的效果。
AI.result: 实验表明定制对抗噪声可显著降级分离质量，且源分离模型对黑盒攻击具有一定防御能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了音频源分离系统的潜在安全漏洞，为内容保护技术开发及模型鲁棒性提升提供了理论依据。

authors_text: Weichao Mao,Kaiqing Zhang,Ruihao Zhu,David Simchi-Levi,Tamer Başar
title: Model-Free Non-Stationary RL: Near-Optimal Regret and Applications in Multi-Agent RL and Inventory Control
title_zh: 无模型非平稳强化学习：近最优遗憾及其在多智能体强化学习和库存控制中的应用
comment: A preliminary version of this work has appeared in ICML 2021
comments: A preliminary version of this work has appeared in ICML 2021
abstract: We consider model-free reinforcement learning (RL) in non-stationary Markov decision processes. Both the reward functions and the state transition functions are allowed to vary arbitrarily over time as long as their cumulative variations do not exceed certain variation budgets. We propose Restarted Q-Learning with Upper Confidence Bounds (RestartQ-UCB), the first model-free algorithm for non-stationary RL, and show that it outperforms existing solutions in terms of dynamic regret. Specifically, RestartQ-UCB with Freedman-type bonus terms achieves a dynamic regret bound of $\widetilde{O}(S^{\frac{1}{3}} A^{\frac{1}{3}} Δ^{\frac{1}{3}} H T^{\frac{2}{3}})$, where $S$ and $A$ are the numbers of states and actions, respectively, $Δ>0$ is the variation budget, $H$ is the number of time steps per episode, and $T$ is the total number of time steps. We further present a parameter-free algorithm named Double-Restart Q-UCB that does not require prior knowledge of the variation budget. We show that our algorithms are \emph{nearly optimal} by establishing an information-theoretical lower bound of $Ω(S^{\frac{1}{3}} A^{\frac{1}{3}} Δ^{\frac{1}{3}} H^{\frac{2}{3}} T^{\frac{2}{3}})$, the first lower bound in non-stationary RL. Numerical experiments validate the advantages of RestartQ-UCB in terms of both cumulative rewards and computational efficiency. We demonstrate the power of our results in examples of multi-agent RL and inventory control across related products.

We further present a parameter-free algorithm named Double-Restart Q-UCB that does not require prior knowledge of the variation budget. We show that our algorithms are \emph{nearly optimal} by establishing an information-theoretical lower bound of $Ω(S^{\frac{1}{3}} A^{\frac{1}{3}} Δ^{\frac{1}{3}} H^{\frac{2}{3}} T^{\frac{2}{3}})$, the first lower bound in non-stationary RL. Numerical experiments validate the advantages of RestartQ-UCB in terms of both cumulative rewards and computational efficiency. We demonstrate the power of our results in examples of multi-agent RL and inventory control across related products.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑非平稳马尔可夫决策过程中的无模型强化学习（RL）。奖励函数和状态转换函数都可以随时间任意变化，只要它们的累积变化不超过一定的变化预算。我们提出了具有上置信界的重新启动 Q-Learning (RestartQ-UCB)，这是第一个用于非平稳 RL 的无模型算法，并表明它在动态遗憾方面优于现有解决方案。具体来说，带有 Freedman 型奖励项的 RestartQ-UCB 实现了 $\widetilde{O}(S^{\frac{1}{3}} A^{\frac{1}{3}} Δ^{\frac{1}{3}} H T^{\frac{2}{3}})$ 的动态后悔界限，其中 $S$ 和 $A$ 分别是状态和动作的数量，$Δ>0$ 是变化预算，$H$ 是时间数量每集的步数，$T$ 是时间步的总数。我们进一步提出了一种名为 Double-Restart Q-UCB 的无参数算法，该算法不需要事先了解变化预算。我们通过建立$Ω(S^{\frac{1}{3}} A^{\frac{1}{3}} Δ^{\frac{1}{3}} H^{\frac{2}{3}} T^{\frac{2}{3}})$的信息论下界（非平稳强化学习中的第一个下界）来证明我们的算法\emph{接近最优}。数值实验验证了RestartQ-UCB在累积奖励和计算效率方面的优势。我们通过相关产品的多智能体强化学习和库存控制示例展示了我们结果的威力。

AI.tldr: 本文研究非平稳马尔可夫决策过程中的模型无关强化学习，提出了一种名为RestartQ-UCB的算法，并分析了其在多智能体强化学习和库存控制中的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习算法在非平稳环境中表现不佳，无法有效处理奖励函数和状态转移函数随时间变化的情况，导致动态遗憾较大。
AI.method: 提出RestartQ-UCB算法及其参数无关变体Double-Restart Q-UCB，通过重启机制和上置信界奖励项应对非平稳性，并建立信息论下界证明算法近似最优性。
AI.result: 理论证明RestartQ-UCB的动态遗憾界为~O(S^{1/3}A^{1/3}Δ^{1/3}H T^{2/3})，并首次给出非平稳RL的信息论下界Ω(S^{1/3}A^{1/3}Δ^{1/3}H^{2/3}T^{2/3})，实验验证其在累积奖励和计算效率上的优势。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法在非平稳环境下实现近似最优动态遗憾，且无需先验变差预算，为多智能体协作和库存控制等实际问题提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Model-Free Non-Stationary RL: Near-Optimal Regret and Applications in Multi-Agent RL and Inventory Control 无模型非平稳强化学习：近最优遗憾及其在多智能体强化学习和库存控制中的应用 We consider model-free reinforcement learning (RL) in non-stationary Markov decision processes. Both the reward functions and the state transition functions are allowed to vary arbitrarily over time as long as their cumulative variations do not exceed certain variation budgets. We propose Restarted Q-Learning with Upper Confidence Bounds (RestartQ-UCB), the first model-free algorithm for non-stationary RL, and show that it outperforms existing solutions in terms of dynamic regret. Specifically, RestartQ-UCB with Freedman-type bonus terms achieves a dynamic regret bound of $\widetilde{O}(S^{\frac{1}{3}} A^{\frac{1}{3}} Δ^{\frac{1}{3}} H T^{\frac{2}{3}})$, where $S$ and $A$ are the numbers of states and actions, respectively, $Δ>0$ is the variation budget, $H$ is the number of time steps per episode, and $T$ is the total number of time steps. We further present a parameter-free algorithm named Double-Restart Q-UCB that does not require prior knowledge of the variation budget. We show that our algorithms are \emph{nearly optimal} by establishing an information-theoretical lower bound of $Ω(S^{\frac{1}{3}} A^{\frac{1}{3}} Δ^{\frac{1}{3}} H^{\frac{2}{3}} T^{\frac{2}{3}})$, the first lower bound in non-stationary RL. Numerical experiments validate the advantages of RestartQ-UCB in terms of both cumulative rewards and computational efficiency. We demonstrate the power of our results in examples of multi-agent RL and inventory control across related products. 我们考虑非平稳马尔可夫决策过程中的无模型强化学习（RL）。奖励函数和状态转换函数都可以随时间任意变化，只要它们的累积变化不超过一定的变化预算。我们提出了具有上置信界的重新启动 Q-Learning (RestartQ-UCB)，这是第一个用于非平稳 RL 的无模型算法，并表明它在动态遗憾方面优于现有解决方案。具体来说，带有 Freedman 型奖励项的 RestartQ-UCB 实现了 $\widetilde{O}(S^{\frac{1}{3}} A^{\frac{1}{3}} Δ^{\frac{1}{3}} H T^{\frac{2}{3}})$ 的动态后悔界限，其中 $S$ 和 $A$ 分别是状态和动作的数量，$Δ>0$ 是变化预算，$H$ 是时间数量每集的步数，$T$ 是时间步的总数。我们进一步提出了一种名为 Double-Restart Q-UCB 的无参数算法，该算法不需要事先了解变化预算。我们通过建立$Ω(S^{\frac{1}{3}} A^{\frac{1}{3}} Δ^{\frac{1}{3}} H^{\frac{2}{3}} T^{\frac{2}{3}})$的信息论下界（非平稳强化学习中的第一个下界）来证明我们的算法\emph{接近最优}。数值实验验证了RestartQ-UCB在累积奖励和计算效率方面的优势。我们通过相关产品的多智能体强化学习和库存控制示例展示了我们结果的威力。 本文研究非平稳马尔可夫决策过程中的模型无关强化学习，提出了一种名为RestartQ-UCB的算法，并分析了其在多智能体强化学习和库存控制中的应用。 Weichao Mao,Kaiqing Zhang,Ruihao Zhu,David Simchi-Levi,Tamer Başar cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Xiaoyu Zeng,Yanan Wang,Tai-Yin Chiu,Nilavra Bhattacharya,Danna Gurari
title: Vision Skills Needed to Answer Visual Questions
title_zh: 回答视觉问题所需的视觉技能
comment: To be published on Proceedings of the ACM on Human-Computer Interaction, Vol. 4, No. CSCW2, Article 149. Publication date: October 2020
comments: To be published on Proceedings of the ACM on Human-Computer Interaction, Vol. 4, No. CSCW2, Article 149. Publication date: October 2020
abstract: The task of answering questions about images has garnered attention as a practical service for assisting populations with visual impairments as well as a visual Turing test for the artificial intelligence community. Our first aim is to identify the common vision skills needed for both scenarios. To do so, we analyze the need for four vision skills---object recognition, text recognition, color recognition, and counting---on over 27,000 visual questions from two datasets representing both scenarios. We next quantify the difficulty of these skills for both humans and computers on both datasets. Finally, we propose a novel task of predicting what vision skills are needed to answer a question about an image. Our results reveal (mis)matches between aims of real users of such services and the focus of the AI community. We conclude with a discussion about future directions for addressing the visual question answering task.
summary: The task of answering questions about images has garnered attention as a practical service for assisting populations with visual impairments as well as a visual Turing test for the artificial intelligence community. Our first aim is to identify the common vision skills needed for both scenarios. To do so, we analyze the need for four vision skills---object recognition, text recognition, color recognition, and counting---on over 27,000 visual questions from two datasets representing both scenarios. We next quantify the difficulty of these skills for both humans and computers on both datasets. Finally, we propose a novel task of predicting what vision skills are needed to answer a question about an image. Our results reveal (mis)matches between aims of real users of such services and the focus of the AI community. We conclude with a discussion about future directions for addressing the visual question answering task.
abstract_zh: 回答有关图像的问题的任务作为帮助视觉障碍人群的实用服务以及人工智能界的视觉图灵测试而引起了人们的关注。我们的首要目标是确定这两种情况所需的共同视觉技能。为此，我们根据来自代表这两种场景的两个数据集的 27,000 多个视觉问题，分析了四种视觉技能的需求——物体识别、文本识别、颜色识别和计数。接下来，我们在两个数据集上量化人类和计算机这些技能的难度。最后，我们提出了一项新颖的任务，即预测回答有关图像的问题需要哪些视觉技能。我们的结果揭示了此类服务的真实用户的目标与人工智能社区的关注点之间的（错误）匹配。最后，我们讨论了解决视觉问答任务的未来方向。

AI.tldr: 分析回答视觉问题所需的核心视觉技能，并比较人类与计算机在这些技能上的表现差异，同时提出预测所需技能的新任务。
AI.motivation: 为视障人士提供辅助服务及推动AI视觉问答技术发展，需明确实际需求与技术研究方向的匹配性。
AI.method: 通过分析27,000个视觉问题数据集，评估物体识别、文本识别、颜色识别和计数四项技能的必要性及难度，并构建预测技能需求的新任务模型。
AI.result: 发现实际用户需求与AI社区研究重点存在偏差，例如对文本识别的需求被低估，而颜色识别的挑战性被高估。
AI.conclusion: 未来应加强实际应用场景与技术研究的协同，优化视觉问答系统的实用性和公平性。

ai_content.tldr: 分析回答视觉问题所需的核心视觉技能，并比较人类与计算机在这些技能上的表现差异，同时提出预测所需技能的新任务。

title: Where Are the Facts? Searching for Fact-checked Information to Alleviate the Spread of Fake News
title_zh: 事实在哪里？搜索经过事实核查的信息以减少假新闻的传播
abstract: Although many fact-checking systems have been developed in academia and industry, fake news is still proliferating on social media. These systems mostly focus on fact-checking but usually neglect online users who are the main drivers of the spread of misinformation. How can we use fact-checked information to improve users' consciousness of fake news to which they are exposed? How can we stop users from spreading fake news? To tackle these questions, we propose a novel framework to search for fact-checking articles, which address the content of an original tweet (that may contain misinformation) posted by online users. The search can directly warn fake news posters and online users (e.g. the posters' followers) about misinformation, discourage them from spreading fake news, and scale up verified content on social media. Our framework uses both text and images to search for fact-checking articles, and achieves promising results on real-world datasets. Our code and datasets are released at https://github.com/nguyenvo09/EMNLP2020.
summary: Although many fact-checking systems have been developed in academia and industry, fake news is still proliferating on social media. These systems mostly focus on fact-checking but usually neglect online users who are the main drivers of the spread of misinformation. How can we use fact-checked information to improve users' consciousness of fake news to which they are exposed? How can we stop users from spreading fake news? To tackle these questions, we propose a novel framework to search for fact-checking articles, which address the content of an original tweet (that may contain misinformation) posted by online users. The search can directly warn fake news posters and online users (e.g. the posters' followers) about misinformation, discourage them from spreading fake news, and scale up verified content on social media. Our framework uses both text and images to search for fact-checking articles, and achieves promising results on real-world datasets. Our code and datasets are released at https://github.com/nguyenvo09/EMNLP2020.
abstract_zh: 尽管学术界和工业界已经开发了许多事实核查系统，但社交媒体上的假新闻仍在激增。这些系统主要侧重于事实核查，但通常忽视在线用户，而在线用户是错误信息传播的主要驱动力。我们如何利用经过事实核查的信息来提高用户对假新闻的认识？我们如何阻止用户传播假新闻？为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个新颖的框架来搜索事实核查文章，这些文章解决了在线用户发布的原始推文（可能包含错误信息）的内容。该搜索可以直接警告假新闻发布者和在线用户（例如发布者的关注者）有关错误信息的信息，阻止他们传播假新闻，并在社交媒体上扩大经过验证的内容。我们的框架使用文本和图像来搜索事实检查文章，并在现实数据集上取得了有希望的结果。我们的代码和数据集发布于 https://github.com/nguyenvo09/EMNLP2020。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型框架，通过搜索事实核查信息来减少社交媒体上假新闻的传播。
AI.motivation: 现有事实核查系统忽视了用户作为虚假信息传播主要推动者的作用，导致假新闻持续泛滥。
AI.method: 框架结合文本和图像分析技术，搜索与原始推文内容相关的事实核查文章，直接警告发帖者及其关注者。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上取得显著效果，代码和数据集已公开。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过提升用户意识有效抑制假新闻传播，具有实际应用价值。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种新型框架，通过搜索事实核查信息来减少社交媒体上假新闻的传播。
ai_content.motivation: 现有事实核查系统忽视了用户作为虚假信息传播主要推动者的作用，导致假新闻持续泛滥。

search_text: Where Are the Facts? Searching for Fact-checked Information to Alleviate the Spread of Fake News 事实在哪里？搜索经过事实核查的信息以减少假新闻的传播 Although many fact-checking systems have been developed in academia and industry, fake news is still proliferating on social media. These systems mostly focus on fact-checking but usually neglect online users who are the main drivers of the spread of misinformation. How can we use fact-checked information to improve users' consciousness of fake news to which they are exposed? How can we stop users from spreading fake news? To tackle these questions, we propose a novel framework to search for fact-checking articles, which address the content of an original tweet (that may contain misinformation) posted by online users. The search can directly warn fake news posters and online users (e.g. the posters' followers) about misinformation, discourage them from spreading fake news, and scale up verified content on social media. Our framework uses both text and images to search for fact-checking articles, and achieves promising results on real-world datasets. Our code and datasets are released at https://github.com/nguyenvo09/EMNLP2020. 尽管学术界和工业界已经开发了许多事实核查系统，但社交媒体上的假新闻仍在激增。这些系统主要侧重于事实核查，但通常忽视在线用户，而在线用户是错误信息传播的主要驱动力。我们如何利用经过事实核查的信息来提高用户对假新闻的认识？我们如何阻止用户传播假新闻？为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个新颖的框架来搜索事实核查文章，这些文章解决了在线用户发布的原始推文（可能包含错误信息）的内容。该搜索可以直接警告假新闻发布者和在线用户（例如发布者的关注者）有关错误信息的信息，阻止他们传播假新闻，并在社交媒体上扩大经过验证的内容。我们的框架使用文本和图像来搜索事实检查文章，并在现实数据集上取得了有希望的结果。我们的代码和数据集发布于 https://github.com/nguyenvo09/EMNLP2020。 本文提出一种新型框架，通过搜索事实核查信息来减少社交媒体上假新闻的传播。 Nguyen Vo,Kyumin Lee cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Xuelu Chen,Muhao Chen,Changjun Fan,Ankith Uppunda,Yizhou Sun,Carlo Zaniolo
title: Multilingual Knowledge Graph Completion via Ensemble Knowledge Transfer
title_zh: 通过集成知识迁移完成多语言知识图谱
abstract: Predicting missing facts in a knowledge graph (KG) is a crucial task in knowledge base construction and reasoning, and it has been the subject of much research in recent works using KG embeddings. While existing KG embedding approaches mainly learn and predict facts within a single KG, a more plausible solution would benefit from the knowledge in multiple language-specific KGs, considering that different KGs have their own strengths and limitations on data quality and coverage. This is quite challenging, since the transfer of knowledge among multiple independently maintained KGs is often hindered by the insufficiency of alignment information and the inconsistency of described facts. In this paper, we propose KEnS, a novel framework for embedding learning and ensemble knowledge transfer across a number of language-specific KGs. KEnS embeds all KGs in a shared embedding space, where the association of entities is captured based on self-learning. Then, KEnS performs ensemble inference to combine prediction results from embeddings of multiple language-specific KGs, for which multiple ensemble techniques are investigated. Experiments on five real-world language-specific KGs show that KEnS consistently improves state-of-the-art methods on KG completion, via effectively identifying and leveraging complementary knowledge.
summary: Predicting missing facts in a knowledge graph (KG) is a crucial task in knowledge base construction and reasoning, and it has been the subject of much research in recent works using KG embeddings. While existing KG embedding approaches mainly learn and predict facts within a single KG, a more plausible solution would benefit from the knowledge in multiple language-specific KGs, considering that different KGs have their own strengths and limitations on data quality and coverage. This is quite challenging, since the transfer of knowledge among multiple independently maintained KGs is often hindered by the insufficiency of alignment information and the inconsistency of described facts. In this paper, we propose KEnS, a novel framework for embedding learning and ensemble knowledge transfer across a number of language-specific KGs. KEnS embeds all KGs in a shared embedding space, where the association of entities is captured based on self-learning. Then, KEnS performs ensemble inference to combine prediction results from embeddings of multiple language-specific KGs, for which multiple ensemble techniques are investigated. Experiments on five real-world language-specific KGs show that KEnS consistently improves state-of-the-art methods on KG completion, via effectively identifying and leveraging complementary knowledge.
abstract_zh: 预测知识图（KG）中缺失的事实是知识库构建和推理中的一项关键任务，并且它已经成为最近使用 KG 嵌入的研究的主题。虽然现有的知识图谱嵌入方法主要学习和预测单个知识图谱中的事实，但考虑到不同的知识图谱在数据质量和覆盖范围上有自己的优势和局限性，更合理的解决方案将受益于多种特定于语言的知识图谱的知识。这是相当具有挑战性的，因为多个独立维护的知识图谱之间的知识转移常常因对齐信息的不足和所描述的事实的不一致而受到阻碍。在本文中，我们提出了 KEnS，这是一种跨多种特定语言知识图谱嵌入学习和集成知识迁移的新颖框架。 KEnS 将所有 KG 嵌入到共享嵌入空间中，其中基于自学习捕获实体的关联。然后，KEnS 执行集成推理，以结合多个特定于语言的 KG 嵌入的预测结果，为此研究了多种集成技术。对五种现实世界特定语言知识图谱的实验表明，KEnS 通过有效识别和利用互补知识，不断改进知识图谱补全的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨多语言知识图谱的联合知识迁移框架KEnS，通过共享嵌入空间和集成推理技术，提升知识图谱补全任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱嵌入方法局限于单一语言图谱，而多语言图谱间存在数据质量差异和对齐困难，需通过跨语言知识迁移整合互补信息。
AI.method: KEnS构建共享嵌入空间实现跨语言实体关联，并采用多种集成技术融合多语言图谱的预测结果。
AI.result: 在五个真实多语言知识图谱数据集上，KEnS相比现有方法在补全任务中持续取得性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效利用多语言图谱的互补性知识，KEnS验证了跨语言知识迁移在多语言知识图谱补全中的有效性。

authors_text: Sheng Bi,Xiya Cheng,Yuan-Fang Li,Yongzhen Wang,Guilin Qi
title: Knowledge-enriched, Type-constrained and Grammar-guided Question Generation over Knowledge Bases
title_zh: 基于知识库的知识丰富、类型约束和语法引导的问题生成
abstract: Question generation over knowledge bases (KBQG) aims at generating natural-language questions about a subgraph, i.e. a set of (connected) triples. Two main challenges still face the current crop of encoder-decoder-based methods, especially on small subgraphs: (1) low diversity and poor fluency due to the limited information contained in the subgraphs, and (2) semantic drift due to the decoder's oblivion of the semantics of the answer entity. We propose an innovative knowledge-enriched, type-constrained and grammar-guided KBQG model, named KTG, to addresses the above challenges. In our model, the encoder is equipped with auxiliary information from the KB, and the decoder is constrained with word types during QG. Specifically, entity domain and description, as well as relation hierarchy information are considered to construct question contexts, while a conditional copy mechanism is incorporated to modulate question semantics according to current word types. Besides, a novel reward function featuring grammatical similarity is designed to improve both generative richness and syntactic correctness via reinforcement learning. Extensive experiments show that our proposed model outperforms existing methods by a significant margin on two widely-used benchmark datasets SimpleQuestion and PathQuestion.
summary: Question generation over knowledge bases (KBQG) aims at generating natural-language questions about a subgraph, i.e. a set of (connected) triples. Two main challenges still face the current crop of encoder-decoder-based methods, especially on small subgraphs: (1) low diversity and poor fluency due to the limited information contained in the subgraphs, and (2) semantic drift due to the decoder's oblivion of the semantics of the answer entity. We propose an innovative knowledge-enriched, type-constrained and grammar-guided KBQG model, named KTG, to addresses the above challenges. In our model, the encoder is equipped with auxiliary information from the KB, and the decoder is constrained with word types during QG. Specifically, entity domain and description, as well as relation hierarchy information are considered to construct question contexts, while a conditional copy mechanism is incorporated to modulate question semantics according to current word types. Besides, a novel reward function featuring grammatical similarity is designed to improve both generative richness and syntactic correctness via reinforcement learning. Extensive experiments show that our proposed model outperforms existing methods by a significant margin on two widely-used benchmark datasets SimpleQuestion and PathQuestion.
abstract_zh: 知识库问题生成（KBQG）旨在生成有关子图（即一组（连接的）三元组）的自然语言问题。当前基于编码器-解码器的方法仍然面临两个主要挑战，特别是在小子图上：（1）由于子图中包含的信息有限，多样性低且流畅性差；（2）由于解码器忘记了答案实体的语义而导致语义漂移。我们提出了一种创新的知识丰富、类型约束和语法引导的 KBQG 模型，名为 KTG，来解决上述挑战。在我们的模型中，编码器配备了来自 KB 的辅助信息，解码器在 QG 期间受到单词类型的约束。具体来说，考虑实体域和描述以及关系层次信息来构建问题上下文，同时结合条件复制机制根据当前单词类型来调整问题语义。此外，设计了一种具有语法相似性的新颖奖励函数，旨在通过强化学习提高生成丰富性和句法正确性。大量实验表明，我们提出的模型在两个广泛使用的基准数据集 SimpleQuestion 和 PathQuestion 上明显优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合知识增强、类型约束和语法引导的问答生成模型KTG，旨在解决知识库子图生成问题中的多样性不足、语义漂移等挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有基于编码器-解码器的方法在处理小规模子图时存在生成问题多样性低、语义漂移严重的问题，需通过知识增强和语法约束提升生成质量。
AI.method: 设计KTG模型：1) 编码器引入知识库的实体领域、描述及关系层次信息；2) 解码器通过条件复制机制约束词类型；3) 引入语法相似性奖励函数进行强化学习优化。
AI.result: 在SimpleQuestion和PathQuestion基准数据集上，KTG模型显著优于现有方法，生成问题的多样性、流畅性及语法正确性均提升。
AI.conclusion: KTG通过知识增强、类型约束与语法引导的结合，有效解决了知识库问答生成中的核心挑战，为后续研究提供了新思路。

Specifically, entity domain and description, as well as relation hierarchy information are considered to construct question contexts, while a conditional copy mechanism is incorporated to modulate question semantics according to current word types. Besides, a novel reward function featuring grammatical similarity is designed to improve both generative richness and syntactic correctness via reinforcement learning. Extensive experiments show that our proposed model outperforms existing methods by a significant margin on two widely-used benchmark datasets SimpleQuestion and PathQuestion. 知识库问题生成（KBQG）旨在生成有关子图（即一组（连接的）三元组）的自然语言问题。当前基于编码器-解码器的方法仍然面临两个主要挑战，特别是在小子图上：（1）由于子图中包含的信息有限，多样性低且流畅性差；（2）由于解码器忘记了答案实体的语义而导致语义漂移。我们提出了一种创新的知识丰富、类型约束和语法引导的 KBQG 模型，名为 KTG，来解决上述挑战。在我们的模型中，编码器配备了来自 KB 的辅助信息，解码器在 QG 期间受到单词类型的约束。具体来说，考虑实体域和描述以及关系层次信息来构建问题上下文，同时结合条件复制机制根据当前单词类型来调整问题语义。此外，设计了一种具有语法相似性的新颖奖励函数，旨在通过强化学习提高生成丰富性和句法正确性。大量实验表明，我们提出的模型在两个广泛使用的基准数据集 SimpleQuestion 和 PathQuestion 上明显优于现有方法。 本文提出一种结合知识增强、类型约束和语法引导的问答生成模型KTG，旨在解决知识库子图生成问题中的多样性不足、语义漂移等挑战。 Sheng Bi,Xiya Cheng,Yuan-Fang Li,Yongzhen Wang,Guilin Qi cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Tsung-Yen Yang,Justinian Rosca,Karthik Narasimhan,Peter J. Ramadge
title: Projection-Based Constrained Policy Optimization
title_zh: 基于投影的约束策略优化
abstract: We consider the problem of learning control policies that optimize a reward function while satisfying constraints due to considerations of safety, fairness, or other costs. We propose a new algorithm, Projection-Based Constrained Policy Optimization (PCPO). This is an iterative method for optimizing policies in a two-step process: the first step performs a local reward improvement update, while the second step reconciles any constraint violation by projecting the policy back onto the constraint set. We theoretically analyze PCPO and provide a lower bound on reward improvement, and an upper bound on constraint violation, for each policy update. We further characterize the convergence of PCPO based on two different metrics: $\normltwo$ norm and Kullback-Leibler divergence. Our empirical results over several control tasks demonstrate that PCPO achieves superior performance, averaging more than 3.5 times less constraint violation and around 15\% higher reward compared to state-of-the-art methods.
summary: We consider the problem of learning control policies that optimize a reward function while satisfying constraints due to considerations of safety, fairness, or other costs. We propose a new algorithm, Projection-Based Constrained Policy Optimization (PCPO). This is an iterative method for optimizing policies in a two-step process: the first step performs a local reward improvement update, while the second step reconciles any constraint violation by projecting the policy back onto the constraint set. We theoretically analyze PCPO and provide a lower bound on reward improvement, and an upper bound on constraint violation, for each policy update. We further characterize the convergence of PCPO based on two different metrics: $\normltwo$ norm and Kullback-Leibler divergence. Our empirical results over several control tasks demonstrate that PCPO achieves superior performance, averaging more than 3.5 times less constraint violation and around 15\% higher reward compared to state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑学习控制策略的问题，该策略优化奖励函数，同时出于安全、公平或其他成本的考虑而满足约束。我们提出了一种新算法，基于投影的约束策略优化（PCPO）。这是一种分两步过程优化策略的迭代方法：第一步执行局部奖励改进更新，而第二步通过将策略投影回约束集来协调任何约束违规。我们从理论上分析了 PCPO，并为每次策略更新提供了奖励改进的下限和约束违反的上限。我们基于两个不同的指标进一步描述 PCPO 的收敛性：$\normltwo$ 范数和 Kullback-Leibler 散度。我们对多个控制任务的实证结果表明，PCPO 实现了卓越的性能，与最先进的方法相比，约束违规平均减少了 3.5 倍以上，奖励提高了约 15%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于投影的约束策略优化算法（PCPO），用于在满足安全、公平等约束条件下学习最优控制策略。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理安全、公平等约束时存在约束违规率高、奖励优化不足的问题，需要更有效的策略优化框架。
AI.method: PCPO采用两步迭代方法：首先进行局部奖励优化，随后通过投影操作将策略约束到可行域。理论分析包含奖励改进下界、约束违规上界及基于L2范数和KL散度的收敛性证明。
AI.result: 实验显示PCPO在多个控制任务中平均减少3.5倍约束违规，同时提升约15%的奖励，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: PCPO通过理论保证与实验验证，在约束满足与奖励优化间取得平衡，适用于需要严格约束的强化学习场景。
